name: Angela (iPhone)
subject: whoops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
I know I said I wasn’t emailing you again before the end of the month, but
our finance team reached out with an update, and I simply HAD to email you
one last time.

We’ve seen a huge surge in grassroots donations in the last few hours,
putting us within striking distance of our $250,000 End-of-Month goal.

This is huge,
Peter. Especially since we missed
last month’s goal. Hitting this $250,000 before midnight would give us the
resources we need to expand our field operations — which is critical right
now since new polling shows our race is TIED.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30542?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2356%2E52803%2E0vBSOo ]So please, will you make a last-minute grassroots donation toward our
End-of-Month goal before midnight? Polling shows our race is a neck and
neck, so this could make or break the final couple months before Election
Day.

Angela Alsobrooks

subject: I’ll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:

Hi friend, College football is kicking off across Michigan this week, and I can’t wait to see what’s in store for our teams this season — including our national champions, the Michigan Wolverines. I know many of you are enjoying the first full Saturday of college football, so I’ll keep this quick. **[We have just a few hours before our August fundraising deadline tonight, but we need to see a surge of grassroots donations before midnight to reach our goal. Will you chip in $10 or more before midnight to support our work to elect candidates nationwide who share our values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91943238/495482233/-1652499867?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240831_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWRhMTgwMmUtZjU2Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eIKTUrI7_UvV2U-Z_4kPCkZVfyt2YlK_ZpJCDZI49yc=)** Since Vice President Kamala Harris and Governor Tim Walz became our nominees for the White House, the energy I’ve seen from voters has been unmatched. That grassroots passion was on full display during last week’s Democratic National Convention. **Momentum is on our side, but this race is still a toss-up.** Donald Trump could win. clean_body: | Hi friend, College football is kicking off across Michigan this week, and I can’t wait to see what’s in store for our teams this season — including our national champions, the Michigan Wolverines. I know many of you are enjoying the first full Saturday of college football, so I’ll keep this quick. = Since Vice President Kamala Harris and Governor Tim Walz became our nominees for the White House, the energy I’ve seen from voters has been unmatched. That grassroots passion was on full display during last week’s Democratic National Convention. Momentum is on our side, but this race is still a toss-up. Donald Trump could win. But he won’t if we can sustain our momentum over the final 66 days of this election. Which is why reaching critical fundraising goals like the one we’re facing tonight is so important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, and enjoy the long weekend. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: They are not going to ignore their plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The bottom line is that opponents of voting rights could easily enact many of the proposed policies from Project 2025. We're focused on the changes to voting and our elections, but there's no doubt that this plan would radically alter our country and our lives into a mix of our inequitable past and an unrecognizable autocracy. The loss of rights might well be irreversible.
We cannot stand by and let Project 2025 become reality. RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure every voter knows about the dangerous consequences of this plan before they vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
Vox - Project 2025: The myths and the facts [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
There's been a lot of talk about the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team. It's time for the truth.
Project 2025 is a detailed and specific plan for what the next Republican president could ( or in the eyes of some, should ) do with his power, including the preparation needed to put the plan into action. Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 has put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
This is not an unattainable "wish list" -- this is carefully crafted to be a list of things the next president’s appointees really can do , put together by many people who served in top posts under Trump last time and could well do so again. Basically, it’s an attempt to make the second Trump term way more organized and effective than the first.
This is a good place to mention that Project 2025 is also collecting a database of names of conservatives who have already pledged loyalty to Donald Trump and could easily take jobs in his potential second term, willing to start executing this plan on day one.
Already heard enough and are willing to help us educate voters across the country about this dangerous and anti-democracy plan? Pitch in $25 or whatever you can now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
Project 2025 covers a lot of different things, but basically falls into three buckets:
➜ Expanding the power of the president. Various pieces of the plan attempt to consolidate executive branch power in the hands of the president and his political appointees and away from nonpartisan civil service employees and Congress. For example, Donald Trump himself could be directing voter suppression efforts through the Department of Justice.
➜ Long-term conservative policy priorities. Slashing regulations on businesses, especially in regards to the environment. Ending climate change mitigation efforts. Reducing programs to help the poor, like food programs or educational requirements. Eradicating civil rights protections, including access to the ballot and our ability to vote. The list goes on, but if you've heard it from a conservative politician over the last forty years, it's likely in this plan.
➜ An extreme religious agenda. Further federal restrictions on abortion access. New, possibly expansive restrictions on contraception coverage. Outlawing pornography and imprisoning members of that industry. Banning LGBTQ books in libraries. Rolling back or ending LGBTQ programs in schools.
Project 2025 would fundamentally alter just about every aspect of American life . We must make sure every American is aware of what their vote might mean and how this expansive blueprint would truly impact themselves, their friends, and their family before it is time for them to cast a ballot.
Fuel our efforts to spread the word and educate voters about these dangerous plans with $25 or more today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=083124_3&amount=25]

name: Yassamin
subject: I promise this will be quick
body:
Peter, it's Yass. I promise this will be a quick email. I just had a quick check-in call with my team and they let me know we're still about $1,342 short of our August online fundraising goal. We close the books for August - **our first month as the Democratic nominee for AZ-03** \- in just a few hours.
It would mean so much to me if you could make a contribution to help us reach our goal. **Here's the link:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91943387/495484066/2145040083?refcode=240831_ya_endaug_l1&ms=240831_ya_endaug&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiZDE5OS1mNTY3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SysHbPTGdgCu0UG51gS4nWPFqCZm0RMveYGRAKswg5g=)**

Another shocking report reveals there have already been more than 70 attacks on America's power grid in a single year. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. "This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price." **Steve G.**
"Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable." **Thomas B.**
"Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning." **Jana H.**
"Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it." **Allan D.**
"Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!" **Chris S.**
"Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!" **Richard B.**
"Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!" **Frank S.**
"We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product." name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Counting down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=6cj%2Fse3INgC50v07Vs5R1aY2kr%2Fv%2Bwg73dAG3Ujo%2FH%2F3iFXGteaVKMkvHB0Bp8oBzwX7S4NS6lUqxXCQLSWZlKU8uC85uFnr1Mr786uRSrvY4M5iRvJzlj%2FDNwJCxU78433d1g397d9ITXk20%2FWQAlcX6dQNHPNcyJMVrsG6fV6R3UHufRI0v%2FC1%2FcqwO19hV3WdGWN7xoRfk4ua%2FZW2bu6OXG%2BJuPu5iUpSgTdaO4hqz75a57cKMrtBwYgIhzWTdNwFz6jVyJrtoeZwI8Db%2F6IXIsHbugb3pES1fGEl6zwppFFfggioqypjCwTJlTRukl4L8KLKLzMHOH2ov1sxxEmYxOAkL1Lw1iF4JcCAzsSC9VjUo4hpR0ij0xIaYSnWDUNpFKvdnUGxRImcU1Mz6hkB0mRaemxizNHzf5JaH9KrDRyrcJqIQeFDGhJRlrVh]

# [#]
I won’t take up too much of your time — both because I respect yours and because we really don’t have much left.

Midnight tonight marks the end of our August fundraising, and we’re still scores away from our $15,000 goal. We’re going to need resources if we want to succeed in taking on our MAGA opponent and secure a blue victory for California’s 25th this November, but right now, we’re simply not where we need to be.

Fueling our movement with just $ or even $ is all it takes to make a difference, especially in a close race like this one. Election Day is right around the corner, and it’s critical we’re reaching out to the undecided voters across CA-25 to let them know how I’ve been a champion for them in Congress since day one.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

body:
| Friend, This might surprise you given all the emails, but my least favorite part about campaigning for Congress is fundraising. But the _Citizens United_ decision has made elections more expensive, and tried to undercut you, me, and any voice without a 12-figure bank account. I am working to stop the influence of big money in politics – I have the support of groups like _End Citizens United_ – but the reality is that we don’t raise the resources to take back the House, campaign finance reform won’t see the light of day in a Republican Congress. Midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline, and your support would go a long way in helping us meet our August goal. **Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? ****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91943981/495489708/332663592?refcode=em-8.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE1NGY1ZjMtZjY2Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I9Ttz9A0UpxY2XP9aqgBj8UOXquCzALM9Spw1c8uGsE=)**

Believe it or not, a significant chunk of our donations come from emails like this. Each individual donation sends a message that one more member of our community is ready to elect the first progressive woman to CA-30. body:
you’re missing from our signature records
| Jack Smith just INDICTED Donald Trump after months of being silenced – this is our chance to FINALLY hold Trump accountable for good!

**But your name is still MISSING from our petition standing with Jack Smith in his fight!** [**YOU HAVE ONE MORE CHANCE: Sign by midnight!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_smith/?source=VPP_20240831_EMPET_E7_T0_NS&t=6&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I) | [**SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH SPECIAL COUNSEL JACK SMITH »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_smith/?source=VPP_20240831_EMPET_E7_T0_NS&t=7&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I)

_The Voter Protection Project_

**_BREAKING:
Jack Smith Files New Indictment Against Donald Trump _**
[**STAND WITH JACK SMITH IN HIS FIGHT TO TAKE DOWN TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_smith/?source=VPP_20240831_EMPET_E7_T0_NS&t=8&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I)
---
**** EMERGENCY PETITION CLOSING @ 12 AM ****
**FIRST:** Donald Trump ATTACKED Jack Smith for holding him accountable for his crimes, even calling him a _“LOW LIFE!”_

**THEN:** Judge Cannon DERAILED Smith’s efforts to bring Trump to justice, and the courts REFUSED to remove her from the case!

**_NOW:_** we need 1,000 Democrats to sign our emergency petition to stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith so Trump can be rightfully held accountable!
**With Judge Cannon rushing to Trump’s defense, we’re counting on you to step up!** [**Sign our emergency petition and show Jack Smith that every Democrat has his back!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_smith/?source=VPP_20240831_EMPET_E7_T0_NS&t=9&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I)

Voter Protection Project

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16551%2E878179%2EbdzZ2I).**

Peter,

I’m sure you hear from a lot of candidates how important their race is – and they’re probably right!

But when I say **this is arguably _the most competitive House race in the entire country_ , _I mean it._**

And with the House majority teetering on just a few seats, this race can’t be ignored.

That’s why we’ve set an **aggressive goal to raise $10,000 for our August month-end push before the deadline** – _the national implications of this race are too great._

I know this deadline falls on Labor Day Weekend, which only makes reaching this goal harder. subject: how we reach undecided voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
We're in trouble.
| | |
---
Friend, we're in trouble: **With Senate control at stake, we're in real danger of missing our $2 million end-of-month goal and not having the resources to protect this must-win seat in Ohio.

[We're running out of time, so I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 or more before midnight to make sure we have what it takes to win and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91944058/495492179/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2668-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlMDQ0My1mNzY3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnNOErE71zllh-SdL5QuxKaQFT1rJEHDvMc3m3LiAsg=)**

Polls show me deadlocked with my Trump-backed opponent. At this stage in the race, voters are already requesting their ballots, which means we have just a few short weeks to reach undecided voters with our pro-worker message and secure their support.
This race will be decided by just a handful of votes at a few precincts across Ohio, so winning will come down to reaching more undecided voters than my opponent, convincing them to join our fight for the Dignity of Work, and making sure they turn out to vote.
**I'll be honest, friend, this takes A LOT of resources. My MAGA opponent is spending millions of dollars to try to buy this seat, so I'm counting on this grassroots team, including you, friend, to help me fight back and hit our goal so we can reach the voters we need to before they cast their ballots.**
**[So please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline at midnight to help us reach undecided voters, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91944060/495492187/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2668-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlMDQ0My1mNzY3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnNOErE71zllh-SdL5QuxKaQFT1rJEHDvMc3m3LiAsg=)**

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. body:

Hello Peter,
Tonight is your last chance to chip in to my campaign before our major end-of-month fundraising deadline.
**[Chip in before midnight »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240831-5?refcode=em20240831-5&recurring=1&refcode2=4046_552475_TUxyq8&akid=4046%2E552475%2ETUxyq8)**
My opponent has Donald Trump and the entire GOP establishment behind him -- that’s why a new report shows that Pennsylvania is the second most expensive Senate race in the entire country.
To overcome the wave of outside spending already on our airwaves, we need to reach our goal before midnight. Our fundraising goals help us build our budget, and we need the funds to fight back.
[**Chip in today to make sure my campaign can reach its midnight fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240831-5?refcode=em20240831-5&recurring=1&refcode2=4046_552475_TUxyq8&akid=4046%2E552475%2ETUxyq8)

name: Hung
subject: I know this is a little longer than usual
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
I want to level with you
Hi Peter,
It's Hung Cao, and I want to level with you.
Sending emails like this isn't something I enjoy. And you know what? I'm willing to bet you're just as tired of receiving them from every single politician in Washington. Trust me, my inbox is overflowing, and I'm as fed up with them as you are.
So here's the deal: I won't beg you for money or resort to flashy tactics. Instead, I'm going to lay it all out on the table and be completely upfront with you.
When it all comes down to it, people from every corner of our nation will scrutinize the amount of money we've raised during this crucial first month since I announced my campaign. We have an opportunity to make a resounding impact, and we need to seize the moment.
As I mentioned before, I don't like sending these emails and texts, but can you guess what I do love doing?
I LOVE having the chance to prove all the doubters wrong--the ones who laugh at me for having hope in America, who question our ability to triumph over an incumbent Democrat, and those who doubt I can turn this blue state into a red one.
To them, I say: Bring it on.
I've always told you that I don't shy away from a fight, and I mean it.
If you're someone who shares that spirit and refuses to back down, join me in the trenches of this new mission, and let's show the world what we're truly capable of.
I won't pretend it'll be easy, but by joining forces, we'll send a resounding message that true change starts from the ground up. We'll prove that ordinary people united by a common purpose can defy the odds and create a future where our voices are heard.
So, Peter, if you're as determined as I am, let's rise above the noise. Let's show them what we're made of.
[**https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/deadline-almost-here**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=0f7daa85fc8c4b5488715a1ca345d489&_e=GdC-ZHg0ctmR2kMclfS2Y43buh-nPhMVEEGk2Ji0UWXYWZ4tgU-bUSXB5F0M-PFRY7__NgM-2ogOy7rWYesx0kIhwANXGlPrTnC8uwBwZQMv1vKyKVVwiv8xGN6T0CAVFqAECnzsjotaV8OVpO8R4GYKSAzN69rBmj9AvIfwPXcVJ96D1VvVqosDc7RMyum3EqENhtKqdjfQ9reMdSXZhGNS94lkvpaLJLCSMtee4QiMzChLdVTJ1JBHzJvADWwhRlYQQXVcJE76sAlDRogiy49DcHRvtBLnwmNYfRTuZpLQWXpnXi31awpj4gc8ZUPOcRkijllD3cXa2iaeeArnSQ%3D%3D)
Thank you for standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me in the battle to save this great Nation. Together, we'll prove that passion, grit, and grassroots support can turn the tide in our state and our country.
-Hung

Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
---
If you would like to be removed from this list, [please notify us here](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_s=0f7daa85fc8c4b5488715a1ca345d489&_t=hzYLhZjn9Xo6mnBLSKQwH0pCuV-Lqnb0kCdU0IQ36U1KSi5LVMKPzoOD-a9xmDD7h8ULYQpgqvSoTDDO20JOUQQcPzqwkzeX4TbASf0jIvzHIXnniFvqowiTtCaPHxyt).

$3.
If you knew you could contribute $3 to a campaign and it'd mean Democrats would hold the Senate in 2024, wouldn't you do it, lickety-split?
If you knew donating $3 could keep Donald Trump from getting back to the White House, wouldn't it be $3 well-spent?
A $3 donation to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan has the power to do both.
Yes, it probably feels a bit unrealistic to think that just $3 can do those things in an election where an extraordinary amount of money will be spent.
But by the time you read this, lots and lots of people have chipped in their $3. And now they're hoping you'll do the same.
Democrats can't hold the Senate if Elissa doesn't win Michigan. And if Democrats lose in Michigan, they will likely lose control of the White House as well.
So please:

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Historic opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin here.

When Virginians elected me in 2021, it sent a shockwave across the country and proved that commonsense conservative leadership can win anywhere in America.

Virginians hired an outsider and businessman as their Governor to help put Virginia back on the path to prosperity. We lowered taxes, created jobs, reclaimed the honor of America's Top State for Business, put parents back at the head seat of the table in their children's lives, and provided record funding for our students, teachers, and law enforcement heroes.

This positive change would not have been possible without committed, hardworking voters who devoted their time, energy, and resources to winning that historic election in 2021.

In 2024, we have another historic opportunity to make positive change for the entire country by electing Donald J. Trump as President and sending a Republican Majority to the United States Senate.

Even in Virginia, a state Joe Biden won by 10 points in 2020, we are seeing a competitive presidential race and an opportunity to flip a critical Senate seat too.

But we cannot do this without you.

We know Vice President Harris and Senate Democrats will raise hundreds of millions of dollars to win in November. If we let them outpace us in energy and resources, we will get the same failed policies of the last four years for the next four years. We won't secure our southern border, we won't bring down the cost of living, and we won't restore peace through strength around the world.

**[That is why I am asking you to please make a contribution of any amount to help Republicans win in November with a strong Republican Senate Majority to support a President Trump agenda.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=200c640cbdcc48ec85ae441ca33be87b&_e=3l7u2s7DBDYywBahEoy5U1F3Jif9a6xfUTOhYycByqdm24pt8rhgX7lGB1Rh2oDgGFxSzgIGjf1lyLlFOGhS41sXiL3c5MpCRbZUUU-eCAAgb3IYF3_eL785pkEGnc24ZulzLLxb52oe7RRl1pzjcUhGFqqvV9Do1q045iUXcIg761aHq2J_uNbzgz62HucTBniXhbgR0XS9EmGpfn9r-7H2Sg1AoUd-9W8tNTPZEIHY8jv0k_cHJHdfSlG8z9JGcFLLgfR610I_Jv8jVTlsgrlj3eAw2JweiGUaPuzJ3LLNJOm-CKSp6M3YrW7B3eHrMtP0_x6LO60YfLCb-23SVA42bVAWfB3QFJC0xnromIajQ8aWfTJ6mjz21dDHEt5_7nI76ih-AA61TvWV0lUI80CskS3xgR1sMCPZN5QYBQXlyq68LeyfEYaUniBNMMrW8KbkgzOYxwdO8olWDA_-ECQjIy2sWAJ4a7ReQwp4FNPR1e2QqbMx6d2Bjf4I9SD8)**

Trust me, I have seen what happens when everyone gets off the sidelines and gets in the game to make positive change with commonsense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we did in 2021 for Virginia and, with your help, we can do it again in 2024 for America.

Thank you for your commitment and your support.

clean_body: | = = Hey there, team — I hope you don’t mind me reaching out to you today. The Democratic National Convention in Chicago last week made it clear: We’ve got a lot of work to do over the next 67 days ahead of Election Day on November 5. Arizona is a critical swing state. Building a strong coalition here is the key to everything we need to accomplish this year, from electing Kamala Harris and defeating Trump to holding the Senate and taking back the House. Everyone in every corner of the state has to do their part this year, and that means engaging our communities, making sure our friends and families are registered to vote in order to meet this critical moment to defeat MAGA extremists. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Donald Trump spent his time in the Oval Office sucking up to dictators and dreaming of becoming one himself. name: Lucas
subject: I’m counting on top supporters like you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is our last chance.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I know it’s getting late, but I’m reaching out to top supporters like you because we’re still just a few dozen donations short of our August fundraising goal with only a couple hours left to reach it.
**[CLOSE THE GAP: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69793?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8)**
I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But we’re getting down to the wire and most people probably aren’t checking their email right now, so I’m counting on you, Peter:
[**Can you rush your first donation of $10 or anything at all to my campaign before midnight tonight? Hitting this goal means we’ll have the resources to keep delivering our message to voters on TV, online, in mailboxes, and at the doors every day between now and November 5.**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69793?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8)
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69794?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69793?refcode=em20240831-7510&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8)
---
Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your contribution will help us keep building a historic grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and finally take back Missouri’s Senate seat for working people across our state.
I’ll never take your support for granted, Peter.
Thanks for everything. Now let’s hit this goal!
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240831-7510-footer&t=10&refcode2=7510_614464_DUzrr8&akid=7510%2E614464%2EDUzrr8)**

You know I'm not your typical politician. As the first Latina from Colorado to serve in Congress, I’ve worked tirelessly to make impactful changes—like lowering prescription costs, protecting our marginalized and most vulnerable communities, reducing the high cost of living, and finding a way to get things done for folks in our state and across the nation.
This race is pivotal, and your support in 2022 was instrumental. We need your help again to continue fighting for access to affordable healthcare, lowering living costs, and protecting reproductive rights.
Please consider making a contribution: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/CaraveoAugust#dpwillis67@gmail.com**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91944636/495509796/-1837108903?refcode=email_083124_In-the-loop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGY2NWU1Ny1mYzY3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rHyIMcH0TGpHAqzjl6NiRquYGWTJhVwjrCG8dFgdW_A=)
Thanks for standing with me.
Best,
Yadira Caraveo (D-CO-08)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=7343%2E5257348%2EP2vMSf)
Derek, I’ll keep this as short as I can.
We’re a few hours from our August fundraising deadline, and we have a bit of ground to make up in these final moments.
What a month it has been — from the highs, like the Democratic National Convention and rallies across the country for Vice President Kamala Harris and her running mate, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, to the lows, like Trump’s Mar-a-Lago and Bedminster press conferences.
It will only get **_busier_** from here, and, on the Republican’s side, _**more hostile**_.
Trump and Vance’s attacks will ramp up. MAGA super PACs’ spending will increase. The efforts to defeat me and Democrats up and down the ballot will ramp up.
**That’s why I need you, Derek, and this grassroots team to power our campaign over this final sprint. For the last time this month, I’m asking:**
**Can you chip in to my campaign? You can use this link:[secure.actblue.com/donate/aug2024_abs_em?refcode=EOM](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=aug2024_abs_em.Izi0zA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240831_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=7343%2E5257348%2EP2vMSf)**
Thank you for being with me. We’re stronger when we work together, and I’m glad to have you by my side.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em.nPj3QZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240831_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=7343%2E5257348%2EP2vMSf)

The Uniparty, while pretending to be on opposite sides... | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_DkeETXky_a08c96llXXAPVfiEHFv2fVFRxiKaimpLgx7Lw52xHK0OwmNQYS_rTnU3LUihhKSduLWZATqrbQQWx23ABhIx55ejfZI5oGDh6dkBZGjO1Nr-4w02XcknR-qQMfsEtdYNDJa7FRXwtBefX)
---
Peter, The Uniparty, while pretending to be on opposite sides, is united in one thing: **preserving its power at the expense of the American people._[_I AGREE >>_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_BS9WolF6koUVnqj0MTR1eznroWw67z7LHYShO6k91HKyUZWT4Yl_FVb9wzIKVLVaMxfeq4NDnvq4ODKu2Uk1AjkboUyvA6SumW6s9vPMQDFgBw-b8u6d1_IJQEoefwi7eycX57uxAuFEiUNnO8Xgv6)_**

Both Democrats and Republicans spend billions protecting their interests while snubbing the Americans who built this country and keep her running.

---
[**FIGHT BACK WITH RAND: $35**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_CzyZVAI0t4Ak8y-qnJWqZ3tea1UYVJni35QVSxCDwt6g8T-1Eae3l6fkBV8Zk-CpXxRpusRk6fts3ArAPo7w41Wg28n2MAPBjCh0XbE6uhquoydKOhmHyH6iTembWWtLB5TncLEoxp50XGMaiTGHlm)
---
Peter, Washington elites think they can control our future, our economy, and our lives--all while profiting off the backs of the American people. They don't care about the small business owner trying to keep their doors open, the single mom working two jobs to put food on the table, or the young couple trying to buy their first home.**To them, we're just numbers in a spreadsheet, not real people with real struggles.**

_It doesn 't have to be this way, Peter. It should _NOT_ be this way!_

---
[**PUT AN END TO THE UNIPARTY: $35**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_CumuYkTaeO1JdwSl_9KLiZn1_arhcY-o8PLvkGp22YhyizFQA0ssnFfzeNUipTKYp6c9gP3LpTKPh4bKyXn8ZQAZwMEJh78Z8QvVbwUsLW1xQCRm8kQklRiaJ520PDGUGBfJm5vuCBO_-2Z6CabaTs)
---
When the Uniparty wanted to continue to spiral our country even further into debt, I stood up and said no. When they tried to chip away at our freedoms, I fought back. When they wanted to lock us down, I said no way!

I didn't do it because it was easy or politically expedient. **_[I did it because it was the right thing to do.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_AnksW5T6MdH9JVfzpauYoBRb-OZj18uNn5qDVBsMDecr_uMYpGtD4qrVEK-KVkgqBOZa0-2mJQRkiGDn7ltEHKvmMFEU3zH6teYMRKeUY-PK_WwNNkBRGy1-dJ4X78sdGtNJbQ2ts9HDKxG3ElAQIo)_**
Peter, I'm fighting every day to stand up for the average American who feels left behind, like no one in Washington cares about what happens outside the Beltway, but I **DO**!

**_[Will you rush in $35 now to help me take on the Uniparty and the Washington Machine?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90f9b118d43a4083b61d8131113c73a1&_e=s3gaihVUnotdSaEEEDFsqLvQc8tgHI0XngyClgA2giV0AlXhYK3OZaPfJ0xU0oVDI5h72q10fw1l1TVXYEn7_eNvJ2W5mZWBT39B17GBRR0c57Pv6ewS-BRZ_ra44iVGIowj1Nr2R_Wojao6vDrK6XBTfKt9C8jouv8JD9qJEGQyGUjcu2lOzPJSunxRDwEHVQRuyKVWzdZF-0V2qWGsPN0xqtOAAoMOSZpIfrGOgVruo4RGzSl1ptwfshIZQWt2TJm3locgAtFFzIT77h__RFXkIMhn_fP9jYTCZi7Fc_AgP5Ahd9nsGseA8KgL2SW1ZTEb-dGQwlZshUr3Tj6ac722JOfdW3DYClAAbQZ1EevOxPaczydO-GkatHH6C-l4kSc7edYYEAx6XTmxbygbwQ9N5UyFQbzxWluwvdDJPVzqMJeENAuytOKMU5ExDCYr)_**

name: Josh (personal)
subject: I’m asking you personally, Peter.
body:
Can you help us out?
Hey Peter,
I’m reaching out personally to ask you to make a donation to our campaign and help us hit our goal by midnight.
This could not be a more critical moment for our campaign. Ballots are mailed out in 36 days and we have to get our TV ads up ASAP.
I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t so urgent. Can you please make a donation to our goal? It’s so important, and you can have a direct impact on our campaign.
Here’s a personal link you can use: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2024-FR-August?refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91944809/495514396/-2081705138?&refcode=E10288-20240831-FinalEOM-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGE1ZDQwOTAtZmQ2Ny1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pS-TOfyHEp1XaAUx3XL3KWj7MenxTj5b9buICyMU6Tk=)**
Thank you, thank you!
Josh

Folks, before we close out our August fundraising tonight, I wanted to reach out to you personally. I was raised by two hard-working parents — a union lineman and an automobile tire factory worker — who taught me that if you work hard, you should get a real shot at success. Everything I do for New Mexico is grounded in that belief. Everyone deserves an affordable place to live, access to quality education at every age, and a path to a good-paying job. To keep up that work, **I need to win this race in New Mexico and defend our Senate majority.** But my multimillionaire opponent, Nella Domenici, and her allies are outspending our campaign so they can buy this seat to prop up the ultra-wealthy. name: George Whitesides
subject: final message for Peter
body:
Peter,

I know you’ve been hearing a lot from me in the past few days – thanks for sticking with me. I promise this is the last time I’ll reach out before our August fundraising deadline in 6 hours.

With less than 70 days until Election Day, we’re campaigning in full force across CA-27. We’ve built incredible momentum in this race – just last weekend we knocked on 4,000+ doors!

➡️ Polling shows us up 3-points against MAGA Mike Garcia, and his approval rating in the district has plummeted by nearly 10% – our community is fed up with his extremism.

➡️ The _New York Times_ just highlighted our race as one critical for House control. With only four seats separating power, the path to a Democratic majority runs through CA-27.

➡️ The national GOP is taking notice. They’re increasing the outside spending in this race and supporting Garcia with millions to keep their extreme majority.

We have a golden opportunity to rid our district of a MAGA mouthpiece and replace him with a tried-and-true community leader. But I need your help right now to get it done.

Please, if you’re with me, chip in $3 or any amount before our midnight deadline: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91944852/495514638/572242427?refcode=em-8.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDY3MTRiNC1mZDY3LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KDwtUln_YPN-Le83TDwlYXbEK2YhavDx8jpVJ57y68=)**

Thank you,

George

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=0PzxxBcmVkcN%2FbhO9NjNq2WYVJ%2BDLdsPfG44MOWe3Stqx6X8UK9zz79GxpWC7UyNm2DekS0Wqsnp0MTcbkacGE7H1UDxBLL8jjYlY4SN0fUT3YnoySw0ufr3oB8VRdhKRqmpcB39DMQ39cbUWB52MnittExA35Anv7PFVaEtUpw55Kg3tBr5eQqNrGNvd2PN4epla0%2FANyllxQE88rZPYJ02XDnuqVdxEA49aUX8Zenx8x%2Bxcn%2FlnSH%2BC7gfP%2FLaMq3eogqfOOjo1ScexeeSgAmv%2FYiP0OUJeFjEUKFo0o9jiuV0tf5svzwPY%2FCdD3CbEpFuzo0or8ihW63g5P%2FtkwwhuU%2BGglVw%2Bs60bQ4nql5n2sj2AY9gT9axrTWI8RnxDSeY11qvlK7u%2FVKfKaIa%2FrhgBM3nTt8bRpdLCaoGsY46W8k9eLMV3hG7oC2F7tfz).

name: Keith Ellison
subject: We don't have much time Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Our grassroots movement has been a key part of Minnesota’s progress. Together, we’ve boosted Democratic turnout and reached voters who are often overlooked, forging year-round relationships that bring us closer together and keep us moving forward. This year, our mission is more critical than ever.

We must keep Minnesota blue to stop Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans from seizing the White House and imposing their dangerous Project 2025 agenda on our nation. To safeguard our democracy and defend the values we hold dear, we need to hit every goal we set. That’s why tonight’s fundraising deadline is so important.

With just a few hours left until midnight, we’re still $5,500 short of our end-of-month goal. We’re counting on supporters like you to help us reach our target.

Remember: you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can contribute $75 (or $150 per couple) to our campaign and receive a FULL refund from the State of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your refundable $75 contribution right now so we can meet this critical deadline? Every single dollar will help keep us on track and advance our fight for a better future.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em240831_2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em240831_2?refcode=other]

Thank you,
Keith Ellison

Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1! You can now use your 2023 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

clean_body: I'm wondering if there's anything I can possibly say to convince you | | | = I'm wondering if there's anything I can possibly say to convince you to chip in $5. What if I told you that Ted Cruz won by just 2.6% in 2018? What if I told you that CNN is calling him the most vulnerable GOP senator on the ballot this year? And what if I told you that after months of trailing, a recent poll shows us TIED? = | | = I know $5 might not seem like much, but that's what this grassroots campaign is made of: $5 and $25 donations from folks like you who are sick and tired of Ted Cruz's culture wars and extremism. That's what has helped us pull even in the polls – and we need to keep up our momentum if we're going to reach millions of voters across the state, fire Ted Cruz, and finally give Texans the senator we deserve. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Colin Allred and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It means so much to have you on my team. body:
I know it's Saturday, but the Senate Majority is on the line in just two months, and we are being OUTRAISED and OUTSPENT by Democrats. |

[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c473befef9f84c4d9a873a283ff4daeb&_e=nwwDdX-Np13s7YakkzbzWR3Lgr8VsLsybEulxRn9YdkEM0Zm4cj1cTCRt1yQmPjpSDPCsf6dJr1RfBOWhzXEedGePGZu8bfFvniO6OaS_Mde06NCRb_asuIZfTv7TAv0vWFXwu-GAn0oYzUig15tnYjNBfEPp64kY9jRJ_t5qe2i5lQ1f1SwPCt4FvsJHiDclR-2MSlh3CDKLA17YFLcXAwDLE2AO9Ul4UXaUeMqCVw3XSRu2-avhKqo5tSrKbyecgmW2AglXj73Eg4G0oAhkhzq8ZuYAztrWNcG1w4NLsSCyizJV8dTJzl4cUk-kbjbWstIZRlR2eEF6wbd-ihnQrstX0j403vTPBtbnspHi_E5DKxDtRigsFvQk5hSDRnp)
Fellow American - I know it's Saturday evening...

But the Senate Majority is on the line in just two months, and we are being OUTRAISED and OUTSPENT by Democrats.

I don't mean to set off alarms, but you should be aware of the state of play:

* Kamala gave Democrats the spike that they needed to hold their slim majority in the Senate. Democrats are fired up and giving MILLIONS every day.
* The majority is going to come down to just a few key Senate races, _and our candidates are having to PULL BACK their efforts because we're not raising enough money._

I'm not sure where to turn, Fellow American.

We have recruited the most robust class of GOP Senate candidates I've ever seen, but that's not going to be enough if we can't afford to spread their winning message where it matters.

**[So, before our August end-of-month deadline tonight at midnight, can I count on your critical support of our candidates so that we can keep the campaigns funded?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=c473befef9f84c4d9a873a283ff4daeb&_e=nwwDdX-Np13s7YakkzbzWR3Lgr8VsLsybEulxRn9YdkEM0Zm4cj1cTCRt1yQmPjpSDPCsf6dJr1RfBOWhzXEedGePGZu8bfFvniO6OaS_Mde06NCRb_asuIZfTv7TAv0vWFXwu-GAn0oYzUig15tnYjNBfEPp64kY9jRJ_t5qe2i5lQ1f1SwPCt4FvsJHiDclR-2MSlh3CDKLA17YFLcXAwDLE2AO9Ul4UXaUeMqCVyd63aeuMU0xBdvF-vy2dAxJNV9qdRvzSTXKjCANw0E9pmdyyF2Afh4c9TzBPP-7szkN103s0iNHU56MuaO-ZEm5F_CufhlaJoVsR_vg2Jxi3YbtIyzq0oxCMQgtzDJRb3ZwLnAutcl728RFo4_YcAh)**

body:
Following up on our past email| | | Peter, my team and I reached out to you several times, but we still haven’t heard back.

This is one of our final chances to build momentum with the election just about two months away.

This race is going to be neck-and-neck, and YOUR contribution could be the one that puts us over the edge to take back the Senate. **We have 4 more hours to meet this critical deadline.**

name: Team Gallego
subject: LAST CALL: Please chip in before our deadline at midnight.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We can’t let up. We can’t let ourselves get comfortable. Arizona is not a state we can take for granted — not even close.
#

Peter -
This is the last call for donations in August. Next month is an official FEC month, and then in the blink of an eye, we’ll be at Election Day.
But we want you focused on right now.
If everyone receiving this email chipped in what they could to Ruben Gallego's campaign before midnight today — one of the last monthly deadlines of this campaign — we’d CRUSH our fundraising goals and have the resources we need to WIN this race.
But not everyone who reads this email will give. That is why we’re hoping people who understand our impact and the importance of these goals will chip in before midnight.
The donation is more important than the amount, because it all adds up when tons of people chip in. And the thousands of people who have given today are hoping you'll join them.
[**Use this link to contribute anything — even $2 — to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few hours.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-august24.kZit_I&refcode=em240831-5-e&t=1&akid=3002%2E734936%2EmeV51A)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $2](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-august24.naKVkC&amount=1&refcode=em240831-5-e&t=2&akid=3002%2E734936%2EmeV51A)**

But I just crunched the numbers, and with just a few hours to go before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, we’re still coming up $1,032 short of where we need to be. clean_body: | | | = | | Peter, I'll keep this brief. I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support my team has received in this race. We are fighting to defend Oregon’s elections and safeguard our democracy. The only way we’re going to win this November is by standing together and working harder than ever before over the next 65 days — and there’s no one I’d rather have at my side than this incredible grassroots team. But I just crunched the numbers, and with just a few hours to go before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline, we’re still coming up $1,032 short of where we need to be. With Election Day just around the corner, we can’t afford to fall short now. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could chip in $5, $10, or any amount using the secure link below to help close the gap before it’s too late. = Thank you for all you do. Let's go win this! -Tobias Read | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Saludos, Gabe here. I know it’s Saturday night, and my team and I have reached out a lot this week — but we weren’t exaggerating when I said that this deadline is the most important moment of our campaign so far. Whether or not we reach our $25K goal by midnight tonight will determine the outcome of this November’s election. It’s that simple, and that serious. From day one, I’ve been fighting for New Mexicans — listening to their needs and fulfilling my promises to them. I’ve been hard at work protecting reproductive freedom, working to address the issues at our border, lowering costs for working families and defending our democracy. Look, my opponent and the national Republican groups she has in her back pocket can lie about my record and attack me with baseless allegations all they want — at the end of the day, we all know the truth. And we all know how crucial it is to protect New Mexico from Yvette Herrell and her MAGA extremist agenda in 2024. That’s why I need to ask you one final time before midnight: will you chip in to support my campaign before our August fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? If everyone reading this email chips in $5 right now, we’ll reach our goal with time to spare. [secure.actblue.com/donate/gvfc-em-aug24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91945298/495524171/644372192?amount=5&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_180DO_083124_2_9_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJjM2ZkZi0wMjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5w4iUIPqs7Hu6YbZFsBhC595KcXj3LNk2y5XqpqCMWU=) I couldn’t be more grateful to you for standing by me through everything. Now is when your support matters most, and I know that together, we can keep NM-02 blue and win back the House majority this November. — Gabe

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, Gabe here. I know it’s Saturday night, and my team and I have reached out a lot this week — but we weren’t exaggerating when I said that this deadline is the most important moment of our campaign so far. Whether or not we reach our $25K goal by midnight tonight will determine the outcome of this November’s election. It’s that simple, and that serious. From day one, I’ve been fighting for New Mexicans — listening to their needs and fulfilling my promises to them. I’ve been hard at work protecting reproductive freedom, working to address the issues at our border, lowering costs for working families and defending our democracy. Look, my opponent and the national Republican groups she has in her back pocket can lie about my record and attack me with baseless allegations all they want — at the end of the day, we all know the truth. And we all know how crucial it is to protect New Mexico from Yvette Herrell and her MAGA extremist agenda in 2024. That’s why I need to ask you one final time before midnight: will you chip in to support my campaign before our August fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? If everyone reading this email chips in $5 right now, we’ll reach our goal with time to spare. = I couldn’t be more grateful to you for standing by me through everything. Now is when your support matters most, and I know that together, we can keep NM-02 blue and win back the House majority this November. — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . body:
But before I do, I want to tell you what $5 means to me.
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGvlDAUhX_NZVdCbylMFyye8jBqntFodEma9jJ00kIDhcn8ewOOb3t6zsn5enWI3g2PBuoPgDg6uwIiiBdAfPmBf37-oleq2a6kYvqVvnw7XvEjIKZHpHfrsyWnoJ0_1LrNbIPmgsZk1PAaJZdSSZ6NTSWkKTXVRSVJaqvVQCirQZZcIZacZ67BAstCFbzg8iJVrkmjtcpwLHmhBgllcXdTbudJe3tLyxZibuaQ-WZMKa7npA6wW8lsC-V3Ny1kDwdgd7rZpJM70szMIbiUiNhtMICdj2wc2InBJLOz93phNAe23yxbEUS3pdAHsm4LINonb3WI67wthkC0PvY-9uPw1I0OUbvrBKI9uS6C92kyvfzXTnM4unfej0Nvz3m9j_-z85RoSiDaAzYRYNVP3lkQ7e-B3ha83tXXUzwvJ9q3_fv-WUj6lC2NjXfnvVurGsrieiw9f2lv8G8AAAD__9den6g)

Friend,
In a few short hours, we’ll meet our August fundraising deadline.
Now that the Harris Regime has INDICTED TRUMP AGAIN and raised over $540 million from liberal billionaires, we have to keep our momentum running strong to hit our goal by midnight.
__I’m going to ask you for $5 to help us get there, but before I do, let me tell you what $5 means to me.__
I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio.
Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind.
My community’s jobs were sent overseas, and what replaced them was addiction and despair.
My mother struggled with addiction for most of my childhood. As she worked through these struggles, the burden of raising me fell solely on my Mamaw.
My Mamaw might’ve looked like a nice old lady, but she was tough as nails.
She taught me to love the Lord, but when I stepped out of line, she wasn’t afraid to give me a kick in the butt.
I grew up with nothing in my Mamaw’s small house.
_**_Back then, just as right now, $5 was a lot of money._**_
$5 is the difference between gas or groceries.
It’s the difference between medicine or the powerbill.
$5 is a lot of money, and that’s why I know asking you for $5 is a big ask.
**[So only if you can afford it, can you please chip in $5 before tonight’s deadline to help President Trump Make America Great Again?>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2unDoQhJ_G7IxwG8N4weLcyyFKpET5zxJ53M3BIxssMIzm7SPIJNtyVak-twnRu-HRsPo_BjA6XBkAky8M4OUL_Pr2nV6p5rtWmptX-vDpeIX_GUB6RPpnfbbkFIzzh1q3GTZgL2BtRo2oQQmltBLZ2Ay6QKtQqAoVKiRxFVelhTLXstIVUuYaKKAsdCEKoS5K54YMIGoroBSFHhQri7ubcpwn4_GWli3E3M4h882YUlzPSR2DbiW7LZTf3bQQHg4G3enmk0nuSHM7h-BSIuK3wTLofOTjwE8MrjjO3puF0xz4fkO-ApPdlkIfCN0WmGyfvNUhrvO2WGKy9bH3sR-Hp25NiMa9TUy2J9dFij5Ntld_2mkOR_cu-nHo8ZzX-_g3O0-JpsRke8AmYlD1k3fIZPv4UX9Vy_6zVKd4Xk62H_fP-3up6F22NBjvznu3VjUri7dj6flLewO_AwAA___hNaAr)**
[DONATE NOW](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2OnDAQhJ-muRnh9pifA4dNWPIjJcoqkXJEXrsZPLKNBYbRvH0EmeRarirV51Y-Ojs-Wqg-AOJkzQqIIF4A8eUNf__8Ra9Usb2RDVOv9PX78YofATE9Iv23Plty8sq6Q626zLSoa9Q6o5ZXKLmUjeTZ1AqB75Up67EQHMfq3RSC0yhEXWLNUdSZbbHAS9EUvOCylk2uSKExjeZ44UUzSrgUdxtyMwflzC0tm4-5nn3m2imluJ6TesB-Jb0tlN9tWMgcDsD-dLOgkj3STM_e25SI2G3UgL2LbBrZicEkM7NzamE0e7bfDFsRRL8lP3gydvMguidveYjrvC2aQHQuDi4O0_jUtfJR2WsA0Z1cteBDCnqQf9tp9kf3zodpHMw5b3DxX3YOiUIC0R2wiQDLIThrQHTSR32lt_qzPsXzcqL7tv_YvwhJn7KlNfFunbNrWcGluB5Lz1_aW_wTAAD__0Qfn0U)
I know times have been tough in America since Kamala & Joe took control.
But with the future of our country on the line, $5 could mean the difference between winning & losing.
**_[So please chip in today.>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGv1CAUhX_N7Y4JXIbpsOjiaV-NJhqNGpcNwuWVCbSkpZ3Mvzeto9vDOSfn45qUY_CPBup3gDgEtwAiyBdAfPmGv77_oFeq2aaVZuaVPn3ZX_E9IJZHpv_WZ8uJkglxV-u2cg3aK1pbUSNqVEIprUQ1NFRflVCeHKffNecXi6RJ1UJ76YR2vgoNcjxzzQUX6qr0yZBB57QVeBZcewVnfg_jyU2jie5W5jXlk51SFZuhlLwckzrAbiG7znS6h3EmtzsAu8PNRlPCnmZ2SimUQsRu3gJ2MbPBswODKeamGM3MaEpsuzm2IMhuLalP5MKaQLZP3ssuLtM6WwLZxtzH3A_-qVuTsglvI8j24LpK0ZfR9upvO01p795EP_jeHfP6mP9lp7HQWEC2O2whwEs_xuBAtv5n58r2WAZ7iMflZPt5-7p9lIo-VHPj8j3EGJZLDWf-ti89fmlr8E8AAAD__9YtoNo)_**

clean_body: But before I do, I want to tell you what $5 means to me. | | | | | Friend, In a few short hours, we’ll meet our August fundraising deadline. Now that the Harris Regime has INDICTED TRUMP AGAIN and raised over $540 million from liberal billionaires, we have to keep our momentum running strong to hit our goal by midnight. I’m going to ask you for $5 to help us get there, but before I do, let me tell you what $5 means to me. I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio. Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind. My community’s jobs were sent overseas, and what replaced them was addiction and despair. My mother struggled with addiction for most of my childhood. As she worked through these struggles, the burden of raising me fell solely on my Mamaw. My Mamaw might’ve looked like a nice old lady, but she was tough as nails. She taught me to love the Lord, but when I stepped out of line, she wasn’t afraid to give me a kick in the butt. I grew up with nothing in my Mamaw’s small house. Back then, just as right now, $5 was a lot of money. $5 is the difference between gas or groceries. It’s the difference between medicine or the powerbill. $5 is a lot of money, and that’s why I know asking you for $5 is a big ask. I know times have been tough in America since Kamala & Joe took control. But with the future of our country on the line, $5 could mean the difference between winning & losing. I know with your support, we will Make America Great Again. Thank you, JD Vance Future Vice President of the United States | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Debbie
subject: The real battle begins now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
We did it, friend —
**I am now the official Democratic nominee in a race that could determine which party will control the Senate.**
I couldn't have gotten this far without supporters like you, and as we enter the final lap of the race, your continued support is the only way I'll win — _especially when recent polls show this race statistically tied._
Even though _CNN_ calls Rick Scott one of the most vulnerable senators on the map, **his campaign still has hundreds of millions of dollars of his personal fortune at its disposal to fuel the most bizarre and dishonest attack ads possible about me.** I need my message to beat his to the chase, and I can't do that without you.
**[So with the primary behind us, the real battle begins now — and I'm counting on 20,000 supporters getting on board by midnight to show the GOP that our grassroots movement is unstoppable. Please, will you donate $5 to split between me and Kirsten Gillibrand and become an official General Election Founding Donor, help me retire Rick Scott, and flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91946207/495527956/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5349-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjYyMmNlZS0wYzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbfnkXWVY2Yzp8HbGzaVomymf-dC8vJ8lCoTiUeyZew=)**

Thing is, friend, this race was always bigger than just me defeating Rick Scott. There's so much more at stake, like stopping a Scott-run Senate from green-lighting all of Trump's worst authoritarian whims or holding the Supreme Court accountable and saving abortion here in Florida.
And with not just Scott but shady outside entities spending millions to keep Florida red, our reproductive freedoms under their thumb, and our voices silenced, **we can't have anyone sitting on the sidelines from here on out****.**
**[Our movement is now closer than ever to flipping Florida blue, so if you're with me in this from now until November, then please, friend: Will you be one of the first people to become a General Election Founding Donor with your donation of $5 or more to split between me and Kirsten Gillibrand today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91946210/495527959/-1374272946?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5349-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjYyMmNlZS0wYzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbfnkXWVY2Yzp8HbGzaVomymf-dC8vJ8lCoTiUeyZew=)**

clean_body: | | | We did it, friend — I am now the official Democratic nominee in a race that could determine which party will control the Senate. I couldn't have gotten this far without supporters like you, and as we enter the final lap of the race, your continued support is the only way I'll win — especially when recent polls show this race statistically tied. Even though CNN calls Rick Scott one of the most vulnerable senators on the map, his campaign still has hundreds of millions of dollars of his personal fortune at its disposal to fuel the most bizarre and dishonest attack ads possible about me. I need my message to beat his to the chase, and I can't do that without you. = = | | = Thing is, friend, this race was always bigger than just me defeating Rick Scott. There's so much more at stake, like stopping a Scott-run Senate from green-lighting all of Trump's worst authoritarian whims or holding the Supreme Court accountable and saving abortion here in Florida. And with not just Scott but shady outside entities spending millions to keep Florida red, our reproductive freedoms under their thumb, and our voices silenced, we can't have anyone sitting on the sidelines from here on out. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Truly, thank you so much for believing in me and this movement — I hope to see your name on that list. subject: @Team Debbie

body:
I know it's Saturday, so I'll keep this brief
| | |
---

We just need about 5 more donations from supporters in 34223 to hit our $5 million goal before my end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight. Debbie

You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | | | | ---|--- $7. That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: Reason #1: Election Day is only 66 days away, and in November, we’re facing legislative elections in 44 states – $7 helps win races like those and more. Reason #2: We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that raised over $331 million last quarter. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps Democratic candidates compete. Reason #3: Losing in November means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states for years to come – $7 helps defeat extremists who are determined to attack abortion rights and access to the ballot. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | $7 donations are exactly what we need to win and loosen the GOP’s grip on state legislatures. name: Kim (personal)
subject: I’ll make it quick:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

I know you've heard from my team a lot this month, so I'll keep this short.

I am incredibly grateful to have you on my grassroots team. Your support propelled us past the primary and into the general election, and for that, I can't thank you enough.

But our work isn't done yet. Your help is what's going to make the difference on November 5. We've got to keep up the momentum and make sure we have the resources we need to win.

Please help us hit our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight by chipping in now. You can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-august24&refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91946278/495528232/-913344937?refcode=em24_240831_eom6_fnd_gq_act___ksp_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240831_eom6_fnd_gq_act___ksp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=88e7636c-1068-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGU3NjM2Yy0xMDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=57Z_gK3-BCCMthMt4ctEGKTcD_PR4qYZGYUb5xURvCk=)**

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: Peter, I know you've heard from my team a lot this month, so I'll keep this short. I am incredibly grateful to have you on my grassroots team. Your support propelled us past the primary and into the general election, and for that, I can't thank you enough. But our work isn't done yet. Your help is what's going to make the difference on November 5. We've got to keep up the momentum and make sure we have the resources we need to win. Please help us hit our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight by chipping in now. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: These numbers are keeping me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
No choice but to ask one last time.
| | |
---
I hate to reach out this late, team, but I have no choice.
With only a few hours left until we have to close the books on our August fundraising numbers at midnight, we’re _still_ $50,437 short of our $500,000 end-of-month goal.
Experts are saying my race in Nevada will likely decide Senate control, and polls show me locked in a statistical tie with my Trump-backed MAGA opponent – who is being bankrolled by the masterminds of Project 2025.

**So right now, I'm not just worried about my own race if we fail to close this fundraising gap – I'm also worried about the future of our country if losing here in Nevada costs Democrats control of the Senate.**
**So please, friend, I'm asking one last time: ****_[Will you pitch in $5 or more before midnight to help us reach our end-of-month goal, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91946302/495528372/1398942472?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4501-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzExOGYzNy0xMzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQ17LO81-tA5lYwWSKbRwas5ps5Zh85F1X2ZW7jojVs=)_**

body:
10X MATCH to hit our August goal. LAST CHANCE!

| | | _**- FROM THE OFFICE OF HOUSE REPUBLICAN HQ-**_
We're living in dark times.

**Democrats are raising, not hundreds, not thousands, but HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to destroy our country.**

Kamala Harris and her pal Tim Walz have raised over $500M since Kamala took over for Joe Biden.

**That's half a billion dollars in Democrats' hands** _**... A scary thought.**_

Now. **[Today is the LAST day of August, and House Republicans have a CRITICAL end of month goal to reach. Can we count on you to activate this 10X MATCH and help us hit this goal right away?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2v5vbfb29f6pdau2d69dic9lfosjr2b2murlsc8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chjmeor0s3h2bs "Today is the LAST day of August, and House Republicans have a CRITICAL end of month goal to reach. body:

| | Peter, This is not a drill – **NY-17 is make or break for the House Majority.**
_The Cook Report has it rated as one of the T**OP REPUBLICAN TOSS-U** P races in the country._
That’s it.
That’s the rub.
And lucky for us... we are prepared for battle.
_From September 5th through Election Day, we hope to knock on at least 100,000 doors across NY-17._
Which doors are we knocking on? Republicans with a ballot sitting on their dining room table.
Remember that back in 2020 MILLIONS of Republicans across the country requested a ballot and NEVER turned it in.
But I don’t blame them.
Why?
Because no one knocked on their door. There was no effort to chase GOP ballots in 2020.
We must change that in order to retain our majority on November 5th, Peter.
**Because in 2022, Congressman Mike Lawler ousted DCCC Chairman Sean Patrick Maloney by only 1,820 votes.**
Making our race one of the closest in the nation.
Here’s where you come in...
_We are SO CLOSE to fully funding our plan and we are emailing you today to see if you can put us over the finish line._
[**_You see, to sponsor a FULL DAY of ballot chasing for one of our door knockers it costs $75._**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/EaLYhe0ERrCN/am5GYkNtaGRzNU1FaHRYQWJ2azlHRlFFV1k4aXBlcG9BVnhvNDhRQXJiaXVFZ2VhOWlwazYreTRZaHJWbnAyZ2MrbFlNU3FYUEcrVHMxU0hJNExMejd3Vng3TWtrL1hDYWxzWCsrVGJIK3M9S0/)

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Early election victory for the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end
body:
DAILY NEWS | September 01, 2024

Early election
victory for the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end

Republicans
are grinning ear to ear after hearing this news. They have
positive momentum heading into election day.

And an early election victory for
the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

NBC's Chuck Todd stabs
Kamala Harris in the back for one breathtaking reason

Not everyone in the
mainstream media is happy with Kamala. They're making their
voices heard.
➞ Continue Reading

One of Biden's biggest
failures has finally been exposed and it'll make your jaw drop

Joe Biden has had
countless defeats during his time as president. But this one
might be the worst yet.
➞ Continue Reading

Leftist candidate facing
criminal charges for this heinous act

The Democrat Party is
full of bad actors. But now some of them are finally being
exposed.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.
