name: Steve Garvey
subject: In-N-Out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.

| | | Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zluake5mj47hro2uj1a4lde86b9b8acdff98v7so_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge8ob0slh2bs)
---
| | In-N-Out... As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.This wildly successful business should be a true indicator of California's success and brilliance. Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.Those same policies bring about headlines such as this:
---
---
In-N-Out was forced to close its first restaurant ever because of the rampant crime in Oakland. The Democrats who did this to our state and to Oakland should be ashamed.I called for the Oakland Mayor to resign, and I called for Adam Schiff to join me – But unsurprisingly he’s silent on the issue.That’s because Adam Schiff, Gavin Newsom, and Sheng Thao are all part of the same Democrat machine driving California out of prosperity and into the ground. Friend, I think it’s time we go “Animal-Style” on Adam Schiff.**[And to do that, I need your help.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgdam1fiej1fmg0a0r5q4rs8rtgog6p8vq3vk8k8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge8ob0slh2bs)** Your contributions to my campaign show your support and a complete rejection of the 4-decade Democrat-Rule in California. They fund our extensive door-knocking campaigns – pay for impactful ads – and help me travel across the state getting in touch with my supporters and speaking as much as I can to Californians encouraging them to cast off the Democrat malaise.

clean_body: As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain. | | | Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies. | | | | In-N-Out... As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.This wildly successful business should be a true indicator of California's success and brilliance. Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.Those same policies bring about headlines such as this: In-N-Out was forced to close its first restaurant ever because of the rampant crime in Oakland. The Democrats who did this to our state and to Oakland should be ashamed.I called for the Oakland Mayor to resign, and I called for Adam Schiff to join me – But unsurprisingly he’s silent on the issue.That’s because Adam Schiff, Gavin Newsom, and Sheng Thao are all part of the same Democrat machine driving California out of prosperity and into the ground. Friend, I think it’s time we go “Animal-Style” on Adam Schiff. Your contributions to my campaign show your support and a complete rejection of the 4-decade Democrat-Rule in California. They fund our extensive door-knocking campaigns – pay for impactful ads – and help me travel across the state getting in touch with my supporters and speaking as much as I can to Californians encouraging them to cast off the Democrat malaise. | | | | | | | Your support means the world to me.Sincerely, | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE Please Add mailto:info@stevegarvey.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmup61jt4jd9ain7m2i4tubgv0f6gsife2hkpu40_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhu16g82iim64lk7o2q072fbes1oqqvgvfi8dio8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zveri4dvjtk8atl4o6sfnpqvgns9nos4kj3i4sa8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmufknbd8836cl596ek1r1feio8kvhk97j7epslg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhp65rf5paa9v4e1r1h1tot0fv49hb2qrr52dii0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0q34fgdol1jonfprg53g5nvob4scfvk3gga8ing_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

**I just wanted to quickly remind you of your Every Voter Canvass.**

_**_It is extremely important that you complete your Canvass. _**_

I cannot stress the importance of solid data from strong Patriots as we approach November. **When I managed President Trump 's campaign, I knew better than anyone how every tiny piece of information can turn the tides in any election**--especially this one.

I'll put it bluntly, **the outcome of every election happening in November, and quite frankly, the fate of our Nation rests on you completing simple surveys like this one. **

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Timeless lessons to the young and old alike
body:
Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkgu1255j9nq53nm35grura9c8i6qlqkeid8tno_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z83hn9g98qq7tsgkj58sn5m526mqch5ik53ul9fo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73cth2bs) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0edf2u2m0rc4oujpou7ifd0i9upt6r1hccqmino_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73cth2bs)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdbqdhbinlua7m6nj59llcqi1r2p91h4c78tpae8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73cth2bs) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqn2e09n91vha84caholtg6duhvtkpn9h5df45ko_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge2o73cth2bs)
---

subject: No more playing defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It’s time to go on the OFFENSIVE.

It’s time to go on the OFFENSIVE.
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/del92vSKIR_xwNXV2N12SA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotrZIP0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qaW1qb3JkYW4vMzFlMzczNzhiNWU0OTk3NS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODI2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SV19CJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpmz4Ic1GZomxHuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Friend,
---
Over the last four years, the Democrats have pushed their radical agenda so outrageously far that our days, as Republicans, are endlessly spent simply having to stop their dangerous policies.
---
But with the 2024 election _less than 100 DAYS away_ , let me be crystal clear: the time for playing _defense_ is OVER.
---
I’m a fighter through and through, Friend; it’s just who I am. And believe me, the time has come for Republicans to go on **_OFFENSE!_**
---
Elections are about the _future_ ...
---
...And it’s time to follow President Trump’s lead and go on the _offensive_ , laying out our vision for a SAFE, SECURE, and PROSPEROUS American future.
---
But the House GOP’s offensive playbook simply wouldn’t be complete without input from grassroots patriots like _**YOU**_ – the lifeblood of the America First movement.
---
[**Please take the Official Survey:_“The Republican Offensive”_ to share YOUR top priorities with House GOP Leadership.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/del92vSKIR_xwNXV2N12SA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotrZIP0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qaW1qb3JkYW4vMzFlMzczNzhiNWU0OTk3NS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODI2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SV19CJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpmz4Ic1GZomxHuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

**_Official Survey:_
_“The Republican Offensive”_**

**Participant:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Survey ID #:** 247215-1033 **Status:** [Pending]
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/del92vSKIR_xwNXV2N12SA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotrZIP0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qaW1qb3JkYW4vMzFlMzczNzhiNWU0OTk3NS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODI2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SV19CJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpmz4Ic1GZomxHuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

It’s not enough _just_ to fight back against Biden and the Democrats’ Election Interference.
---
**_We need to SECURE our elections for generations to come with voter ID laws and cleaned-up voter rolls._**
---
It’s not enough _just_ to hold the corrupt leftists and bureaucrats accountable.
---
**_We need to make YOUR government once again work for you – the PEOPLE._**
---
And it’s not enough _just_ to win in 2024, friend.
---
**_We need to win in a LANDSLIDE – defending our House majority, flipping the Senate, and taking back the White House to send a clear mandate to the Washington swamp._**
---
_But this offensive all begins with critical input from America First patriots like you._
---
[**So please, take the Official Survey:_“The Republican Offensive”_ to share YOUR top priorities with House GOP Leadership. **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/del92vSKIR_xwNXV2N12SA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotrZIP0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qaW1qb3JkYW4vMzFlMzczNzhiNWU0OTk3NS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwODI2JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SV19CJnV0bV90Yz1DQi0yMDI0MDkwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQVcDc3BjQgpmz4Ic1GZomxHuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrj0vfqd9o8ag5o1iht9pk4k7ad37r65n799d9co_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv8gn26dt1alh0ah97fjfs71scs0n7f1ukrjujq0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0c7jdpsnq0tvb5grt15q361e5ijfecsra0qacag_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghjoqnvg3th2b0hbe8b8dbqfjtfch7i311ehn50_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zilq7pbuucpgnsubv8rgm300otepkcoj36o08gc0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z61ebqpvtk49dl2b0bh98rkjhsjhrfivfcj42e0g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chie0pj1cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Senate Democrats are Fighting Climate Change
body:
Defending the Senate is key to a lot of important issues, including climate change.
| | | | | |
---
# Senate Democrats are Fighting Climate Change
---
|
---
Defending the Senate is crucial because Democrats are leading significant efforts to combat climate change, a pressing issue impacting every state, industry, and American. Senators like Tammy Baldwin, who is up for re-election and serves on the climate change committee, have been instrumental in driving progress. Over the last four years, this committee has become one of the most effective in history, pushing for ambitious actions to address the climate crisis. Every state in the union is feeling the effects of climate change, and it is clear that every industry and business is affected. Republicans in the Senate have been slow to accept, let alone propose, real solutions. That’s why the work of this Special Committee in the Senate is essential.
---
|
---
You can make a real difference in defending the Senate this November with No Dem Left Behind. One donation goes to 4 different battleground fights in the Senate, and it can go a long way towards fighting climate change. Their work focuses on understanding how inaction on climate change harms the U.S.'s economic and national security interests and how taking action presents significant opportunities for job creation, public health, and the economy. By keeping the Senate blue, we can continue this vital progress and work towards a sustainable future. Let's ensure we maintain this momentum by supporting leaders like Tammy Baldwin and other Senate Democrats committed to addressing climate change.
---
| | | | | [→ Defend the Senate](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2umr8k-ermpl0-kyd76rh0/)
---
Thank you for joining us in this important fight. — No Dem Left Behind

name: Josef Lipp
subject: Say NO to pharmacies dispensing the abortion pill
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.secureandprosper.-cg)
---
#
Friend of life,

Did you know that major chains like Walmart, Costco, Kroger, and Albertsons are under pressure to start dispensing the abortion pill in their pharmacies? This alarming trend could soon make your local pharmacy a distributor of drugs specifically designed to end the lives of preborn children.

NYC Comptroller Brad Lander recently issued letters to the CEOs of these major corporations, insisting that they become certified to dispense these deadly pills. Government officials, especially those with long-standing ties to organizations like Planned Parenthood, should not be able to demand this of our pharmacies.

Over 600,000 preborn babies were tragically aborted by the abortion pill last year. This number is only expected to rise if major pharmacies agree to dispense these drugs. Corporations that participate in this are complicit in what can only be described as a genocide of future generations.

Even now, pharmacies like Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid that have chosen to distribute the abortion pill are facing backlash from customers who want nothing to do with the abortion industry. We do not want our local grocery stores and pharmacies to become marketplaces of death.

By urging these major chains to resist the pressure, we can protect our communities and ensure that our pharmacies remain places of health, not places of harm.

Will you sign Live Action's petition and urge Walmart, Costco, Kroger, and other major chains to resist dispensing the abortion pill?
**[https://www.liveaction.org/resist-pressure-to-dispense-the-abortion-pill/](http://trk.secureandprosper.-Yx4kWI4_FHL1RZ0pWA)**

Let's make it clear that we oppose the distribution of the abortion pill at our pharmacies.

Thank you for standing with us in the fight to embrace life and protect the most vulnerable.

For Life,

Josef Lipp
**Chief Operating Officer**

[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MjQ1LWVhNDg0ZTJmNzVmOTQ0YTJhZjkzMzU3MGQzYjhkNTk5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/ehrO_j5eCB0IWkP5hAmZdg) to unsubscribe.

name: John Kennedy
subject: heebie-jeebies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
"You won’t know what hit you” – Chuck Schumer

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdrf8jn8atd1es83ln0hl2eunfhre12u0ca4j3rg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs "John Kennedy")
---

I'm relieved that you opened this email in time.

My colleagues on the other side of the aisle just launched a COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH against our Conservative Supreme Court Majority. _**[And we're running out of time to stop them!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z40p9ku2dvrvqnoouqa14gdm5kbc11ki3hvjcaro_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs "And we’re running out of time to stop them!")**_
- **Don't forget:** Chuck Schumer went on live TV to say, "You won't know what hit you!" to _threaten_ Conservative justices to not rule against Liberals

- **Don't forget:** Crazed young Liberals protested in front of the _personal homes_ of Conservative justices

- **Don't forget:** A dozen House Democrats called for the _impeachment_ of Justice Clarence Thomas

- **Don't forget:** Senate Democrats weighed _official subpoenas_ for his personal friends

- **Don't forget:** The Liberal Media published a debunked _hit piece_ against Justice Samuel Alito
Listen folks,

It makes my stomach turn that the Democrats control the Senate and the White House. The **ONLY** thing standing in the way of Kamala Harris having full control - and ramming through anything she wants - is Republicans in Congress and a Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

And both are being bombarded with Liberal hit pieces, personal attacks, and downright lies.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu4qrkmfh2polarqrcs95j732pgn601bp2kaul2g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_

So I'm asking as a personal favor to me - and for the good of the country - will you pitch in a few bucks to help before the end of the day?
---
**[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp5voc9kbl3k9gnilgofh422517uv50ahfasplhg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgrvqb3av3bpm6950c4ku8umqas4eoopc339ist0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0b47v1vn24m9gatukpld02m431208j693nueku0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs)**
---
If the Democrats take control of the House and Supreme Court, I can't begin to tell you how bad it would get...

**You could kiss your free-speech rights goodbye. Say sayonara to voter ID laws. And wave goodbye to election integrity. **

_If that doesn 't give you the heebie-jeebies, I don't know what will!_

_**[I'm asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znokv98vlba4efgd87pb3ltcrfn102jtp5241i88_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs "I’m asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court.")**_

God bless you,
John Kennedy

It's Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn07vgubvt3q0iaegi9nqpts7m0fbomjf07pmrig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chge9pb4slh2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

This race is going to be a tough race. It’s never easy to go up against an incumbent, and we both know that Democrats are pouring resources into this race to try and protect Sorensen. But we also know the people of our district are ready for a change. We are tired and fed up with politicians like Sorensen leaving hardworking families behind and prioritizing politics over people. The bottom line: There is too much on the line for us to sit back and do nothing. We’ve got to keep fighting every day to flip this seat and restore law and order in Washington. That’s why every dollar makes such a critical impact in this race, and it’s why I’m so grateful to have people like you on my team. Thank you, Judge Joe McGraw DONATE Paid for by Judge Joe McGraw for Congress

victory for the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end

Republicans

positive momentum heading into election day.

And an early election victory for
the GOP has the Harris campaign at their wits' end.

TRENDING NEWS

mainstream media is happy with Kamala. They're making their
voices heard.
➞ Continue Reading

One of Biden's biggest
failures has finally been exposed and it'll make your jaw drop

Joe Biden has had
countless defeats during his time as president. But this one
might be the worst yet.
➞ Continue Reading

Leftist candidate facing
criminal charges for this heinous act

The Democrat Party is
full of bad actors. But now some of them are finally being
exposed.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

We're now just a few weeks away from the first ballots being cast in this election.

They've spent years pushing the narrative that "women, let alone Mexican women, have no place in the party of Donald J. Trump."

And as of this morning, they may sadly be right.

Kamala Harris & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party have raised an UNGODLY amount of money- over ONE BILLION DOLLARS.

If that's not enough to justify chipping in $10 today, let me leave you with this.

They take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservative women like me.

name: John Kennedy
subject: heebie-jeebies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
"You won’t know what hit you” – Chuck Schumer

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh2rb7csvap4i8i80s0eekco4fcvp26t5t3msajo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chieco76clh2bs "John Kennedy")
---

I'm relieved that you opened this email in time.

My colleagues on the other side of the aisle just launched a COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH against our Conservative Supreme Court Majority. _**[And we're running out of time to stop them!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbq91ad2em68198d9b1b4k1hdipmdd2h6tgriog_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chieco76clh2bs "And we’re running out of time to stop them!")**_
- **Don't forget:** Chuck Schumer went on live TV to say, "You won't know what hit you!" to _threaten_ Conservative justices to not rule against Liberals

- **Don't forget:** Crazed young Liberals protested in front of the _personal homes_ of Conservative justices

- **Don't forget:** A dozen House Democrats called for the _impeachment_ of Justice Clarence Thomas

- **Don't forget:** Senate Democrats weighed _official subpoenas_ for his personal friends

- **Don't forget:** The Liberal Media published a debunked _hit piece_ against Justice Samuel Alito
Listen folks,

It makes my stomach turn that the Democrats control the Senate and the White House. The **ONLY** thing standing in the way of Kamala Harris having full control - and ramming through anything she wants - is Republicans in Congress and a Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

And both are being bombarded with Liberal hit pieces, personal attacks, and downright lies.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bisv4sf7ch4gatf1o7u1sgqrsfi4k7ogn6o9ig_rp22sh2s8i6eoj5chieco76clh2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_

So I'm asking as a personal favor to me - and for the good of the country - will you pitch in a few bucks to help before the end of the day?

We're now just a few weeks away from the first ballots being cast in this election.

And I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't reach you in time.

They've spent years pushing the narrative that "women, let alone Mexican women, have no place in the party of Donald J. Trump."

They said I would never earn the support of the conservative base- and that I would never step foot in the halls of Congress.

And as of this morning, they may sadly be right.

Kamala Harris & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party have raised an UNGODLY amount of money- over ONE BILLION DOLLARS.

If that's not enough to justify chipping in $10 today, let me leave you with this.

They take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservative women like me.

subject: The GOP’s Voter Verification efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
How we’re going to stop the Left’s court-packing scheme:

**[FROM THE DESK OF SENATOR TED CRUZ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mN5M8NBHFIaOqDe7RkkgqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotsRYP0T-~)**

Friend,

The Left is no longer hiding their intentions behind the empty vessel of Joe Biden. They're showing you _exactly_ what they'd do to our country if Kamala, Walz, and the radical Senate Democrats take control...

**["Court-Packing Is Just One More Way Democrats Would Turn America Into Venezuela"](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mN5M8NBHFIaOqDe7RkkgqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRotsRYP0T-~)**
[Source: _The Federalist_]

_❌ A wide-open border
❌ Crime-riddled streets
❌ Skyrocketing cost of living
❌ Endless foreign wars
❌ An assault on your individual liberty_

That is Kamala's socialist vision for America!

- **Don't forget:** Senate Democrats weighed _official subpoenas_ for his personal friends

- **Don't forget:** The Liberal Media published a debunked _hit piece_ against Justice Samuel Alito
Listen folks,

It makes my stomach turn that the Democrats control the Senate and the White House. The **ONLY** thing standing in the way of Kamala Harris having full control - and ramming through anything she wants - is Republicans in Congress and a Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

And both are being bombarded with Liberal hit pieces, personal attacks, and downright lies.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f713c322e28245459aa2a60d6fa83192&_e=4zSI9O5Fp42i93scNp3_ZZHBUFVyQZpr2sGDtfK3Qrcvb28RCRZmLC8EbCx8nsMOO-LhrI3j34UcnXcZHettT34FmajmRDI4Li8b6iK0JOqJ7K2ydK2tqkn56wOnuUaIvl2urST7TntHwvl3PSzWZSPvpkvJnBIng-xyswNX2UECvSIiSTIFjpfAa6llEKcfh_WD5ithxG4oQR802opO1WWupJ7oFvOwmR1SRkd8uRn2FBMjRQVqSrQBrq5cTMHZb__cpEWhS2B1N-X2v6aTn8XRbZt-gwpaQSbYIy3UfTwPBwBcBsyb1g5me2KAmoqRF5lZ-LfxzGHyn0N3vYuKFzzSCECIW5Ux45mo7ywXYxUFISimca4o7lT8z79_lkNTb0xDiJ4jezq7WAFUcwywnYRf2Y60p38bA-4dAjQrcYeqQEzqfElRQLtSvRkW4Wdls6O2amZw4_gK_h4QjIhEiw%3D%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.")**_

If the Democrats take control of the House and Supreme Court, I can't begin to tell you how bad it would get...

**You could kiss your free-speech rights goodbye. Say sayonara to voter ID laws. And wave goodbye to election integrity. **

_If that doesn 't give you the heebie-jeebies, I don't know what will!_

_**[I'm asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f713c322e28245459aa2a60d6fa83192&_e=4zSI9O5Fp42i93scNp3_ZZHBUFVyQZpr2sGDtfK3Qrcvb28RCRZmLC8EbCx8nsMOO-LhrI3j34UcnXcZHettT34FmajmRDI4Li8b6iK0JOqJ7K2ydK2tqkn56wOnuUaIvl2urST7TntHwvl3PSzWZSPvpkvJnBIng-xyswNX2UECvSIiSTIFjpfAa6llEKcfh_WD5ithxG4oQR802opO1WWupJ7oFvOwmR1SRkd8uRn2FBMjRQVqSrQBrq5cTMHZb__cpEWhS2B1N-X2v6aTn8XRbZt-gwpaQSbYIy3UfTwPBwBcBsyb1g5me2KAmoqRXij8XACdmZM0NFIE6OhWvmqCd12dRFcutQERuKVywI5Xg0wMf-nOmxsUO9JjY3Q7cUhBBclc7Vre_Qu9y967jQfS-7TtGLECMfF9Qu8RyPoN0eZpoMUkw-2hMq-Sc68tiQO8oEa8Kq69Ek0FTNfrzQ%3D%3D "I’m asking you one last time for help. "That’s why I’m teaming up with my good pal, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to help hold the line in the House and make sure we have the support to save our Conservative Supreme Court Majority." So I'm asking as a personal favor to me - and for the good of the country - will you pitch in a few bucks to help before the end of the day? If the Democrats take control of the House and Supreme Court, I can't begin to tell you how bad it would get... You could kiss your free-speech rights goodbye. Say sayonara to voter ID laws. And wave goodbye to election integrity. If that doesn 't give you the heebie-jeebies, I don't know what will! "I’m asking you one last time for help. We could really use your support to save our House Majority, win back a Republican Senate, and save our Conservative Supreme Court." God bless you, John Kennedy | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" It's Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Explore these great works at home
body:
Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f72e713005647d7bfcb0222c90ab020&_e=3bUNh3pTrA_jL8Tm6lXmF8prqH9arIRhKY_olCFs1BRwLJof0MutYWKPmQyHUdm5h7aq_dxH3Zq2iVG4FgN2juGa-ha56LqiMq_l7hbGIj-nrgjfWV7s0aZDV9-7RZ3AIXcXuDa2F2CQt_IYcj3DYBGdZ58-nHkUE2jLN1t4-cqGEHHnFLIq3YbaOF49LATeN2DEKcrrUGBQ7kPV7KVFQOQeFGOk61DTbrA26WEUzH00cNJzclMSApuRUSh40IAdXsbKyHVrKGIMWZuI2mjP0wTzaFoOJzYw6ogouQP7tFIi35clTApZWZs22yiOeaQ85IGXUIdc34c80vgRzhfk3tnyVvjDPZkFldl8IcXHoTl8h0g3WKD7BudNBdGrebls8ok6TPCvjP9_Is2a4AFCMT1KL1U61DCKoOjMjj1QJn2JGJ_hVz9c8l-mIx_03jAf4pvpD5nNPBpYaGWfgVnbnQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f72e713005647d7bfcb0222c90ab020&_e=3bUNh3pTrA_jL8Tm6lXmF8prqH9arIRhKY_olCFs1BRwLJof0MutYWKPmQyHUdm5h7aq_dxH3Zq2iVG4FgN2juGa-ha56LqiMq_l7hbGIj-nrgjfWV7s0aZDV9-7RZ3AIXcXuDa2F2CQt_IYcj3DYBGdZ58-nHkUE2jLN1t4-cqGEHHnFLIq3YbaOF49LATeN2DEKcrrUGBQ7kPV7KVFQOQeFGOk61DTbrA26WEUzH00cNJzclMSApuRUSh40IAdXsbKyHVrKGIMWZuI2mjP0wTzaFoOJzYw6ogouQP7tFJ4-wz9TSIltHWCOxJSuHUS_8iSsBQmh_lVkHWWRfBESXtLMvceVC5DqXWsP8y_fGgbTVscePAQENkgrq8f26DfcRa3bnDp49ODNETsVXnynz2aWqr9KgVYx2sJHzirEbovuBExCxhC7wEzzsnnNytJOQL6fhu6rIgac3fw2GmWJg%3D%3D) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f72e713005647d7bfcb0222c90ab020&_e=3bUNh3pTrA_jL8Tm6lXmF8prqH9arIRhKY_olCFs1BRwLJof0MutYWKPmQyHUdm5h7aq_dxH3Zq2iVG4FgN2juGa-ha56LqiMq_l7hbGIj-nrgjfWV7s0aZDV9-7RZ3AIXcXuDa2F2CQt_IYcj3DYBGdZ58-nHkUE2jLN1t4-cqGEHHnFLIq3YbaOF49LATeN2DEKcrrUGBQ7kPV7KVFQOQeFGOk61DTbrA26WEUzH00cNJzclMSApuRUSh40IAdXsbKyHVrKGIMWZuI2mjP0wTzaFoOJzYw6ogouQP7tFJMRF5ZK0uiJ85DBTsbYKy9P31dWcvXBj67OCO5f8LW04WRJw82b8fxsj_aEQeCWcf0ZlbqGaBiTwCMpxFspOWOpTYOGtWYYVb27iD_sE-0k-6LPzrcucfNDnbn7GqnHD7hFBSXWPy7RsrdEjRxhb3DRyVT6yMO0Cya7lsDgBgIKQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f72e713005647d7bfcb0222c90ab020&_e=3bUNh3pTrA_jL8Tm6lXmF8prqH9arIRhKY_olCFs1BRwLJof0MutYWKPmQyHUdm5h7aq_dxH3Zq2iVG4FgN2juGa-ha56LqiMq_l7hbGIj-nrgjfWV7s0aZDV9-7RZ3AIXcXuDa2F2CQt_IYcj3DYBGdZ58-nHkUE2jLN1t4-cqGEHHnFLIq3YbaOF49LATeN2DEKcrrUGBQ7kPV7KVFQOQeFGOk61DTbrA26WEUzH00cNJzclMSApuRUSh40IAdXsbKyHVrKGIMWZuI2mjP0wTzaFoOJzYw6ogouQP7tFKR03d_t1nZuG7SnGXBN29bpQFVXQmLXzpZ_KLp1j4pyxFQo7TjJEi8Zc6-8KnKx7I128NUPRPFXVn1pUVPe3kpP4CxFssO99Txj91TP9BXu-dLNsVAwtOk3JuBUZoF00ieAUfoX3Ns3-LvdKonvDi9aINV176urYJ8Dy8abKKN7g%3D%3D) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f72e713005647d7bfcb0222c90ab020&_e=3bUNh3pTrA_jL8Tm6lXmF8prqH9arIRhKY_olCFs1BRwLJof0MutYWKPmQyHUdm5h7aq_dxH3Zq2iVG4FgN2juGa-ha56LqiMq_l7hbGIj-nrgjfWV7s0aZDV9-7RZ3AIXcXuDa2F2CQt_IYcj3DYBGdZ58-nHkUE2jLN1t4-cqGEHHnFLIq3YbaOF49LATeN2DEKcrrUGBQ7kPV7KVFQOQeFGOk61DTbrA26WEUzH00cNJzclMSApuRUSh40IAdXsbKyHVrKGIMWZuI2mjP0wTzaFoOJzYw6ogouQP7tFLhDzCaJ7W2kutq8Jh5ihX2Hwcy0WPfCdYgA3309KojOMzFy7r0NEyfDI12P491XZ8HERnVojb3OxCh8f2_UPM5VNTAjW5x6iP_2gcAC0ybNqrMRaOx_xF_C_xAsyWEjvd58Co6PP8Zx8hqQYlToEw0hCoE0byNcxbjiMaSWN6fmA%3D%3D)

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: This petition will make them go ballistic
body:
It's a win-win scenario

Dear Concerned American,

Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch
McConnell, House Speaker Johnson, your Senators, and your
Congressman is linked below.

It's vital that you submit your petition
immediately.

Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, the
Biden/Harris Administration, and the Big Labor bosses are about
to go ballistic.

I have introduced the National Right to Work
Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay
union dues in order to work.

So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem
Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the
book to bury the National Right to Work Bill.

And they want to do it as quietly as
possible.

The union kingpins (and their water-carriers
in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their
coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress!

They don't want the American people to know
that:

*** Millions of workers are forced to
surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives,
a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical,
tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and
Hakeem Jeffries.
*** Big Labor's power is deadly to millions
of small businesses.

Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats
are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes,
destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations.
*** Forced unionism exports millions of good
jobs overseas.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace
class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their
crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good.
In the fight to force votes on a National
Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a
showdown against the full might of Big Labor.

That's why it's vital that you act at once to
ignite massive public support for a National Right to Work Bill.

Now is the time to act.

By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up
for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the
American people will be watching.

National opinion polls all show that 80% of
the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay
union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay!

And the National Right to Work Committee, who
has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must
have your help in demonstrating that to Congress.

If the public's attention is fixed on this
battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its
peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism.

Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big
Labor. . .

. . . and who stands with freedom and the
American people.

It's vital you click to submit your petition
to Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your Senators,
and your Congressman immediately to demonstrate to Congress and
the national media the strong support for Right to Work.

It's all part of the National Right to Work
Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law:

*** Contact directly by mail up to 10 million
supporters, urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen
vote for the National Right to Work Bill;
*** Brief personally the hundreds of
favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial
writers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion;
*** Deploy digital advertising through email
and across social media in the days before the vote to really
make Congress feel the heat; and
*** Run TV and radio ads targeting swing
votes in key states and districts.
It is critical in this battle that Congress
hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support
Right to Work.

Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big
Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents.
That's their choice.

But time and again, when politicians defied
the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price
with the end of their political careers!

Of course, this whole effort will be very
expensive.

An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to
mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to
our success.

To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and
other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the
National Right to Work Committee today.

Will you make a generous contribution of
$200, $100, $50, $25, or $15 to launch the next, crucial phase
for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law?

It's vital you act immediately to put the
politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work
Act up for a vote.

It would be a crime to let politicians who
support compulsory unionism off the hook.

Up against the forced-dues fed,
billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all the Committee has on its
side is truth, public opinion. . .

. . . and you!

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work
Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay
dues.

So it has to depend on generous folks like
you.

Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer,
Hakeem Jeffries, the Biden/Harris Administration, and Big Labor
to bury the National Right to Work Bill.

Some folks have already sent $100, $200, and
even more. For others, a contribution of $25 or $50 has been as
much as they could afford.

Please submit your petition so we can
demonstrate to Congress and the media the strong support for
Right to Work.

Without your contribution of $200, $100,
$50, $25, or $15, the National Right to Work Committee won't be
able to contact 10 million Americans, place the advertising,
deploy the whole digital program, or do anything else to put Big
Labor on the spot with a public vote on the National Right to
Work Bill.

And if you and I don't press forward now, we
may never have a chance like this again.

Please help today.

Be sure to submit your petition to Senate
Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your
Senators, and Congressman, and then pitch in with your
contribution of $200, $100, $50, $25, or $15 to the National
Right to Work Committee.

Sincerely,

Rand Paul
United States Senator

P.S. Since most Americans oppose Big Labor's
forced-unionism powers, a public debate on my National Right to
Work Bill is Big Labor's (and their water-carriers' in Congress)
worst nightmare!

So please, submit your petition to Congress,
and then pitch in with your contribution of $200, $100, $50, $25,
or $15 to the National Right to Work Committee today.

The National Right to Work Committee is a
nonprofit, nonpartisan, single-purpose citizens' organization
dedicated to combating compulsory unionism through an aggressive
program designed to mobilize public opposition to compulsory
unionism and, at the same time, enlist public support for Right
to Work legislation. The Committee's mailing address is 8001
Braddock Road, Springfield, Virginia 22160. The Committee can be
contacted toll-free at 1-800-325-7892. Its web address is
www.nrtwc.org

Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense.

To help the National Right to Work Committee
grow, please forward this to a friend.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2e0645cca584ac582dd84cf35341cb6&_e=9gfnhUJyD4sLeNTY_BroXC5F5EVnBAYIY98DMZ3qHQ063ERLuwYO_oM3_TLcFyEjowrrU-HVKj0EkSbPvMhFNF5rjc9pyRDkZ7O389KmLa5Q3C4TtodpE0LstLcFQpE58hVKmMHkp2y33a38oOVfcR21RiVyL9kkMrJbSqgkBtRw57JFdI3cVAh2toa6Zlp4t5ZahO8zSwGH7wfBwOvtMn8QZo0G2bOxuWzLrn3Yb5dsmu8FRIDSSldkp48_tbE_TlSeqO5PwJhHHvSeBeee2r9zKmw2RXic1FpwZ1_-cIpRztKiweAoWdyUhW7emT1l5sJwPWeQndKnn7bBo6OSMTkeIA4NJSr0rvjtshb81Y5QzvRBcEPnNh6TeY-0YPTxpc8xRsAFPlyhzP1WIpgYSMg8i9MoPKlk5jNLWUpJWx4tFAI74giQg5W9DSTalC1o) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2e0645cca584ac582dd84cf35341cb6&_e=9gfnhUJyD4sLeNTY_BroXC5F5EVnBAYIY98DMZ3qHQ063ERLuwYO_oM3_TLcFyEjowrrU-HVKj0EkSbPvMhFNF5rjc9pyRDkZ7O389KmLa5Q3C4TtodpE0LstLcFQpE58hVKmMHkp2y33a38oOVfcR21RiVyL9kkMrJbSqgkBtRw57JFdI3cVAh2toa6Zlp4t5ZahO8zSwGH7wfBwOvtMn8QZo0G2bOxuWzLrn3Yb5dsmu8FRIDSSldkp48_tbE_TlSeqO5PwJhHHvSeBeee2r9zKmw2RXic1FpwZ1_-cIrM4YA1rOmD6rZWBdjSaExu5xr3ik9NVsmr6zJCrSSmPJIZvY0l218XaxxMiesIxC63Chnv2-G1qpLef8JZHZTnH1eZXVJ3vpd97L9wvrOxh65a6j5ChYSfBogyQxej6LbtGoqRoP1VR1rQlmJxWoH5)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2e0645cca584ac582dd84cf35341cb6&_e=9gfnhUJyD4sLeNTY_BroXC5F5EVnBAYIY98DMZ3qHQ063ERLuwYO_oM3_TLcFyEjowrrU-HVKj0EkSbPvMhFNF5rjc9pyRDkZ7O389KmLa5Q3C4TtodpE0LstLcFQpE58hVKmMHkp2y33a38oOVfcR21RiVyL9kkMrJbSqgkBtRw57JFdI3cVAh2toa6Zlp4t5ZahO8zSwGH7wfBwOvtMn8QZo0G2bOxuWzLrn3Yb5dsmu8FRIDSSldkp48_tbE_TlSeqO5PwJhHHvSeBeee2r9zKmw2RXic1FpwZ1_-cIpdQ22NFirb_qcqBjJM_PncRXYCMaVfa6fXXMit5MUn8RUxru56LAYNbsMWl6VApdNNTrBb31qpcQeYEf2AtRFgbhSmGgZgQjMMgWcjp_1AwrVIxpfPUvqFEguuHnFCkzvIhKZqcNIhOj6oXneSXPZ-)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "-," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
A [bus accident in Mississippi](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQAL_GdEb24mNN4eI1dPfalMjg5diTwQj7IMnXR5c60nRTjObjPtw9R94e__1Krsxp8FPhk4ZOaglmMFVwMxFQU5HTCDfdWYu6Why12FjdtK1GhcrYDlRnQXsbyIwIpmIHCozqlNZKtTdbhxb1OCESEk1jZ4VRFLiko34m3spCc_xKJx31lNYquqWUPYvmn4BeQH9dVz2nz42u_PYC-lcW0K-c85t9Zzm-spwOnxcZyZ-UJcpAPsiQvmnLkrfn66BQHS7sF8fIuUVh1GP1HH-T5c__08FPAAAA__-78F3B) resulted in seven deaths and 37 injuries Saturday.

# SUNDAY, SEPTEMBER 1, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1939, Germany invaded Poland with a blitzkrieg attack designed to overwhelm Poland's defenses, marking the beginning of World War II. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8GOizABHBB8Zp0ee2V1sas4z1hsDAyyt-fcvXVM9JI8_WYH0CJ8us_7BjaWmZYGl04T0IJbWbDY1gRNY4cg3L6pibvneJbiFEt9uZXI00EN0ZtYLROrhKsxKdHTkFLbeQklZLS3vwQrVPPxTl0iMtz8sxIjNRKHb4L5bbhmt7lwjosZecpbK0dJxv_MX1n-t57HzrUjc5W6rvkRBk_4geVmqLoUAUR0_cX1h2yoHzBSSWLoyTIUfRONGxtT7yGeHRKiU7rmJGvHSj9NtufA66gfwIAAP__muVgJw)) It's September! And what better way to celebrate than with some classic and pop tunes that have "September" in the title. Turns out there are a lot of them--more than any other month in the year! ([Listen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u7CAQQOGngc6rYYwBFxS3cbe3TWnxM2sTYWMBcZS3j5I6_dGRvrfn-nQpp3P77w6y_VVWF3q6aZ0HMaBcJY_2RYQ0crJC4yRmY7Tgu53lFEZlFE6IWjl0Ebw0EiB4L0QEniwCSphBCAA1mUdUWvigNWmi4GfDJFBMvdTHe0ln3-mVv8pN9RHKwbPde78aG_8xXBguo4JIWyVq5eOMPwnDRcCwVXJ9aHR1OjzVoZVzawwXXm28PlPOqSnNJGyHS_n33P9k3ha_AwAA___mXFPZ)) [Allegiance Gold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD9vpDAQRz-N6UD-w9pQuLhbhHTFXpEmJTKegZ3EYITNRvn2East0z69kd783m_DzVGgdf7vFrR5ioPzmR44tKUoZT3UBdgJUaIq0AojL6JtGiOKuxVa6UYYrTQAH_XYtHAB3QIXUrlp4gVZyWXNWy4E5_rSVKCNGL0xaBD92Das5giU4159RFrzHafwHR-4Vz4uRbD3nLfE1B8meyb7sFUuBJzJrR7nGOC0mOz9CD6VW0xYJtwpHqncKX2mMk3noeqPvAwpHrtHprq3G5P6JAsCHQtTXeczvJh3y-ZoXp_e9W93ZVKnY_wHT1C-6s6HZF3sFrYvCoGSNqzm8-IoPMPzrys-rPwJAAD___mjdCA) is our sponsor today, offering a free wealth kit to help you navigate the world of personal finance.
|
---
## Deadly Bus Crash in Mississippi
A [bus accident in Mississippi](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQAL_GdEb24mNN4eI1dPfalMjg5diTwQj7IMnXR5c60nRTjObjPtw9R94e__1Krsxp8FPhk4ZOaglmMFVwMxFQU5HTCDfdWYu6Why12FjdtK1GhcrYDlRnQXsbyIwIpmIHCozqlNZKtTdbhxb1OCESEk1jZ4VRFLiko34m3spCc_xKJx31lNYquqWUPYvmn4BeQH9dVz2nz42u_PYC-lcW0K-c85t9Zzm-spwOnxcZyZ-UJcpAPsiQvmnLkrfn66BQHS7sF8fIuUVh1GP1HH-T5c__08FPAAAA__-78F3B) resulted in seven deaths and 37 injuries Saturday. The bus, [operated by Regiomontanos Autobuses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPhCAUhH8Ndhh44qIFxTV2e-2VBuG5vo2iAZTsv7949SVTTDLJfMn38xyfllYKr2-7ocnzPlqX6cKx55KDGlXlzYwI2FRopIZW9l2nZbWYzjezs06hsEL1FmaYWi29suha2ze6IgMClOiFlEI82q72Dy0npzVqRDf1HVMCPeU91u-dQl5wXj_7hbF2-1atZsn5SKz5YjAwGEoptZtSwJLuncFwVwbDRindOQ7i05m4izYt_P7JZwzco_WcwvuM6HmxMWLgbj9D_jAYqmj8UWhdKT00U-K1WVr_8PlfF5eB3wAAAP__IqZkVQ), veered off the interstate and overturned just before 1:00 am. Officials did not say what caused the bus to leave the roadway. ## U.S. Attacks ISIS Leaders in Iraq
U.S. military personnel killed at least 15 Islamic State (ISIS) militants Thursday in a joint operation with Iraqi Security Forces. At least 7 U.S. service members were injured as [militants fought back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-O8yAQBPCnwZ2tZf0HU1B8DV2-9koLwzrZEzY5ILHy9qekvv6nmdF8XZaL48jH9b_bydQtLc5XftKiW9nisAxNMBsRUt-QkQpHqedZyeZm-lX2QettGHuvVVhHgtmPDiRKcIHWhg0CDqBBSoBpnLswKbl6pUgR-VXPYgAKXFPuvhMf9UZbfKUn5c6nvYnmVuu9iP6fQCvQnufZPYqrKbjXGwi0pab8EmgPOstbpByDQPtuFWhhFmh7KdByiW5n35bqKrXpTtlVTkfL2f20j9LuHLm6T5QaAecJEEAJtE024X5yjFwmJQa47o7jZ13986qnwd8AAAD__5lKaXU) with grenades and explosive suicide belts. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpaLuNdhSG4w9xfONksdoa7tVichmxUb2SKXgVj30tpnMhLN0vs3KCaCcZyIAje46O-KNiHsWXNxgr29896F5XJezl-xgumQHP7vnJSjF2kOhHjIvX1691eTrbJoqVas32Stpx8OCF6aG601Eqgrn932) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpbT91iyCG8pTSSrGTIOcfstMzkQ1cNfeyVC1mlfnQx54Yvr6lY3HFVghmZ3PAOH2N8-w7FkeCLu_I34Pv9IkVPgF2rY37ZqBH-oRe7b-amsJGqMXMNSD6PnK8ekbIEoBWkSk-EVYZw_mk8QltOtVS8g)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpavgmR2lUSQNRJZMo60DnXj88ihvIhob3CdE0Aq6Yh-AoUbkL6JhcTWH4B_eQuSbQMr2Pk5T3kp4rXMTKC6LlhEj-_4brpur7cTIPlVRTp0fKxiP_2ZGmjWjJHMcxGEGHuNsxrdua6jSfHLEnNggAdK)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpaBaL9jA4K5zxJMwPiKj5AB6AruBtd49m2ayIJTxc1waMATrkiaA9ocxHIFrH8dAr_WAENkvNOXuv2Wv5bYGKvKYWS1Boa1Ti4DlQajYsT2xGqQtrEwPMrnUQY2qtE92_8XjCwmuidkVFeIoaeJ7v17) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpY_FPYlwxlNrhmSHUpX1BmH10rpe7eBfL6KOxcwlRJ54yQGvRJhxOcqjz5xNYGTyQBNUED0T4-0OmR3b2-4r6AmYYr1B8xEGTrottx4OHSuGYNJYHlU8UqGo8c2BkewEJ6taJIxBCGE1Jyx6p3LuLLr)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f80d46acbb94744b321471e597c3e05&_e=gHT_gEesxbk4KjlZDCc8aubUVzviASjRYujyibwUCfxeID6nqlS3FevdK2myfdvJIEfd3L1pfgP4uVsb2Sog4K8k63Ym6IBh6hRxGOILo-daEe94wIdsQJT8HcQSC8Z6gog2IWhZOK63REQRf-rBYZ4anL2ULoxbc5bXBKP2T0xDPMFcYLTbuP2UREyCKBSpFrvk813BIGH3KC7I3MgsqgWqnwVsCBWEAv3PR0JlA7T6dJHOYMJjphppVQx3CnlTYxGPTMFl1L2g50PHzxWZL3-6tmK5r5vUL9MHeNjXUpb_1b_cQFQB5RUIZYwOE_Dfb4WG2ukjaOggVg_MfK8tYp3tl6SogRUwq0LO7LMVnV9uKg7Qf2BSeLZDL_tUnMvAUHU1VzllCj0JwWoMC5uPjXMq0D27XLgywclasZbxUm-YsvHhyB5Yryz7a1KdfGDf) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

This poetic term comes directly from the Old French "envoi," from the verb "envoyer," meaning "to send." The French term "en voie" means something is "on the way..."

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0ccb723-7b31-4807-9158-d867a8ea0a5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkbqa1Ft_jvG2moQYr0eHTnzUvF11JEsBvDzYTOF6CTCwLlw3nsLOhM8Mz-mHqXd9oMdSVMBZVHgSPL9ckIXFfNT8gPJUiGOnPXdEqbCUZpoKNN5NG7by1HTSV7hsn_9gd3X8QrCkkuKUlMSFwSm_uODv) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkbqWz4IOspbll0WnTM7H-XEr738Sd-S4nvD3GpdRb0O5v1fBTkNBQex_278jqGx68xjsggBnOvLTDcy8DyBV_QR4cj3i_7pmaWhjENjIvvdxuh4wprvdRWI8d6nb7JTHfCrjepRpQVWBLJneKe2-jvZy)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkbol3AHR6x80RUdADVltD0ziY1Qoc3SwBzr_-ywWtwgoXltIra_V0m6cjjAQ5Zri_N4rB088PFCoh_K6RFa1iA_cRJf1B4szFHI8adpVfDCFSRpnU77rDQHkE609mrtrlAiECMbFEQYd6cVSmUGCQ0ih)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkbr7-NVApY3fWFECMDAMiq9eJnSLYEs6ux1moy_g_9nYXxHuqBIZlrVP8MxnIEFET7LFUqGB-ABf8g19uG5FBX7QQXo1wZGP0iJWbyNk4HIF4Fpq3pUhYySlDElP9Ha8zYyM9WYBdUdR9OJBwtDi7Hbm) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkbrZ3lmj5ejcCyrSBr3-rzMiA99TC1qZLESCNDlJyk7swqJfE5NjKBm_j_w1RjUFzVk-RhOll-344V5UXQKkTMbw2O5Z_4qSP8kId2PATyMTp9r5e2w57TiDiskNfJIAuLJJCpeB3YLuExXRaUX7T3TV)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5add06d6195242fe837e9873bad4a41f&_e=Rbl5XCjdMqTSkskyRRo1MME37XMBQUxvV7qAgMuG8lwQ7hVFtcgGqLqtdaRgu4SPeMKgEmGDA2K-HjlWzf7GHUfDjLL-ztipUUmX68YX-dze-1FXXiBJsf3sjn09Zf27tOTzTWrrCq4d5vQoati4OLHE1ealuk_MXXCJl7yBx6US2_aBFnfCLOsqa58A9Gh_ohcvLrmPBZpNor9KjDTJKcV9TH8o2DnT9W3JlhFxhtfbA8MOsyFfEqHcNOjHj2_5b8Q38VAC7n1UwjecwGVQLobaPK0kYSdpGdjN993jkboYTVqyPPNYrFjc7_7AKZ2pWxSCN3SbUJZsqsuxU1mG_HlUGQNfvc8tDEZFnnSd9Cutsly90szzgqX36p31g8JJ1l-47Xb9FaIsZGc4CEfxdjCSnxaELD1fZNyl2OpNWexbTG2S4L4iuHLcdPrxomvX) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Please don’t let them humiliate me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
I’m not sure I can keep going on like this

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2771be14b93443f79ddca5af834efc54&_e=n1jh7-phev-_Pfy1HyfEdfbOCgEOEubaQjUA1Fu-GlK5nT1k_85EfZS7IX5UXfmPABTLiutuylICnZoEEtW-xFV48BqyvntRdV3I4scsSaTL5s8mcgPhR_XHYMZGC7n6Zn85CrMyS2_qcvMT0JE28m0p6noTjhNuGMtHNUw7v9KA_TX2p4XHggo64NseGj5OYsXqWQ6ItnZDlnQ1RU4LqS5BUt5M0QAFUclmJSzCr_Hdtjp1Ldpgp2jsJB-IrFrP3zMsvd51eA4Kk3nsk9qjet0Xmnn4VOY0ueTvI6KU2sDf4eZJovcH0hcLKbb5ArrZES8ISpyI1RjfloSn1Zh_AVH075SA58r2-FqJ1pGQYm4_a3gQ6clRh9DQuwzWDhRaw4BxXF9e4F1lfucJjJ4qDq3C83XJs_-5G3h06FQHZZ1JKH9uyivyVircLKQe9OCf2p_0R3FALCAk6EMSSr4R-xWDUH7zZBW4fh5uSKfOl5o%3D)
---
Friend,

We're now just a few weeks away from the first ballots being cast in this election.

And I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't reach you in time.

But I'm not afraid to tell you that I am a Christian who is Pro-God, Pro-Family, and 100% Pro-Trump.

Democrats & their shotcallers in the liberal media have made, not just defeating me, but humiliating me their highest priority each & every day until the Election.

They've spent years pushing the narrative that "women, let alone Mexican women, have no place in the party of Donald J. Trump."

They said I would never earn the support of the conservative base- and that I would never step foot in the halls of Congress.

And as of this morning, they may sadly be right.

Kamala Harris & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party have raised an UNGODLY amount of money- over ONE BILLION DOLLARS.

If that's not enough to justify chipping in $10 today, let me leave you with this.

They take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservative women like me.

And if this email doesn't work, that is exactly what will happen.

As a conservative, I don't believe in sugar coating things. So let me be clear- without a surge in grassroots support today, I don't stand a chance against them. | [**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2771be14b93443f79ddca5af834efc54&_e=n1jh7-phev-_Pfy1HyfEdfbOCgEOEubaQjUA1Fu-GlK5nT1k_85EfZS7IX5UXfmPABTLiutuylICnZoEEtW-xFV48BqyvntRdV3I4scsSaTL5s8mcgPhR_XHYMZGC7n6Zn85CrMyS2_qcvMT0JE28m0p6noTjhNuGMtHNUw7v9KA_TX2p4XHggo64NseGj5OYsXqWQ6ItnZDlnQ1RU4LqS5BUt5M0QAFUclmJSzCr_Hdtjp1Ldpgp2jsJB-IrFrP3zMsvd51eA4Kk3nsk9qjet0Xmnn4VOY0ueTvI6KU2sDf4eZJovcH0hcLKbb5ArrZES8ISpyI1RjfloSn1Zh_AeSgr26U9-ZU_e6b_HSaeNNvbJKFb7NmrvtGfsaSEwNDGmwN32S1O9dbqPlS7DLO5iWKjae_jEI5GGHbQn3KUZv0r2mgyDY7qBZNMwJErQ8o3y-JUWUig5KmaUvmhQw4M6zk5K5rCNTyZFe2uN4U8k0%3D)
---
I'll be humiliated, while the Democrats walk away another victory in a MUST-WIN battleground race.

So I'm coming to you from the bottom of my heart & I hope I can count on you to stand with me.
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2771be14b93443f79ddca5af834efc54&_e=n1jh7-phev-_Pfy1HyfEdfbOCgEOEubaQjUA1Fu-GlK5nT1k_85EfZS7IX5UXfmPABTLiutuylICnZoEEtW-xFV48BqyvntRdV3I4scsSaTL5s8mcgPhR_XHYMZGC7n6Zn85CrMyS2_qcvMT0JE28m0p6noTjhNuGMtHNUw7v9KA_TX2p4XHggo64NseGj5OYsXqWQ6ItnZDlnQ1RU4LqS5BUt5M0QAFUclmJSzCr_Hdtjp1Ldpgp2jsJB-IrFrP3zMsvd51eA4Kk3nsk9qjet0Xmnn4VOY0ueTvI6KU2sDf4eZJovcH0hcLKbb5ArrZES8ISpyI1RjfloSn1Zh_Ab9xUnrTNqJD7yFr1fplkbJEyO6IFr2_2ToxSeBkRe-sI5pa06IKefYJoTRExachTbXEMQU6MFtNT1AXSTx-ys9QavOu8ck1yAz48bOznPGkeR_M6P2EW9FwWoVnVhBkg3dnPUR01j9tNqUd1s41N4w%3D)

They've spent years pushing the narrative that "women, let alone Mexican women, have no place in the party of Donald J. Trump." They said I would never earn the support of the conservative base- and that I would never step foot in the halls of Congress. And as of this morning, they may sadly be right. Kamala Harris & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party have raised an UNGODLY amount of money- over ONE BILLION DOLLARS.
