name: Dan Osborn
subject: why I was fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
As president of our local union, I led the strike.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Dan Osborn's campaign in Nebraska from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91952793/495533731/1647001491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0NjdjMC01OTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIiJCTWOn3ZMGGqW6pCyJsCiQDUY6zyIo1hlyq3NEMg=&emci=9f97a30b-0667-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=28d467c0-5968-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)_
Hey there,
In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years.
I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family.
When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after.
But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers.
**So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91952794/495533734/92586991?refcode=em20240825am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=28d467c0-5968-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0NjdjMC01OTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIiJCTWOn3ZMGGqW6pCyJsCiQDUY6zyIo1hlyq3NEMg=)
It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class.
After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone.
It was one of the proudest moments of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91952795/495533737/92586991?refcode=em20240901am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=28d467c0-5968-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0NjdjMC01OTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIiJCTWOn3ZMGGqW6pCyJsCiQDUY6zyIo1hlyq3NEMg=)
Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block.
It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me.
**Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her.**
FOUR polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am even LEADING her by 2 points.
**I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat.**
**[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate right now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Republican Deb Fischer and win this Senate seat in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91952796/495533739/92586991?refcode=em20240901am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=28d467c0-5968-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0NjdjMC01OTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIiJCTWOn3ZMGGqW6pCyJsCiQDUY6zyIo1hlyq3NEMg=)**

clean_body: As president of our local union, I led the strike. Hey there, In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years. I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family. When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after. But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers. So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike. = It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class. After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone. It was one of the proudest moments of my life. = Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block. It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me. Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her. FOUR polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am even LEADING her by 2 points. I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I believe we can win this race and keep up the fight for the American middle class. I’m counting on your support to win. Thank you, Dan Osborn ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Kamala Harris for President
subject: Pause for a moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HARRIS FOR PRESIDENT
body:
A big part of the reason we're going to win.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/65?t=1&akid=40%2E2563979%2EszRX4-)

We send a lot of fundraising emails, so we thought it important to pause for a moment to share just two of the ways we've used those donations.
As you know, talking to voters in swing states, introducing them to Vice President Harris, and talking about her economic vision and beliefs is critical to winning in November.
To that end, we just launched our latest ad, "Everyday." [**Please watch it here.**](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/242?t=2&akid=40%2E2563979%2EszRX4-)
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/242?t=3&akid=40%2E2563979%2EszRX4-)
The ad follows another ad "Opportunity" which talks about how Vice President Harris will create an opportunity economy if elected. [**You can watch that ad here.**](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/243?t=4&akid=40%2E2563979%2EszRX4-)
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/243?t=5&akid=40%2E2563979%2EszRX4-)
You made both possible. And it's a big part of the reason we're going to win.
Thank you.
Kamala Harris for President

| | Dear Patriot, The assassination attempt against president Trump sent shockwaves through this country. All I can say is, thank God he survived. But if you’re like me, you’re wondering how this could have happened. Was it just incompetence? Or is there something more sinister going on? **[Can president Trump even _trust_ the Secret Service anymore?](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18521/6374453/1c292d28b84b10a9b369043712fb0257eb3ae441/b3af47cc5a7a5ecfe4e46d3c00dbe01e5c241df0)** These are questions we may never get straight answers to. But one thing is for sure... The global elites CANNOT let Trump win. So the question is... Why? Why are they SO desperate to keep Trump out of the White House? And more importantly... the forces behind the assassination attempt... whoever they are... will they try again? **[Watch this video to find out...](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18521/6374453/1c292d28b84b10a9b369043712fb0257eb3ae441/b3af47cc5a7a5ecfe4e46d3c00dbe01e5c241df0)**

name: Laura
subject: Newsletter: August
body:
Thank you to everyone who attended my meet and greet event! It was wonderful to have great conversations about important issues and ways we can... | | | | | |
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=1b909535a2&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
# Monthly Newsletter

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | August
---
| | 09.01.2024
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
[About Me](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=2f5f0549d4&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
[Donate](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=179972b442&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
[Social Media](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=184e0ac3ff&e=a2a46ff12c)
| **CLICK THE IMAGES BELOW TO LEARN MORE ABOUT EVENTS**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
## Door Knocking
_(Cypress, Texas)_
I had a fantastic time knocking on doors in Cypress! It was inspiring to meet so many enthusiastic residents eager to volunteer and get involved. The excitement for this upcoming election is truly contagious!
---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=4ae592e0b6&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
# Democratic Meeting
_(Cypress, Texas)_

Attended the Cy-Fair Area Democratic Club meeting and I was encouraged by the amazing turnout! Excited to work alongside this motivated group to empower their community through voting and voter education.
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=39db63541b&e=a2a46ff12c)
| |
## House Party
_(Cypress, Texas)_
I had an amazing time at a house party with dedicated activists from Cypress, NW Harris County, Katy, and Tomball! We came together to strategize ways to connect with inconsistent voters. So proud to know and work alongside these passionate and motivated individuals! Working together, we will make a difference!
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a1579af907&e=a2a46ff12c)
| | | | | | | | | | |
## Campaigning
_(Texas)_

I was out in the heat, knocking on doors with a dedicated group of activists, engaging with voters about the issues that matter most to them. Democracy is not a spectator sport; it’s about making sure everyone feels heard and seen. Let’s continue to engage and empower our community!

---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ee0bca523d&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
# Candidate Meet & Greet
_(Houston, Texas)_

I am incredibly thankful for the endorsement and support of Secular Houston and SHORE! We had a great time at the Endorsed Candidate Meet and Greet. I’m proud to know and work alongside this awesome group of activists as we strive to get candidates elected who will fight for equality and freedom for all.
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=68ea89a92e&e=a2a46ff12c)
| |
## Labor Day Breakfast
_(Texas)_

I attended the Labor Day breakfast hosted by the incredible Women of Labor! So inspired by this amazing group of resilient women. I’m grateful to have the strength of this group behind me and other candidates as they work to get out the vote.
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=bf9920c9e0&e=a2a46ff12c)
| | | | | | | | | | |
## Campaign Meet & Greet
_(Cypress, Texas)_

Thank you to everyone who attended my meet and greet event! It was wonderful to have great conversations about important issues and ways we can engage voters in our community. I'm feeling energized and excited about the upcoming election! Let’s keep this momentum going!

---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=62f7ed8036&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f810e4edc2&e=a2a46ff12c)
| Thank you so much for your continuous support.\- Laura Jones for Congress TX-8
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=d578c054f6&e=a2a46ff12c)
---

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Fastest, Cheapest, Easiest way to secure the Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House GOP is fighting to be stronger for TRUMP

|
---
| | | | | | [COMPLETE YOUR EVERY VOTER CANVASS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kB_XQTgimNsZItq4dLW_hg~~/AARclAA~/RgRotv__wAXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Generic Button")
---

Hey, it's good to get back in touch with you.

**I just wanted to quickly remind you of your Every Voter Canvass.**

_**_It is extremely important that you complete your Canvass. _**_

I cannot stress the importance of solid data from strong Patriots as we approach November. **When I managed President Trump 's campaign, I knew better than anyone how every tiny piece of information can turn the tides in any election**--especially this one.

I'll put it bluntly, **the outcome of every election happening in November, and quite frankly, the fate of our Nation rests on you completing simple surveys like this one. **

---
| | | [COMPLETE YOUR EVERY VOTER CANVASS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kB_XQTgimNsZItq4dLW_hg~~/AARclAA~/RgRotv__wAXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Generic Button")
---

**[Do not let a 30-second survey be the deciding factor in Democrats stealing the Majority or even Kamala taking the White House.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kB_XQTgimNsZItq4dLW_hg~~/AARclAA~/RgRotv__wAXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Do not let a 30-second survey be the deciding factor in Democrats stealing the Majority or even Kamala taking the White House. ")**

Please complete your Every Voter Canvass _IMMEDIATELY!_

---
| | | [COMPLETE YOUR EVERY VOTER CANVASS](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kB_XQTgimNsZItq4dLW_hg~~/AARclAA~/RgRotv__wAXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Generic Button")
---

I want to see President Trump back in office.

I want to see an even stronger Conservative House Majority helping to drain the swamp.

I want a Red Wave to sweep the Nation, saving us from Extreme Leftist Radicals.

**It 's all possible with your help. **

**[Submit your Every Voter Canvass now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kB_XQTgimNsZItq4dLW_hg~~/AARclAA~/RgRotv__wAXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Submit your Every Voter Canvass now.")**

Fighting with you for a Conservative Future,
Kellyanne Conway

body:
I think it's time we go "Animal–Style" on Adam Schiff.| | | Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c480408e1c1a459399416d8b1aeb9a2b&_e=6nd6DWdPSKdVcBm--JLE4hbWMuwprrJ_QWr2YX1c3xc2vASVvHhqLfa5tTP0KBjWalEOFUgKuS0NZRisChQ25CKZEPyXye5Luw_Yp3z0-XEV8e_-wqsF7MNI0oe8e-KZDbzx7I536uSodCu4F-q3kMFCfbQuDBMtwk3KYry7bNltwlJJRCTMspt3EEMwEJBE7FLQ8vNoSUzVB8OaQ9H6lsK17WPnB5kRMfHFNGtjKEv3v50TvbvfXa_qKbsDkhpYA1b9KQw8DXc0KAa3bLz8I2IKxYZAegJQyzybz39JmjfvR9NeaSxkOVM2c3deK7Yue1ahSVm5KJpbYnvrkv-9UbKgcsv59ev1N0o4_DEiGNc2Q5W6-RzzKEfhDOypd4ZpGFSGX1ikoEwUmb38dpR-sQ%3D%3D)
---
| | In-N-Out... As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.This wildly successful business should be a true indicator of California's success and brilliance. Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.Those same policies bring about headlines such as this:
---
---
In-N-Out was forced to close its first restaurant ever because of the rampant crime in Oakland. The Democrats who did this to our state and to Oakland should be ashamed.I called for the Oakland Mayor to resign, and I called for Adam Schiff to join me - But unsurprisingly he's silent on the issue.That's because Adam Schiff, Gavin Newsom, and Sheng Thao are all part of the same Democrat machine driving California out of prosperity and into the ground. Fellow American, I think it's time we go "Animal-Style" on Adam Schiff.**[And to do that, I need your help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c480408e1c1a459399416d8b1aeb9a2b&_e=6nd6DWdPSKdVcBm--JLE4hbWMuwprrJ_QWr2YX1c3xc2vASVvHhqLfa5tTP0KBjWalEOFUgKuS0NZRisChQ25CKZEPyXye5Luw_Yp3z0-XEV8e_-wqsF7MNI0oe8e-KZDbzx7I536uSodCu4F-q3kMFCfbQuDBMtwk3KYry7bNltwlJJRCTMspt3EEMwEJBE7FLQ8vNoSUzVB8OaQ9H6lsK17WPnB5kRMfHFNGtjKEv3v50TvbvfXa_qKbsDkhpYKyd83bgA9eHLIdhrjennPfVDDFLH4o4ArvenydsGuSD-0kVGWosBFTR60S-8cF0dsqIe-iMCRAdSxvjFqpmQq7OV_ptO6OsCfbUwZ0ObPGVMX2dlp9I2BqC-vKhI4CjMsSma2X7nCpt8qf4_fOdeKA%3D%3D)** Your contributions to my campaign show your support and a complete rejection of the 4-decade Democrat-Rule in California. They fund our extensive door-knocking campaigns - pay for impactful ads - and help me travel across the state getting in touch with my supporters and speaking as much as I can to Californians encouraging them to cast off the Democrat malaise.

clean_body: I think it's time we go "Animal–Style" on Adam Schiff.| | | Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies. | | | | In-N-Out... As a Californian, I treasure our beloved fast-food chain.This wildly successful business should be a true indicator of California's success and brilliance. Unfortunately, even a business so beloved is not immune to Democrat economic and law enforcement policies.Those same policies bring about headlines such as this: In-N-Out was forced to close its first restaurant ever because of the rampant crime in Oakland. The Democrats who did this to our state and to Oakland should be ashamed.I called for the Oakland Mayor to resign, and I called for Adam Schiff to join me - But unsurprisingly he's silent on the issue.That's because Adam Schiff, Gavin Newsom, and Sheng Thao are all part of the same Democrat machine driving California out of prosperity and into the ground. Fellow American, I think it's time we go "Animal-Style" on Adam Schiff. Your contributions to my campaign show your support and a complete rejection of the 4-decade Democrat-Rule in California. They fund our extensive door-knocking campaigns - pay for impactful ads - and help me travel across the state getting in touch with my supporters and speaking as much as I can to Californians encouraging them to cast off the Democrat malaise. | | | | | | | Your support means the world to me.Sincerely, | | | | | go.txting.io/7up80c PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE Please Add mailto:info@stevegarvey.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Unexpected twist in accidental prison release
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=594d87bce0&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Inmate accidentally released by Delco blasts prison conditions, says he’ll turn himself in this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0e02a3a278&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
The inmate mistakenly released from the Delaware County prison claims he repeatedly told prison officials he was not supposed to be let go. While Daniel Rogers also told _Broad + Liberty_ in a Sunday phone interview he intends to turn himself in to the facility this week, he’s fearful the administration will exact retribution against him for embarrassing the facility because of his untimely release — something he contends is their fault, not his. Rogers first contacted _Broad + Liberty_ by commenting on the[ original story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7e12c320a3&e=b7b3eddce2) published about his accidental release. Those comments have been approved, and so[ are available at that story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=65140ed142&e=b7b3eddce2). When doing so, he provided his email address which allowed us to reach out to him. He verified his identity as Daniel Rogers to our satisfaction.
**Why It Matters.** As previously reported, Rogers was charged with a DUI in May 2023, a case that took more than a year to go to trial. When he was sentenced as part of a guilty plea on a lesser charge, it triggered a parole violation from a previous case in 2021 in which Rogers admits he was dealing drugs. (He says he has been sober since October of last year). The DUI sentence, after a plea deal was struck, was three days — 72 hours. The new sentencing because of the parole violation was 12-24 months. The prison somehow didn’t know about the longer sentence, and released him. But Rogers, who has been in and out of the George W. Hill Correctional Facility numerous times over the years, blasted the current state of the prison.
**Quotable.** “I get it: It’s a jail, but the way that [inmates are] treated is unacceptable,” Rogers said. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4cc1dec8e6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Lies, damn lies, and Biden/Harris statistics](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8747ddafa&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Gaslighting: telling someone to trust what they’re being told — and ignore the reality that they see and hear. The idea that the government would do it to its own citizens makes you think about a sci-fi movie, or life in a totalitarian nation like North Korea, China or the former Soviet Union. Citizens are kept ignorant so that they wouldn’t know how bad their lives are. And so that the decisions of the leaders are never questioned. Worse, it causes division among fellow citizens because anyone questioning what the government tells them is portrayed as disloyal, ignorant — or “weird.” That the Biden/Harris administration would mislead us on so much for so long is nothing short of gaslighting. They repeatedly work to make us believe an alternate reality based on “statistics” — and demand that we ignore the obvious contradictions in what we are experiencing in our daily lives. That those in power are doing this to win, to retain and expand their power and those of their political allies is a tragic turning point in American history. Not campaign history: American history.
**Why It Matters. ** Voters have a decision to make. We see the effects of inflation in our daily lives, many sense economic unease at their workplaces, and many don’t feel safe visiting cities, or nearby suburbs, due to the fear of violent crime. Who do we trust to fix this mess? **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=479955ab62&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Thom Nickels: The Gospel According to Kamala](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c607260470&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: The mainstream media proves RFK’s point](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89025ede07&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Matas Smakotinas: A functioning FDA is necessary to combat illegal e-cigarette sales](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e487762344&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Mail ballots cause headaches for tracking vote totals](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ae9d1ae562&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rob Mercuri: As Pennsylvania kids go back to school, the future of education is on the line](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08a4dbea4f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
This week at _National Review_ , Noah Rothman points out a disturbing trend in our politics: [no one will ever admit they were wrong](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4cbb9ef269&e=b7b3eddce2). They won’t even admit they changed their minds. The people demand honesty and humility, but what we get are egomaniacs who, like Kamala Harris, flip-flop on positions and refuse to explain why — or even agree that they’ve changed at all. Is Harris for fracking? Against it? She’s said both at different times and her only response to reporters' questions is to say “my values have not changed.” Huh? What we wouldn’t give for a candidate who talked to the voters like they were adults.
---
|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

she hopes to take back former President Donald Trump’s hard-fought

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4c8730452f514065b685c272450eb33b&_e=TGDeKVe4AHHFgf6BjBoszYazYkRkfMQTaNfygd74_mMsDO0i_WhtuhWEX06qB_MkA8-cw0TULRP4Z9Q9y3idRqGINgeZjKA9BPZ3I51rNt4qu7VoMH9WTlWEGCdFbDmIB7NPUX4jv9YbfqGLSYi8AKqrFYhOCnt3fovPi46TFMQpGlry07NjO08Wm6cOQYilhlWGjtmXfTiMk8bxfnLxvTvFoF1RE6wcLQbrrElDzQCLv3wwNYxjxn56P4JQR5BvJAptuNJQbhKXCn8UPov506FFwfQM958SRYMFgQL3R6Bag5A-vnBeVo2R0AHxhMohW9EVnXhavWZdbmewer6wZcoWVW8v893rJDp3EFrLLjf5R5M8eLTFA88SLzIgL7DzTmhORS3-VM_asN_fHSDUvq9GCfI9jT8Dx_-zwqkVfyI%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Can you take 2 minutes to endorse Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats nationwide?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We’re counting on a massive show of support from Democrats like you.
---
Derek, First off, a _huge_ thank you for sticking with us through all those FEC fundraising deadline emails. We know they can be overwhelming, but they’re essential to our work to defeat Trump and elect a Democratic Congress. Emails like this one are one of the Democratic National Committee’s biggest sources of individual donations. And because of supporters like you, not only did we reach our August goals, but we surpassed them. Thank you. Now we have one more request -- and it’s not for money. Right now, volunteers across the country are reaching out to voters with one key question: Will you back Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats up and down the ballot this November? Here’s where you come in: [**Will you join fellow supporters from Cresco by adding your name to personally endorse Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats running nationwide?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/sept_endorse_kh_tw_dems/?refcode=em_20240901_1119_so&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/sept_endorse_kh_tw_dems/?refcode=em_20240901_1119_so&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)** This might seem like a small gesture, but it will send a powerful message about Democrats’ strength heading into the final stretch of this election cycle. Because no matter what Trump and his allies throw our way, remember: We outnumber them. And if we can turn out our voters this election, we will win. So one more time, we’re asking: [**Can Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats everywhere count on you to use this link to personally endorse Democrats nationwide?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/sept_endorse_kh_tw_dems/?refcode=em_20240901_1119_so&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/sept_endorse_kh_tw_dems/?refcode=em_20240901_1119_so&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)** Thank you again -- your support makes a big difference. The Democrats

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer-button?refcode=em_20240901_1119_so&t=1&refcode2=1119_22930333_p_bCnl&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)** **[VOLUNTEER](https://events.democrats.org/?utm_source=dnc_organizing&utm_campaign=em_an_mb_do_vol_vrec_2024EmailWrapper_vm_natl_na_na_na&link_id=8&can_id=c27908da8091781e35ea5e183e5f2d3e&email_referrer=email_2333413___subject_2864174&email_subject=our-commitment-to-electing-democrats-nationwide)** Text **JOIN** to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, by **[filling out this form](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/receive-less-email/?t=2&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)**. If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, submit this form to **[unsubscribe.](https://ak.democrats.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?ak_proof=1&akid=%2E0%2EfyQypR&t=3&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)** If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., **[make a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?t=4&refcode2=1119_22930333_p_bCnl&akid=1119%2E22930333%2Ep_bCnl)** Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

1️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ State Dems prepare for September special elections **
In just over two weeks, Democrats will face two tie-breaking special elections for seats in the PA House. Losing these seats would mean handing Republicans control of a key chamber just weeks before Election Day, so state Dems are working hard to keep control. [Learn more about the upcoming PA specials → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.lmpSTrE-G07FKUPTdpC9IXfr_znhQgjDeTPJ5Rv7OnHNMbcQRZccaywcuH3XHa_uRcLHpJ13sjWQRgbFV3yn-AUx6PLhiJgX6IpSXBqylZT_vkCDdlvOqBwJOZBP1FyLS6Kx6eVE9n7lCtVhiUIRAhSUbv-B9XUhhIwLbMNn_daw5Or2JH_VnnMd4BhDguLWs3KYkAHZ63T_VKUYDgjveDryb4uohNoo4ZHQWf7ycMVk46zHkqqRdeLDwi1ZXJEWT6UcGukDQ_vRPvti3L9d5Gv-d6tbj4noXbAG0ZTx419qiPMdZQNVs_ooq57mVfEod-UVstp153TC4RK0GMBq3kqLwf13hQW3jGADhwR-GiqAvmywpRV7J6wRj-CUiy_c3cucQlQiR_Fp5QWkgjECfOgt3hAwIZGT2S9rFyFpTv1ENlpGrnH7bDg0VoiFjMKXORhwCBUIwsiI9u-XEr8r6vCdqEPIqDb50vHM33PzYVrFYuT8JvheVlb7kaEqg4j8sz79pdrK4X-sgpns-I5VecBJ1OZkgCl8IsHXsl-rsT3_C78ojm8XZAPZUuFN8LGjMBZDpdkbj4NbraoB9khJnAtO3I4fiSVlwdWtbzed3RuEIyOm6LKkOtY_qNjgtituogygdLmp0ja4jMrcv0ZQA2Fit7RUZaGJ2FppmtKC-Ms/49e/TL8PfBN3TmmAphk0DJbmVA/h1/h001.5omSkFAcpKckQs2PY8ZjDjHu0K_P-9nhITohsKA23cc)
2️⃣ **_Post-DNC Convention:_ More Resources Needed for State Legislative Races **
The Democratic National Convention concluded with undeniable excitement, but the future of our country rests on carrying that enthusiasm to competitive races down-ballot, and we are calling your attention to state legislative races. [**Check out our DNCC takeaways here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDChl4Wjp7sxV-BUUwRWlvHjO384HaUwgfyoVMdgVMk9YD-SUe9EhbZACVv10kSSX08uE12fzy8KgrwU3HHWudwdVY4rYL9BVSGWwgbZQuEFVQnHRPaZymrCCyHHfUkmUVjc3VsAkugMeXO1-E99GPo_rDsVYU_AOwkfIma2yQ_NZCi_Kts_NYkbf2zN-HybZVmkytMDDVJ1frtJ_mzkQfV2KgNsH_XuuCWIUYh4BsaBAKtSKHbkOBqckeJBl1eDwVI7bCHq3dOr0CkJ6loihiCAe8l2nu11ccrLIO4e6xX34vXHxLZNQtkwQpvGQDjGCw8RfN4tZxJ3tksxsubEAdwiWob8Jq40oOiSU5NUChBGfsA_0Kp1ldfeq-Q5ba9UlJQlzdII6-IgTxNQb8pz5A_LMv7VrQJRnvc0E7oCF5gy8i2t46dGfx0v-AW-ISDA68THQxixpQAbjqjRPXznINYdTrArGWFBEWalosWrNC1oTDWxqyY-w77XPfo3HB1W6nvIqehFjshXoCpB1WoeWmkMDW_5ja_vlqq_QeZQ0-_gA22ssOQUudWsXBzVG0MINb_X1b4O5rCEnp3XpfWnggDj5dKPGsegU_lHtRHcz3uzLdQ8Giy159Q31XLsHJlsk0/49e/TL8PfBN3TmmAphk0DJbmVA/h2/h001.JTLm7EUhRRKHjVBYNtljwtPtObQpqi0srYL8atdgF2A)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ DLCC announces 12 new spotlight candidates and investments in Arizona **
The DLCC unveiled 12 Spotlight candidates running in critical races across Arizona and an additional $223K investment to break the Republican majorities. [**Read more about the DLCC’s new efforts in Arizona →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW_KyNJSw4h2-moqIvVgTzt9Vj3Vm8qdigvAFiNojDFWchi4OUQtP0PlVq0rRYYn6X1ZURorxccfI2szbdwp9RjuGY4fiqQIg88pWXmxAgi16xPfgWzDjmdT5m18Edw9HaQhVRdRPGulZ_rPPKuDumgluoH12VAXJeKMP2o9klYrIEhcqpibx1gsRtC9umCAEvdAIc64zR5Xu6gU0QwK5B9Ze2YSnzugjUJSy0zjRbrbpW8QxYaLvt57OLWrXZl6O4UbGTKctRGDjN7Qv_WY0bZpEDRFc00mSomYAXQCUrXxWhPGQ794VKIhXPW1cThbPg0VDb14BBmkAU69o7cZXC9YIuQ-WJlolvUIPZWGaMaEnEDlc9vwqgut8jejMLqWSAH0wkFXkPVRdTprQ5krVRBLw04yxzSSyar6ug8efbPzicILEcg-scSmfHz5WFZClINXmlW0nPBvyxhQ3vNDYMD74d1r7aETAVpTdI7bIveyxJPwBJ5cT_ahpxWT8d0JJxakOZ9K0ZGXhDCv4YTNE8dqXcuZdcJfwXeSGmSJCX30BT5srf8AEuOcUbJiDBXuNyuFKjP_3lGi1JETZ1rz3BLmDEJjZGWhyMWS-MvCR6Pk_eXJi-UzsHjx3Vk44xQk7tDGIu80gEH-P4aFxrwGvA3S4fP23moLL79L2wThTJm33/49e/TL8PfBN3TmmAphk0DJbmVA/h3/h001.mlwsXcW1IiPRgqMyr-jWFdnvaGc-IhMo0PI02it8kgw)

With the election less than 80 days away, every day counts and Democrats in states nationwide are counting on your support. [Find an opportunity to get involved here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWxZOGvyrvb3uYDI_eCkdGdPoLBLjHByv2ZimWwwDoIlnX74P6u-vLPC8C1oz4iwPvQBiuF82QY6eYrbdfDkNKRFW_RCZCFTupu0u521DeCz3OR6wGpKj3P0SRQ4A9RR6IrSeF5gjxD-sg4l5BVO6gmk7uUO2n2IWB_aX8lPPoT8R70kKlpRPUC0wTk02AJBryMGQelc4vgbkBFnCIsJChyA9r3nVfrspkZtnvHl5s1KnykGpR5LEOoPwA4g--W3pQDNs4ceu5rSGJg521Hj2PdvR2Ru5oHdenzBAxQM7b3GScDXLjlgvf6JG0Ecr1cEqgTylM8u0IJnJIiuiBr59CmdjBZ99wmyZsStzPWNvTsdauWCGm3_7-VpwaKNBE6115jAVaTm-qcaIty-Sz3NE5H2jYFsPX3r2ECP0GDaZCVwdveGyhW4FmG0H2lmct63GS07vC6-fI4KYN_1z8aoxc5k--6959TXfaqmD_C_Ks4fUyTvtBL6KjjBhTzNWhqyo6E_dfyJaoLdsNjUFzrkjwAQ/49e/TL8PfBN3TmmAphk0DJbmVA/h4/h001.maXglY7CR5vtME8XT0zCHf8WVb2k-5g4-_4Z2uUUjfc)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, September 1st, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Pennsylvania: State Dems prepare for September special elections In just over two weeks, Democrats will face two tie-breaking special elections for seats in the PA House. name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Historic opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin here.

When Virginians elected me in 2021, it sent a shockwave across the country and proved that commonsense conservative leadership can win anywhere in America.

Virginians hired an outsider and businessman as their Governor to help put Virginia back on the path to prosperity. We lowered taxes, created jobs, reclaimed the honor of America's Top State for Business, put parents back at the head seat of the table in their children's lives, and provided record funding for our students, teachers, and law enforcement heroes.

This positive change would not have been possible without committed, hardworking voters who devoted their time, energy, and resources to winning that historic election in 2021.

In 2024, we have another historic opportunity to make positive change for the entire country by electing Donald J. Trump as President and sending a Republican Majority to the United States Senate.

Even in Virginia, a state Joe Biden won by 10 points in 2020, we are seeing a competitive presidential race and an opportunity to flip a critical Senate seat too.

But we cannot do this without you.

We know Vice President Harris and Senate Democrats will raise hundreds of millions of dollars to win in November. If we let them outpace us in energy and resources, we will get the same failed policies of the last four years for the next four years. We won't secure our southern border, we won't bring down the cost of living, and we won't restore peace through strength around the world.

**[That is why I am asking you to please make a contribution of any amount to help Republicans win in November with a strong Republican Senate Majority to support a President Trump agenda.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=192c424151774677b59bac99ca718122&_e=1Z_Wyho82EeUzfPh9HN1TF9dX4ez3-soho5FKnPyOYFMX-ZNIgHlLN4ypuoSLHy3zS6Bmb2e6KmjsxJrLKLaiEn57v2N4buPMBt-nV-wNFPwELO8YPGIKRclb19EC_R8ZYw7qGatti2c_4whgdY4zM0UgdirRTGPhtReybko5-Ked9-EVRzNUhdv0Dw0JiJ4ImsPLoJfy6iHLBtfAuPfU1JL9MFtVXHbG_SrtDruEmPTaIEbN7kJr0NXgC9MWEbMdoBmoxT06dn4BbDCvwpVA2MGw18ls1uMnGZluHdmrBT1FHN-oIPZgaxKEx28CehEO9F6uc3NX5YQPY9UvscGuiAuLukKgw8bOOUPdIJoXjmPfk3Wc5eiYMzhNe-q1w7RfNkYHYot2XtGJ_02VHQCkgFctUQLD3S7puFNHIcPDpiW7hAana3CsjWykCIv6AmqzopuNcq4LF-BGW1mUumvYrTB4MLdf3akeILPWNFF1U8%3D)**

Trust me, I have seen what happens when everyone gets off the sidelines and gets in the game to make positive change with commonsense conservative leadership. That's exactly what we did in 2021 for Virginia and, with your help, we can do it again in 2024 for America.

Thank you for your commitment and your support.

clean_body: | | Friend, today I just want to say thank you. I know that my team and I have been reaching out to you quite a bit in the past week, and I want you to know it is for a very good reason — and how much I appreciate the support you have been able to give. As a teacher, I always did my best to serve my students, and as your Congresswoman, I will never stop working to give every person in our district the representation you deserve. My opponent has some of the most powerful people in the Republican Party lined up behind him, but I know that with you by my side, we have what it takes to win this race, protect this seat, and help take back the House. Thank you for all that you have already done to help me win this election. With immense gratitude, Jahana Hayes | = | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. body:

| Peter,

I wanted to reach out to say _**thank you**_ for your ongoing support of our campaign for Congress.

Because of your generous support we surpassed our crucial August fundraising goal. With our district on the frontline to take back the Democratic House majority, we successfully showed the strength of our people-powered campaign. But we have so much more work to do ahead of Election Day to flip this seat from red to blue.

I hope I can count on your support as we continue our strong momentum to help us defeat Anthony D’Esposito in November.

Thank you,

Laura Gillen

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Can you please endorse Elissa Slotkin for Senate in Michigan?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1852%2E135344%2EKCFBbV)

We’re writing to say thank you for putting up with all of our emails over the last few weeks as we worked to meet our August fundraising goal. We're so thankful for everyone who heeded the call and chipped in.
This deadline is an important checkpoint as we make some final budget decisions before voting begins, and the messages we sent are a big part of hitting the goals we need to reach in order to win.
As you know, Election Day is coming up fast and as you read this candidates up and down the ballot have been working through the state to capture something called "voter IDs."
A "voter ID" is just a simple declaration of support from potential voters.
It is a campaign contacting a voter, and a voter saying "Yes, I support you," or "No, I am supporting someone else."
These replies are the foundation of any campaign, because it’s how we know where our supporter base exists and who we need to turn out in November.
Before the election, campaigns try to make sure their stated supporters vote. And at other times -- especially when a candidate needs it most -- they will turn to those supporters for help.
So today, we are doing the same. We are asking you to add your name as a "Personal Endorser" of Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate. It's a small and simple act, but it will speak volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign as we get closer to Election Day:
**[Can Elissa count on you to add your name as a Personal Endorser of her campaign for United States Senate in Michigan? If we're in this together, we'll keep this seat blue in November.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-sep24-em?source=em240901-1-fl&refcode2=1852.135344.KCFBbV&akid=1852%2E135344%2EKCFBbV)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-sep24-em?source=em240901-1-fl&refcode2=1852.135344.KCFBbV&akid=1852%2E135344%2EKCFBbV)**
It will mean a lot to know that Elissa can count on you in this race.
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1852%2E135344%2EKCFBbV).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1852%2E135344%2EKCFBbV)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Debbie shared a photo
subject: one of my favorite Sunday traditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'll never take this for granted
| | |
---
Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91964241/495558329/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1828-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRhYTViMWQtNjk2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6woaX2bnDjqokx0oOIWRd9iQ7wwXVD1kOOR6gL4kOg8=)
I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment.
But friend, my mom never wavered once. **Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.**
I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family.
**Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort.** There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems.
But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me.
My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. **These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort.**
Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to _end_ them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs.
**Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.[Polls show that we've got a real chance to win, but I'm counting on your help to power my grassroots campaign. Please, if you believe in a better future for seniors, will you rush $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and protect Social Security and Medicare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91964242/495558333/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1828-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRhYTViMWQtNjk2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6woaX2bnDjqokx0oOIWRd9iQ7wwXVD1kOOR6gL4kOg8=)**

Thank you so much,

Debbie
|

| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91964247/495558353/-31196584?refcode=jtk1828-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRhYTViMWQtNjk2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6woaX2bnDjqokx0oOIWRd9iQ7wwXVD1kOOR6gL4kOg8=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life. = I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment. But friend, my mom never wavered once. Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life. I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family. Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort. There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems. But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me. My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort. Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to end them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs. Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.= Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Matt Diemer
subject: The Truth About Max Miller and Women
body:
| |
---
**To my supporters,** Some of you may have learned through the news that it appears Max Miller and his wife of two years, Emily Moreno, are headed toward a divorce. To use this news as a character assassination against my opponent would be in poor form if he didn’t [already have a history of allegedly mistreating women.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sZTjwE2yAZMJsx23Qb0lG7E6d5V4WD6qgds4IPb4k_Fv8hwkmt-TLXQcVeXs-FDGLZK6nY-iGTZDX0ghQ4Ftg3Ef67DJ1YQI069HFm6Ly1O6tYvS51ZCcYEqvQIhDiU9CkQsZtRh8m-WkASqM7-muV4B4u9BNpE3e0Ic1duPdqzcCI-ilhWUqb-jTVQGikHcSGefOoV7wd8hhefkuN8IL3kSdcXvua25F7rzE_z7SOKYNhIvoUfxfwO8BtNgPr7Q9Y-NmILrjLuCFbnv-EkqlV0avHmYTxDDqRd9MxYMuIhZfoyOKjO8AEh_74fhf6RirgpRkf6EFQDc7rjb4iLeAdHN4Vq-bEc5bbHYPllcxuEhTfG_TbYPBe86z5I9Kwh-xBqqSvW1LOCIaKMEh0rfH5Xmz102hQ4WVkG4Q9ajnhpbsiaMx43Re2CGQzg048wMh5nfHUDssWpTVdIizWkFMZ_M9tZ1yvtj7eCcqy0K0kfXwnOvz_hPJ20SRrFtR9bMiu9omkbaWAidIyKlH9QovKslhHLrdPSRvcLWtehnUMdVkU97bh9UZw7bDIso2QsvWJ0bPMeovxHfN-nPhKWRKoa6heFypbCLmF1ZkMhQVDhRnVV5hm6oOo3Pn9tW4UBiZS3LdNsh5Rfk8pivOjuPFtiW5ULY9GfJW0sJncl1X8mOVoOyREoJcS6Vw_83rQTafX6bWleOD-3VBeQ87OxhhKLoakc7a9b3lGjyLgDndTOh-7uxYcZmCbzoHl-qr5KfjcWSQ4v3NLccVYiis_OgTQf0hKEbEhSR_Br7Zt-TPyoyD3qo0NBbB9KoMakSJsiPruS8G_pCU95uY2S49CGbUlX53g4rJ-Q9kih_AUVm9tXpreDLLsEE3KUg8ShPv1q03ya23iqPLO9HZnMRJa9WW7A6fj9Z0qtfBSKe2k7ymi8E/49e/HGN2-TUsTKuhTi_n2ULPvQ/h0/h001.dOdmA4W5_MBi3T5e6wZ548AR-fZMSxdYoqKcqj-LdzY) And that’s why I write – we must question the character of my opponent because his track record speaks volumes. My partner, Sarah, is a medical doctor and personally knows survivors of domestic violence. When she heard the news, her first thought was that she was relieved Emily would be out of that situation because it was only a matter of time before Max mistreated her like he allegedly did to his prior partners. The second thing she said was that we must keep people like Max Miller out of Congress— and men who disrespect, abuse, and mistreat women. Let me be clear—we’re talking about Max’s mistakes and character, not about Emily Moreno or their marriage. We’re talking about Max Miller’s [history of violence](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.HV-T5b9C6Y6Pisqo-P4Pm1-e8SDMnMdd0a-cH7xTklm5xMAxx7CAjXsKFETkUQQMfHqXPnfGFJxAWELYWA8-Lw43TIsOFjslosyDCfMGIScQDT6dVuMIip--0U31fb0tIQ72s03mf1EYAlb6rLIDORPXx8Yi2ON5DOA8lo86rs5HAJHeLDuQdNJf880Yg2n7x9y1uLVBJ6aZqU-0F0h62h4ihADJsQGPHkGE0FLMavKjmTT-2mL8JktIJLpiW98Mi5S8qmVgKVG7cDIWb5qBUoiowKG_qEhUeD2cT5Z72kf2ao3O19lWrG_RWBkvg9HM/49e/HGN2-TUsTKuhTi_n2ULPvQ/h1/h001.eElwc3tuxrPWznLSC_wRnrBCwpk8-7VUFye6jla8e6U). We’re also talking about trusting and believing women. Women’s rights are on the line in the United States, and we need leaders who will fight for women, with women. Max Miller is not the one who will fight for women. I am. Here’s the bottom line: Yes, our district is gerrymandered, and yes, we must fight to let our voices be heard. But we have an opportunity to reach women on both sides of the aisle—those who know that a guy like Max Miller needs to stay out of the halls of Congress. We need to let women know that the longer he stays there, the more damage he’ll do—it’s just a matter of time. We want women to see that they can have their voices represented in Congress and cast their vote for someone who has consistently fought for women, with women. [I need your support. Pitch in today, and please spread the word. Let’s do this.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqueYr7edJk8d-KbippARHFYVVktiOvKO4UTx0OawLPRnlFGX7bp-fcnMmtBmj1w_YyDml9oJdzRWN-owtRe5NDRFLpyjyjTu6tE6cSMyS3B6afXEIYlyFAYMVfx6QK65jrMb5xwdPiet4_mAulNSvt3kGCQaDJtL4cz27fdOSIq0sEGkcdFVKsXnN7MA1LgONo4AQhR7a2bbilo8OtT9HRqN_nSeIouzYdCupawLeE0WOK_7IDHQhuElkt09nqbW4LfhjgPFtl6qtxN_4wLSXHQ6aqqO6Fs_DDmqm9fRAR-PPSOdeM4rw3J4HIAFgq11jBzN-uwZqutASoeHN2Am1wm/49e/HGN2-TUsTKuhTi_n2ULPvQ/h2/h001.EYFBpxaLVCDSReFU2-l9gNY5rstfMq8xZXQFgBdgwvs)

name: Robert Antonellis for U.S. Senate
subject: Voter Guide for MA U.S. Senate primary – election this Tuesday
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/voter-guide-for-ma-us-senate-primary-election-this-tuesday?e=eb86c99a95)
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Voter Guide for the Massachusetts U.S. Senate primary election this Tuesday

We have gotten many requests to do a voter guide for the U.S. Senate Republican Primary this Tuesday, Sept. 3. Apparently, there is a lot of confusion as to where the three candidates stand on pro-family issues and general Republican issues.

The three candidates are Robert Antonellis, Ian Cain, and John Deaton.The winner will face far-left Sen. Elizabeth Warren in the November General Election. John Deaton has spent an enormous amount of money already on mailings and commercials. But he mostly discusses the border problem and inflation, which the three candidates basically agree on, though with some policy differences.

Here is an assessment of the candidates from a pro-family and general Republican perspective. It’s a window to how they would vote in the US Senate if elected.

Robert Antonellis
_Pro-family issues:_ From everything we’ve seen, Antonellis is a full-spectrum solid pro-family candidate, and he is not afraid to say so. He even attended a School Committee meeting in Sutton, MA, to support parents who were outraged over the transgender agenda in their local high school.

_Republican issues:_ Antonellis is strongly pro-Trump and often wears a red Trump MAGA hat to events and speaking engagements. He believes that Republicans should stand strong on so-called culture-war issues.

Ian Cain
_Pro-family issues:_ Cain describes himself as “openly gay.” He says he is “pro-choice” though agrees with the Dobbs ruling because he believes abortion should be left up to the states.

_Republican issues:_ Cain recently said he will not vote for President Trump. Cain only registered as a Republican this year. According to press reports, he endorsed Democrats Healey for Governor and Wu for Mayor of Boston, and donated to far-left Mass. AG Andrea Campbell and other high-profile Democrats. Cain includes a rather crude slogan in his emails: _“If elected, my promise is simple. I will get shit done.”_

John Deaton
_Pro-family issues:_ Deaton has said that supports same-sex ‘marriage’ and told the press, _“Let me be crystal clear: I am pro-choice.”_ He opposes the Dobbs ruling overturning Roe v Wade.

_Republican issues:_ Deaton has been very hostile toward President Trump and says he will not vote for him. He tweeted to Donald Trump in 2020, _“You actually may be the worst human being in the U.S.”_ and _“You have without question the mind of a 4 year old.”_ He also has a low opinion of Trump supporters. Just before the 2020 election he tweeted to Trump, _“... anyone that believes the nonsense and BS that you are shoveling now is to be judged as a complete and utter moron.”_ He moved to Massachusetts from Rhode Island in January.

It would certainly appear that Robert Antonellis is the best pro-family candidate to vote for this Tuesday.
---

Hey team!

body:
| | |

Team, I’ve been around the block a few times, so it takes a lot to catch me off guard. But lemme tell ya – I just got off the phone, and **I almost fell out of my chair when I heard the bad news about Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada.**
**[I’ll break down the nitty-gritty in a second, but if you already understand the stakes of this election, PLEASE split $5 between Jacky’s reelection campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91969761/495570439/-909781123?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5351-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMwNTQ2NS02ZjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBOk1Bmeurqoa0qp6kzWOj1grmSezZGy7wMR2q2Rhw4=)**
| | [SPLIT $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91969762/495570440/-909781123?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5351-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMwNTQ2NS02ZjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBOk1Bmeurqoa0qp6kzWOj1grmSezZGy7wMR2q2Rhw4=)
---
**Here’s where we started:** Political experts from _The Washington Post_ to _CNN_ ranked Jacky Rosen’s seat in Nevada among the most vulnerable in the entire country. MAGA Republicans are only one battleground seat away from taking back control of the Senate, **so they made unseating Jacky a TOP priority.**
**Here’s what happened:** Donald Trump and national Republicans unleashed wave after wave of attacks against Jacky. Trump even singled out Nevada’s Senate race during his RNC speech to ridicule her – and ever since, right-wing billionaires have poured millions of dollars more into Nevada to flip it red.
**Here’s where we are now:** Their attacks are ramping up, and the GOP’s ads are now drowning out Jacky on the airwaves – **just when Democrats need to surge in this MUST-WIN battleground race that the polls say is in a statistical tie. **
**There’s no pretty way to put it: We need to turn this around STAT ... or we’re TOTALLY COOKED****.** Nevada’s last Senate race was decided by just 7,928 votes – so if Jacky’s opponent gets away with misleading persuadable swing voters at this rate, Democrats don’t stand a chance in hell of keeping our Senate majority.
**Jacky desperately needs to combat the GOP’s lies and spread her message to every corner of Nevada, so her team set an ambitious goal to raise another $75,000 TODAY to help scale up her advertising program ASAP. But with hours to go until her next invoice is due, she’s falling dangerously behind.**
**[I’m counting on you to step up and help us at this critical moment. PLEASE will you split $5 between Jacky and Kirsten Gillibrand so that Jacky can win in Nevada and protect our fragile Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91969763/495570441/-909781123?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5351-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMwNTQ2NS02ZjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBOk1Bmeurqoa0qp6kzWOj1grmSezZGy7wMR2q2Rhw4=)**

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91969768/495570446/1575385346?refcode=jtk5351-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMwNTQ2NS02ZjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBOk1Bmeurqoa0qp6kzWOj1grmSezZGy7wMR2q2Rhw4=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: | | | Team, I’ve been around the block a few times, so it takes a lot to catch me off guard. But lemme tell ya – I just got off the phone, and I almost fell out of my chair when I heard the bad news about Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada. = | | = Here’s where we started: Political experts from The Washington Post to CNN ranked Jacky Rosen’s seat in Nevada among the most vulnerable in the entire country. MAGA Republicans are only one battleground seat away from taking back control of the Senate, so they made unseating Jacky a TOP priority. Here’s what happened: Donald Trump and national Republicans unleashed wave after wave of attacks against Jacky. Trump even singled out Nevada’s Senate race during his RNC speech to ridicule her – and ever since, right-wing billionaires have poured millions of dollars more into Nevada to flip it red. Here’s where we are now: Their attacks are ramping up, and the GOP’s ads are now drowning out Jacky on the airwaves – just when Democrats need to surge in this MUST-WIN battleground race that the polls say is in a statistical tie. There’s no pretty way to put it: We need to turn this around STAT ... or we’re TOTALLY COOKED. Nevada’s last Senate race was decided by just 7,928 votes – so if Jacky’s opponent gets away with misleading persuadable swing voters at this rate, Democrats don’t stand a chance in hell of keeping our Senate majority. Jacky desperately needs to combat the GOP’s lies and spread her message to every corner of Nevada, so her team set an ambitious goal to raise another $75,000 TODAY to help scale up her advertising program ASAP. But with hours to go until her next invoice is due, she’s falling dangerously behind. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = There couldn’t be a more important time for you to get off the sidelines. Thank you for stepping up today. \- James Carville | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: THE VIEW FROM THE DESERT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
We need to restore faith in our country for the next generation.| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=571c71e0bb944c1ebe817c65101756d5&_e=wWF5acbDljtSoC4h3t5CU992iDoOPXIpdQ07MzUPOnSPcgJvx-ON1S755UhFb7s8nQIRUn4B47G4i1XN_NCpy8yQY7NuNvhjrW4AMQuN-N86wohVUqDBQ6k3iuBvod8zSq8M0i3mu3P2c9kKQiA3vJ21-7KL7rEMhUeFvbyo36pVDJTqeBae67a71lG1t9Hmili4GDIQwiRMynleY4AKJhyX66XavwvtTm8xgfZRnZiZCazGGXwGI-ica0d0U9KdjL9PV3psS-uSY1rh6cLZB2mE7JVDZJ5xHaODVPXhBWjJrUKNlNWVvf2NUF78C4-RRnaBhMoafH-8t3UBia6mk7A9_uMwGjaYRRCtCIcINztzT-BEuHBzXL1tae-x_wXheclOrmlXQm7VUgMVz8kZgg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, When you’re on the sand and dusty battlefields of Afghanistan, your whole perspective changes.

You can barely see a few inches in front of you.

You have to rely on your other senses and your intuition.

And most of all, you have to rely on faith. Serving as a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world taught me a lot.

But most importantly, it taught me how grateful I am to be in America.

**I’ve served all over the world, and let me tell you: if America falls, there is NOWHERE else to go like it.**

_That’s why when I saw the path Joe Biden was leading our country down, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines._

**My name is****Hung****Cao. I’m a retired U.S. Navy Captain and combat veteran, a LEGAL immigrant, a husband and father of five, an unapologetic Christian and a conservative.**

**I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because I LOVE America, and I won’t let the country that gave me everything fall to the wayside.**

We need to secure our border, stop out-of-control spending, and start treating criminals like criminals again.

**But most of all, we need to restore faith in our country for the next generation. Look, as a combat guy, I don’t like to ask for help, but this mission won't be easy and I can't do it alone.**

**[Please, can you pitch in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us defend the American Dream and take back the Senate before it’s too late?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=571c71e0bb944c1ebe817c65101756d5&_e=wWF5acbDljtSoC4h3t5CU992iDoOPXIpdQ07MzUPOnSPcgJvx-ON1S755UhFb7s8nQIRUn4B47G4i1XN_NCpy8yQY7NuNvhjrW4AMQuN-N86wohVUqDBQ6k3iuBvod8zSq8M0i3mu3P2c9kKQiA3vJ21-7KL7rEMhUeFvbyo36pVDJTqeBae67a71lG1t9Hmili4GDIQwiRMynleY4AKJhyX66XavwvtTm8xgfZRnZiZCazGGXwGI-ica0d0U9KddAMl9Ak63F3x5SPYqF-XZ-3FoAmBH72ii-83IkN3hw0i2Hu5tgwzpgbl9WswNEi7cTQveOkSAmEUMhLW_S6IFGRC_iHbTRl2pxTeL_guuY3kienmI-aLLkWiRi7-rlvoF-B4nlcqVAYi1t9-NuOf2w%3D%3D)**
---
[**STAND WITH CAPT CAO - SAVE AMERICA**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=571c71e0bb944c1ebe817c65101756d5&_e=wWF5acbDljtSoC4h3t5CU992iDoOPXIpdQ07MzUPOnSPcgJvx-ON1S755UhFb7s8nQIRUn4B47G4i1XN_NCpy8yQY7NuNvhjrW4AMQuN-N86wohVUqDBQ6k3iuBvod8zSq8M0i3mu3P2c9kKQiA3vJ21-7KL7rEMhUeFvbyo36pVDJTqeBae67a71lG1t9Hmili4GDIQwiRMynleY4AKJhyX66XavwvtTm8xgfZRnZiZCazGGXwGI-ica0d0U9Kduq5hWcYpul5uF796wvadRWtUxJlh7353T9xP5CvxO8HdxQ_MbbGn_7TC52wECFZrR70HxAGOF06KBFNGdRkHFKEiproCVR19p7lF4tN71kXdknfWgQRPDnxq-XvFLcQEKzTPYBQGK1crGXAsdae_Pw%3D%3D)

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4047%2E552475%2Efxf5VR)
Peter, after a blazing summer, we’re coming down to the final months before one of the most important days of the year — Election Day. **[Before we get into it, will you make a contribution to our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-1?refcode=em20240901-1&refcode2=4047_552475_fxf5VR&akid=4047%2E552475%2Efxf5VR)**
---

On one hand, we have Bob Casey, a lifelong Pennsylvanian who spends his time fighting for workers’ rights, women’s rights, and voting rights.
---

On the other hand, we have David McCormick, a multi-millionaire hedge fund executive who spends his time enriching himself and his Wall Street backers.
---

Our rights are being threatened by our opponent and his self-interests. We need to do something to fight back and make sure that we hold Pennsylvania’s Senate seat this November.
---

One of the best ways to take action to protect the Commonwealth is by donating to our campaign. We made it simple for you by creating a custom link:
---

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-1?refcode=20240901-1&dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-1?refcode=em20240901-1&refcode2=4047_552475_fxf5VR&akid=4047%2E552475%2Efxf5VR)**

body:
I wanted to give a big thank you to everyone who donated to our campaign ahead of our fundraising deadline.

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/NoGiUCFFofmzYKSxE6Qf5g~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRotwS8P0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZs_Kf9RmXkRhjlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Hi Peter, I wanted to give a big **thank you** to everyone who donated to our campaign ahead of our fundraising deadline. With your support, we exceeded our goal for the month of August and have momentum heading into our final FEC deadline before the election. I also want to wish a Happy Labor Day to every one of you supporting yourselves and your families, every single day. Labor Day is always a very special holiday for our district, where hard work is a way of life, and so is taking care of each other on deserved days off like this so we can continue to support our loved ones **That’s just one reason why I’m proud to have the support of the Illinois AFL-CIO, standing for over 1,500 affiliated unions representing nearly 900,000 workers in our state.** | _“Since taking office, Eric Sorensen has been a key supporter for organized labor. Sorensen is a vocal advocate to pass the PRO Act and understands what communities in Northwest Illinois need to thrive.__
__
__I look forward to our continued work to revitalize our infrastructure, ensure quality public services and provide working Illinoisans with the opportunity to live a middle-class life.”_ **\- Illinois AFL-CIO President Tim Drea**
---
It means so much to have the trust to fight for organized labor, and I promise to continue to stand behind the needs of our workers in Washington every single day.
[**Help me build on this meaningful show of solidarity with a**$ 5** donation today. **ABOUT THIS PAC: ** Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. body:
Summer is just about over, and now the real work begins.
Team,

I want to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to the incredible support from this grassroots team, we reached our August end-of-month fundraising goal.

Summer is just about over, and now the real work begins. As we continue to march towards Election Day, more and more attention will be on our race because pundits know that NY-17 _will_ determine the House majority.

The next two months will be long and difficult, but I truly believe that if we continue working together, we will flip this seat and retake the House.

Thank you for standing by my side in this fight.

—Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. At a time that the importance of retaking the majority has never been more clear, the fact that we met our first challenge is a great show of strength. And thanks to you, we know that WI-03 is clearly ready to finish what we started.

With just over 60 days until the election, it will be critical to continue meeting these goals – especially since we know extremists have and will continue pouring money into attacks against me.

Again, I can't thank you enough for your ongoing support. You are making this work possible.

So thank you, and I hope you have a very happy Labor Day!

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: You helped us tackle this challenge head-on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
How we ended August makes me feel really great about how our numbers will look in our filing report next month.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971468/495575683/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI1NTZlMy03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XT-EcgITtN942IprY-ZjeFb_e2AqfLEznOrBX4YxkEY=&emci=df39e308-e266-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=472556e3-7368-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

It’s not often I’m left speechless, but your help in these final moments of the month was tremendous. Thanks to you, we hit our final end-of-month goal of the summer.

Each month we raise our fundraising goals to meet the needs of this campaign, and each month, you tackle this challenge head-on. This is exactly how a grassroots campaign is supposed to be.

But just like this past month, our September fundraising goal is our biggest yet. This will be the last end-of-quarter fundraising goal of the election cycle, and like always, our numbers will go public for everyone to see.

How we ended August makes me feel really great about how our numbers will look in our filing report next month. There’s still work to do, though, and we can’t let up one bit.

For now, I just want to say thank you, truly, for everything you do for me and this campaign. With your support, I know we have what it takes to keep PA-08 blue once again.

Thank you for being on my team,

The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. **This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.** But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, [**could you still chip in $5 to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971572/495576064/1399008008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4508-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgxYzM5Yi03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mc8CRxoZB_YmQcjNIZCicn7OzMJ1IfT3RLHgdGCySQ=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971573/495576065/1399008008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4508-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgxYzM5Yi03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mc8CRxoZB_YmQcjNIZCicn7OzMJ1IfT3RLHgdGCySQ=)
Friend,
My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – **because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress.**
In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam _–_ _to leave the world a better place than how we found it._
I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. **But** **I****need _your_ help.**
**Right now,****polling shows me locked in a statistical tie with Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown – who set a major GOP fundraising record in this race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities we love, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me meet my $35,000 midnight fundraising goal, defend my seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971574/495576066/1399008008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4508-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgxYzM5Yi03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mc8CRxoZB_YmQcjNIZCicn7OzMJ1IfT3RLHgdGCySQ=)
