Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. [**Will you chip in now to win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971584/495576078/1424714024?refcode=footer&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgxYzM5Yi03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mc8CRxoZB_YmQcjNIZCicn7OzMJ1IfT3RLHgdGCySQ=) You can also [**text JACKY to 30508**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91971585/495576079/1077135989?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgxYzM5Yi03MzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mc8CRxoZB_YmQcjNIZCicn7OzMJ1IfT3RLHgdGCySQ=&emci=a8bc21e5-1666-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=3d81c39b-7368-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3800590) to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. name: Team Baccam
subject: catching our breath thanks to you!
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Not even the feast of fried fair foods could slow this team down, Peter! Thanks to you, we crushed our August fundraising goal! 🥳

We continue to be blown away by the energy and excitement in this district about Lanon’s campaign. Just take a look at all the folks who came to hear Lanon speak at the Iowa State Fair!!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBIA-03-Email-Sept2024-FR-September?&refcode=E10204-20240901-ThankYou-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBIA-03-Email-Sept2024-FR-September?&refcode=E10204-20240901-ThankYou-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25]Peter, we’re heading for the home stretch of this campaign. We’ve got the energy, we’ve got the grassroots support, and now, we just need to make sure we’re doing everything in our power to get Lanon’s message in front of voters before November 5.

Team, we’ve all earned this long weekend to catch our breath. But on Tuesday, we’ll be back in the swing of things to make sure we elect Lanon and flip Iowa’s Third this November!

Thanks so much, Peter. Take care,

Team Baccam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-sept2024-fr-september?refcode=E10204-20240901-ThankYou-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-sept2024-fr-september?refcode=E10204-20240901-ThankYou-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. body:
We need your help to ensure Nella’s campaign has the resources to close the gap, defeat Martin Heinrich, and give Republicans a strong majority in the Senate. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=08ce586b5a8b4a18a9d4a0e19d3b74c6&_e=4OSNSBAGRieFa6NoaJpIIShyKy9PlpLr_ZvVX9SgriMZ4gLQa3X5sD0YNcfxiuUsKwA3htupVbRVyZxlklLs3Os4TIlnlmCf_8fGbcJyFb9OYkQWImyicjTJPjlLEdlEIDR43aSFN0s0roK8Gox6yS38sZ0Lzvn0BAqAeke0sslJoM0tsO4J5G0kYi3vI7b4gEpH8DS8-DsOvr3j9_L-zDCOkZcc0IcHLDoqy7gvQkOfb74tQWSjZyLPwkOeCdIHDbefFbNZLOa6cvUFnEW7dEdnRN8SVkzS3lxmXCHIKNh3KViP9jsaBACGRzvZCfXJ2tTLdrsnyuhN4NxanlxhKfFMETfObIFvRBI3Eqb2vFWabwG6p13xfof6wbDO6nXWvG7GO6cfJKyT0O0MfN8mzwJZ7YoGPbSbEJdVt-cXy44%3D)

Friend,

I’ve had the privilege of working behind the scenes in some of the most pivotal political campaigns in recent history. Today, I am reaching out to you on behalf of **Nella Domenici** , who is running for the United States Senate to represent New Mexico.

**Nella is a leader with a vision for a better America.** As a former business executive and the daughter of a long-term former U.S. Senator, Pete Domenici, she brings unparalleled experience and a deep commitment to serving the people of New Mexico.

A few months ago, I wrote in the _Wall Street Journal_ that New Mexico could be a “sleeper” race for Republicans, thanks to Joe Biden’s and Martin Heinrich’s restrictive approach to energy, inflation-increasing economic policies, and dangerous move to keep the border wide open. And that’s exactly what we’re seeing - New Mexico is in play. [**So, before I continue, will you chip in $10, $15, or $25 now to help her campaign continue building momentum?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=08ce586b5a8b4a18a9d4a0e19d3b74c6&_e=4OSNSBAGRieFa6NoaJpIIShyKy9PlpLr_ZvVX9SgriMZ4gLQa3X5sD0YNcfxiuUsKwA3htupVbRVyZxlklLs3Os4TIlnlmCf_8fGbcJyFb9OYkQWImyicjTJPjlLEdlEIDR43aSFN0s0roK8Gox6yS38sZ0Lzvn0BAqAeke0sslJoM0tsO4J5G0kYi3vI7b4gEpH8DS8-DsOvr3j9_L-zDCOkZcc0IcHLDoqy7gvQkOfb74tQWSjZyLPwkOeCdIHqCvRnEZ2-zhyK-9Zy74CmOMNQL6VYCh63IvP4V2KxeC2xynO43onGbf4LeWKc30eDuAX4KOX4KU1dLd_fF7jfYoOZteANbsrEoeL0jLsK03scL36UewricYJheJGb9PJT6i42Zu46YsFcUbVkF__QC7jbeIJ-QE20XnryN0wdlk%3D)

_Now, let’s talk strategy._ According to the latest polling, Nella and her far-left opponent are neck and neck. The polls show extremist Democrat Martin Heinrich with only 41 percent among likely voters, while Nella is close behind with 38 percent. **Importantly, 21 percent of voters remain undecided.** This means this race is up for grabs, and every single vote– _every single dollar_ –counts. That’s also why Nella and Pat recently personally matched up to $1 MILLION toward their campaign.

[ ** CONTRIBUTE MORE NOW **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=08ce586b5a8b4a18a9d4a0e19d3b74c6&_e=4OSNSBAGRieFa6NoaJpIIShyKy9PlpLr_ZvVX9SgriMZ4gLQa3X5sD0YNcfxiuUsKwA3htupVbRVyZxlklLs3Os4TIlnlmCf_8fGbcJyFb9OYkQWImyicjTJPjlLEdlEIDR43aSFN0s0roK8Gox6yS38sZ0Lzvn0BAqAeke0sslJoM0tsO4J5G0kYi3vI7b4gEpH8DS8-DsOvr3j9_L-zDCOkZcc0IcHLDoqy7gvQkOfb74tQWSjZyLPwkOeCdIHEd9za3p5J27gQSL7Z2RYNczIGb775480kMDMSWfLc7D5XFpUmBeed-x-pMd6B3s6kjDXxwKr9W4wjpCm3RoTU1nTa4pF8Cv-UmUzmsY5oSDRL-GDYb3gwsNbdEVfNMsyoQMESCrX8ubMcuy6sNwVRb8O-ToNVnx6S4vELmbF5_c%3D)
You have an opportunity to make history by flipping New Mexico red. **We need your help to ensure Nella’s campaign has the resources to close the gap, defeat Martin Heinrich, and give Republicans a strong majority in the Senate.**

With this race as close as it is, every single contribution makes a significant difference. [**So please, friend, consider chipping in whatever you can now to help Nella gain the edge she needs.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=08ce586b5a8b4a18a9d4a0e19d3b74c6&_e=4OSNSBAGRieFa6NoaJpIIShyKy9PlpLr_ZvVX9SgriMZ4gLQa3X5sD0YNcfxiuUsKwA3htupVbRVyZxlklLs3Os4TIlnlmCf_8fGbcJyFb9OYkQWImyicjTJPjlLEdlEIDR43aSFN0s0roK8Gox6yS38sZ0Lzvn0BAqAeke0sslJoM0tsO4J5G0kYi3vI7b4gEpH8DS8-DsOvr3j9_L-zDCOkZcc0IcHLDoqy7gvQkOfb74tQWSjZyLPwkOeCdIHbpZ5QtHZ2WInO5NWtb0vrta8M5tR5tIc_emh6nqo9vIQZj03n8nE6NrfMpUT7JVICXQqSASe5EIQbJIjw33Nsigilpt6IdlAaJj5tuZCXr9bk5dy6yFuYsFa6b-vAQdt2q2WYJ7Sq5ZsRc_1z1YepPNPs1O7PG9IPp0rrSJ5nnI%3D)

Your support is not only appreciated; it’s essential.

Sincerely,

Karl Rove

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=08ce586b5a8b4a18a9d4a0e19d3b74c6&_e=4OSNSBAGRieFa6NoaJpIIShyKy9PlpLr_ZvVX9SgriMZ4gLQa3X5sD0YNcfxiuUsKwA3htupVbRVyZxlklLs3Os4TIlnlmCf_8fGbcJyFb9OYkQWImyicjTJPjlLEdlEIDR43aSFN0s0roK8Gox6yS38sZ0Lzvn0BAqAeke0sslJoM0tsO4J5G0kYi3vI7b4gEpH8DS8-DsOvr3j9_L-zDCOkZcc0IcHLDoqy7gvQkOfb74tQWSjZyLPwkOeCdIH70OKcnp4fgBImF4ZFpwRNfb0J0HdIz3uYmD8PAerqRfyWmHQWEIBHwp24pmx2pxE4XOgyF6rtjO7c9PPW2EKn08WJBz7rfL9jrCzu64UEI9m7BcDnCUUjaJ9O8H-i0-1k-iuVQVuxzF_m5q-w8hbURK7L-tXWDrnNgY4BijOjDI%3D)

---

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=16573%2E878179%2EROPCWs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=16573%2E878179%2EROPCWs).**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Because of the outpouring of support we received from this community ahead of our August fundraising deadline, we were able to meet our August goals.
#

Hi friends, it’s the team at GIFFORDS PAC. Today, we’re reaching out to say thank you.
Because of the outpouring of support we received from this community ahead of our August fundraising deadline, we were able to meet our August goals. This puts us in a strong position as we head into the busiest stretch of the election season.
Your financial support is especially critical now that we’re just over two months away from Election Day. When you donate to GIFFORDS PAC, it goes directly towards our efforts to support our endorsed gun safety champions up and down the ballot.
It means so Gabby and all of us here to know we can count on you when we face important fundraising deadlines and tough competition. Thanks again for your support of GIFFORDS PAC and our mission to save lives. We hope you have a safe, healthy, and happy Labor Day tomorrow.
\- Team GIFFORDS PAC
* * *

**👋 Hey there, before you go...**

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to [**contribute to GIFFORDS today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep24.n7q8o5&refcode=em240901-1-30&t=1&akid=8827%2E3935704%2EhdbPd3)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-sep24.XEpAaP&refcode=em240901-1-30&t=2&akid=8827%2E3935704%2EhdbPd3)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep24.HXHnVf&refcode=em240901-1-30&t=3&akid=8827%2E3935704%2EhdbPd3)**
---
****

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8827%2E3935704%2EhdbPd3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Harris-Walz
subject: Peter, do you endorse Kamala Harris for President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
Asking for your thoughts, not money. | | |
---
Peter, the energy and momentum surrounding our campaign over the past month has been absolutely _incredible_. We welcomed Governor Tim Walz to the ticket, celebrated as Vice President Kamala Harris officially accepted the Democratic nomination, and brought in tens of thousands of new supporters. Make no mistake: None of this, and we mean _none_ of this, would’ve been possible without your tireless support. **But with 65 days until Election Day and early voting starting soon, Vice President Harris and Governor Walz need to know you’re in their corner.** [So let’s make history together, Peter. We’re counting on 236 more supporters in 18326 to sign on before midnight and personally endorse Kamala for President and Tim for Vice President. clean_body: Asking for your thoughts, not money. | | | Peter, the energy and momentum surrounding our campaign over the past month has been absolutely incredible. We welcomed Governor Tim Walz to the ticket, celebrated as Vice President Kamala Harris officially accepted the Democratic nomination, and brought in tens of thousands of new supporters. Make no mistake: None of this, and we mean none of this, would’ve been possible without your tireless support. But with 65 days until Election Day and early voting starting soon, Vice President Harris and Governor Walz need to know you’re in their corner. | | | This election will be very close. We’re talking about a small number of voters in just a few states -- same as what we saw in 2016 and 2020. That’s why Vice President Harris and Governor Walz need the full force of this grassroots team behind them. It’s also why we’re reaching out to people in Pennsylvania today. We have to know where our support is the strongest, and where we need to work a bit harder to make sure we win this race and defeats Donald Trump. | | We’d love to tell Vice President Harris and Governor Walz that you added your name today. Thanks for signing, Team Harris-Walz | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Harris for President emails, you can We sincerely thank you for your help and support. Paid for by Harris for President.

name: Nick Begich
subject: We made it!
body:
Time to keep this momentum going! | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
## Thank You for Making Our Victory Possible!

Dear Friends,

I am absolutely thrilled to share the fantastic news — _**we did it!**_ Thanks to your unwavering support and dedication, we’ve secured the Republican nomination for Alaska’s sole seat in the U.S. Congress. This is a monumental step forward, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on this journey with me.

With this win, we’re now the sole Republican candidate in the race, putting us head-to-head with incumbent Democrat Mary Peltola. This is exactly the position we’ve been working toward, and it gives us the best shot at reclaiming this seat for common sense, conservative values in November. The momentum is on our side, and together, we’re going to take this all the way to victory.

Since the primary, the endorsements have been rolling in from some of the most respected leaders in the Republican Party. I’m honored to have the support of Speaker of the House Mike Johnson, House Republican Conference Chairwoman Elise Stefanik, House Majority Leader Steve Scalise, House Majority Whip Tom Emmer, House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan, House Natural Resources Committee Chairman Rep. Bruce Westerman, and major conservative groups like the Club for Growth and the Congressional Leadership Fund. These endorsements are not just a testament to our campaign’s strength but also to the shared belief that we can bring about real change for Alaska.

We’re setting up our first campaign office in Anchorage this week, and Fairbanks shortly afterwards — stay tuned for more details on that. They are going to be our central hubs for the final push to November, and I can’t wait to see it come to life with your energy and enthusiasm.

But let me be clear: **none of this would be possible without you**. Your faith in our campaign, your time, your contributions—they have all brought us to this pivotal moment. We’re in a great position now, but there’s still a lot of work to be done. With your continued support, we’re going to cross the finish line in November and bring home a victory for Alaska.

**Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for standing with us.** Let’s keep this momentum going and take back Alaska’s seat in Congress!

**America First, Fighting for Alaska!**

Onward to victory,

Nick Begich
Candidate for U.S. Congress
\---

P.S. If you haven’t already, please consider volunteering or donating to our campaign. Every bit of help makes a huge difference in ensuring that Alaskans have the representation they deserve. Visit [our website](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=c635151111&e=6679001ba0) to get involved!

subject: we met our end-of-month goal🎉
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2024-abt?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2024-abt?amount=]Team,

I just got off the phone with my Finance Director: thanks to all of your support, we met our last end-of-month goal of the summer!

Meeting this goal will help us keep our ads on the air, knock doors, talk to voters, and continue to spread our message of bipartisan problem-solving before Election Day.

The NRCC is doing everything in its power to expand its slim majority – which means it is going to flood money right into this district in an attempt to elect “MAGA Mary.”

We can’t allow that to happen. My campaign is relying on grassroots supporters like you to help send me back to Congress.

With Election Day in just two months, we need to keep our momentum up. We can’t afford to slow down or fall behind. Can you chip in anything you can to help our grassroots efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2024-abt?amount=]

We count on you to help us keep pace with everything the far-right can throw at us: thank you for standing by my side in this fight.

Yours,
Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: [#] = [, I just got off the phone with my Finance Director: thanks to all of your support, we met our last end-of-month goal of the summer! Meeting this goal will help us keep our ads on the air, knock doors, talk to voters, and continue to spread our message of bipartisan problem-solving before Election Day. The NRCC is doing everything in its power to expand its slim majority – which means it is going to flood money right into this district in an attempt to elect “MAGA Mary.” We can’t allow that to happen. My campaign is relying on grassroots supporters like you to help send me back to Congress. With Election Day in just two months, we need to keep our momentum up. We can’t afford to slow down or fall behind. Can you chip in anything you can to help our grassroots efforts? [=] We count on you to help us keep pace with everything the far-right can throw at us: thank you for standing by my side in this fight. Yours, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. Team, we crushed our fundraising goal for August! I am so grateful for the dedicated grassroots supporters like you that keep my campaign going. Without your continued support, I wouldn’t have the resources I need to turn out every Delaware voter and win. **With the election just two months away, this support is crucial.[Making a donation of any amount allows me to reach more voters with my message of hope.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91973085/495580739/-1513233902?amount=other&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.09.01_EOMTY_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGNhN2M3Zi03NzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80ic_-lj-L0mDo4yqNYI7vZMvy8Zu9SDaD6LadRoGa4=)** Since I started my campaign, I’ve been attacked by my self-funded millionaire opponent and GOP leadership. **And I know these attacks will only increase as the election gets closer.** So we can’t slow down now, team. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Lies, lies, lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0411f16c-0697-4100-9f49-e0e6d3da0bb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter — I’m Lt. Col. Lucas Kunce, USMCR, 13 years of active duty. We’ve heard a lot of lies from Josh Hawley lately, but one stands out: Josh Hawley, a guy who’s never worn a uniform, says I’ve been “running for office for 20 straight years.” He should say that to the police training team I led in Iraq. My friends from two Afghan deployments. Everyone I served with during 13 years of active duty. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T159498c7-938b-43ea-80d3-9d6e932b02cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hawley doesn’t know a thing about what it means to serve our country — all he’s done is serve himself and embarrass our state. I’m running to replace him. [_Will you split a donation of $25 or whatever works best for you between Blue Amp Action and I so we can fight back against all of Hawley’s lies and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat on November 5th?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcaa4d5cf-d2ce-4af6-837f-a2605d29bbb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Donate Now →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5ea031a-fc18-4d38-ab1f-04b50a5aea4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for standing with me, Peter. Now let’s get back to work. Lucas Kunce Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60c8b699-b8d5-48ab-ba7e-81cf3d965f4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Stop Elon Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: DoD, Drop Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Elon Musk
is raking in billions in government contracts – then funneling money
straight into his personal MAGA super-PAC set up to help hand Donald Trump
back the presidency.

We have to stop our taxpayer dollars from bankrolling Musk’s far-right
takeover of our democracy – [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1011&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ]will you add your name to our petition
calling on DoD to review Musk’s federal contracts?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1012&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ]ADD YOUR NAME

Musk is now the Department of Defense’s BIGGEST contractor through
companies like SpaceX – and his terrifying hold on our intelligence and
military agencies is growing as quickly as his billions. Earlier this
year, news reports revealed that SpaceX signed a new classified contract
to build a spy satellite network for the U.S. government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1013&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ][IMG]

As the profits roll in, Musk’s hold on our democracy grows. Our taxpayer
dollars are funding the far-right super-PAC he launched to help Trump win.
And he’s using his $44 billion purchase of Twitter to spread MAGA lies and
disinformation on everything from the voting machines to conspiracy
theories about child sex trafficking.

It’s long past time we rein Musk in.

Some members of Congress like Senator Elizabeth Warren are calling for a
formal review of the government’s contracts with Musk – especially after
last year, when he restricted Ukraine’s access to a satellite network
vital to its fight against Russia.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1014&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1015&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ]Together we can echo their call and demand that the Department of
Defense investigate. Will you add your name to our petition telling DoD to
stop bankrolling Musk?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19277?source=email-20240901&t=1016&akid=6671%2E5885482%2EQOU6TL ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — Elon Musk is raking in billions in government contracts – then funneling money straight into his personal MAGA super-PAC set up to help hand Donald Trump back the presidency. We have to stop our taxpayer dollars from bankrolling Musk’s far-right takeover of our democracy – [ ]will you add your name to our petition calling on DoD to review Musk’s federal contracts? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Musk is now the Department of Defense’s BIGGEST contractor through companies like SpaceX – and his terrifying hold on our intelligence and military agencies is growing as quickly as his billions. Earlier this year, news reports revealed that SpaceX signed a new classified contract to build a spy satellite network for the U.S. government. [ ][IMG] As the profits roll in, Musk’s hold on our democracy grows. Our taxpayer dollars are funding the far-right super-PAC he launched to help Trump win. And he’s using his $44 billion purchase of Twitter to spread MAGA lies and disinformation on everything from the voting machines to conspiracy theories about child sex trafficking. It’s long past time we rein Musk in. Some members of Congress like Senator Elizabeth Warren are calling for a formal review of the government’s contracts with Musk – especially after last year, when he restricted Ukraine’s access to a satellite network vital to its fight against Russia. [ ][IMG] [ ]Together we can echo their call and demand that the Department of Defense investigate. Will you add your name to our petition telling DoD to stop bankrolling Musk? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win. body:
Here’s my message for the American people. We have to get FIRED UP for the people who need us.

| | | **We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click[HERE](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_t=6Y46BWzA6vSem10upC2-jw3PhV76Xedhv1cA6BzNWTvanhUarOR8kTtY7wmCYWVLWqF7vT4BzFPBIy94zU5fQ1iFVbFVflhxbFqvpwafn1WSgNTMB9MVPTSOFlobDJ4c) to unsubscribe.**

[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH1vaH2BYYeCNLOdJg8PLzzphqOn83vGzM8E59U1WbCa79ql3FUZIC6awno0xbyLwf3vtwJdAGcO6Ml6DqUiRaCi7FMkLVoA0JdI8pgMeClLGdr0v0lG6c2xsFTx22QYZc8Xz3z5Thl8eMbAIRY8n4jA)
---
It's up to us, Friend. **[**We have to get FIRED UP for the people who need us.**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH2VPD9_PgX9WC-Csu7q_CHxW-XEAtdKo3FPR3Vfd0F_zUq7PbC1lh1XqPeCuSkwz57A-9RQH81ZsIr-4WpVEedHcxFcz6UJwIzJFCXjSTurRixEKk2xyxI0-P6SPIg9a43jIp4boy5XwdVR61GaKqL_)** For that mom who’s putting something back on the shelf in the grocery store because the price went up and she can’t afford it, we need to say to them: **_[We’ve got your back!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH2lgc9pvnmcCERZgbFnjq6JVDadBe6T-1kBwBSJjtG5U78q6RBoMfxYo6f3xidLsq6OmpHk_Cr0eDR58mtli-m2qSvWcU-XXm8u61PaME8OGn6qgSwZc9Vp47Zi9ZtcvMCoerW0JoI4XSxZ0ZeDcDpn)_** We need to tell that person who’s in the military, who’s a police officer, who’s a farmer, who’s a trucker driver: **_[We’ve got your back!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH0dIpzj6sEicLpuaQBov_595McksWupKXBwazdsN-gFEGU-BOdSqspp9fH28OEO57u6qOpVDGOQbfAQx4PdrDTN2zaRD8tyHjHWxIX_mhcMSf-3f5-V5QYJBkfkVLqmahkpH_4rkcfBNHEynU35kQGv)_** For those who are working paycheck to paycheck or counting on Social Security, I understand the difficulties that the Biden-Harris regime has given you. I want every Republican, Independent, and even Democrat to know this: **_[We’ve got your back!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH15s_uf3UGuOyFNEZnkUE0a16uBUDkiLWgnSn4WZ8LUcFAF81Be34F93pn-epZ4v0Qe74JXWhBbfXU1c_6oUqdCahl-SIihVKya0rREpobkUR-TVAxVKRvO62Kg9Ku962fML_BfPGUCjPxtegCzFa8W)_** Something has to change. We need to get back to normal! A secure border. Groceries you can afford. We don’t want biological males competing against our daughters in sports. **[We want an America that works for all of us! And we’re going to do it!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH2liA1E3xPAYcXXPE0Ao3Fy-2OXbUv1yQmzvs5u8MQqv41WlgInVn82008DK4i4jYBHIOAqVrtGQymw0rSinn50uHJrO9ysLiDQDw3X0VFSNFlWNIxqPkbtNC1qgidRMYxAVOXKXuuihdVbsoPxKuUU)** **[Let’s stand up today and say “We’ve got your back!”](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH1GtkEsFjm8naWnBWGcbL1UKn1o4SLb9snTK98-CFct46fdKyGvZvfaECo2wmReUkDw3LgknJQyIXyV946NCGgUEe6e4l5AYgU4cjL4Ttf33yd0bMUmdcD0QrDIN6ljgXzuflEVg3yaZj_QF0EEwUZE)**
---
[**STAND UP TODAY**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ba608ff7baea4ca782445fe62d4a0b98&_e=b9hsRYhhmAWLaUimgZAsW5wiUrS1fAb9dFBV9uKQ08p21igIE9_xAv0fgXnvws_OUF5kat50g8jkyw16pS0dn9kFmkr7E44JXHBaZ5GxmFOqSRrMMNa16cdQySDy_Jp8-fTJuhmD4fvrd9NqzuEyJ2y1L7LaLNgfGR07mOXENQDWDOJXWoJyq_DEbI93tJjLvZqtMSMpFH1u9rXSKR3HOWyCKqkHcZSZBrbEAszUt4GCUXm1C2b2PooR4XqRdOrEWNlZtyLrXj8fb22Ni7lzEGQazO4uKICctq9G95_TMH0kMaA4QPSz0ENPi1Jhmlbnk708dlVcGSxqnTs8-9SMxQ40Ngj8s7kXHPrm3FBita0SBh8r3Fw0beEZDoarvVfoRH5Xoi25jydNnCzh1LLVvzwvH9zrsMWyMKfwGnnSbEm2TLg6wIukn4lqoO6vhy-r)

clean_body: Here’s my message for the American people. We have to get FIRED UP for the people who need us. | | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click to unsubscribe. It's up to us, Friend. For that mom who’s putting something back on the shelf in the grocery store because the price went up and she can’t afford it, we need to say to them: We need to tell that person who’s in the military, who’s a police officer, who’s a farmer, who’s a trucker driver: For those who are working paycheck to paycheck or counting on Social Security, I understand the difficulties that the Biden-Harris regime has given you. I want every Republican, Independent, and even Democrat to know this: Something has to change. We need to get back to normal! A secure border. Groceries you can afford. We don’t want biological males competing against our daughters in sports. Thank you and God bless, Mike Rogers | | | | | I’m now neck-and-neck in the polls with my radical Democrat opponent. President Trump and I are in a strong position to WIN Michigan and flip the Senate majority. But I’m not taking anything for granted. It’s time to put the pedal to the metal and work even harder. Friends-
With your help, we were able to support eight bills that were signed into law this past session to make Virginia more affordable and support many more that made it to the governor’s desk. We continue to fight for a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, Paid Family and Medical leave, banning surprise junk fees, a modern tax system and more.
As we look toward the next session, we ask for your support to make these affordability measures a reality. Chipping in $5 today will make a huge impact in the fight for an affordable Virginia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-va-general?] . Just this past month, we were able to hold events for young voters to connect, facilitate meetings between legislators and their constituents, and work with other Virginia organizers to continue the fight for affordable healthcare, childcare, and housing in our Commonwealth.
Contribute Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-va-general]
Whether you support us by chipping in, coming to an event, or spreading the word on socials, your contribution makes a difference. Check out our socials and website to see more of the amazing things we have planned for the upcoming month.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Adam might not say it, but I will.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91974447/495583996/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGExZTk0YS03YjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnYJVhhG-p3jADix27jlL8bLvPQB60AOOITGU3YMDVM=&emci=95cf6b82-0667-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=30a1e94a-7b68-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91974448/495583997/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGExZTk0YS03YjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnYJVhhG-p3jADix27jlL8bLvPQB60AOOITGU3YMDVM=&emci=95cf6b82-0667-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=30a1e94a-7b68-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he was running again. We need to make sure that we have the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
But with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, this race is a lot harder. The Super PACs are already attacking Adam, and he’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to win this critical House seat, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. clean_body: Adam might not say it, but I will. Hello, When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, we were the underdogs until the very end. Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies. Ultimately, though, Adam lost in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country. The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money. In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we knew we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions. Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book. It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he was running again. We need to make sure that we have the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024. But with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, this race is a lot harder. The Super PACs are already attacking Adam, and he’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to win this critical House seat, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now: = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From our entire family, thank you. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: PragerU
subject: Did you hear about Google?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-ZqpAA)
---
| | **This map shows how a majority of Americans age 45+ voted in the last midterm elections. **
---
|
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Ad73IWVg3IA)
---
| | This map shows how hardworking Americans and patriots feel about our country.
---
| | **THIS IS HOW MOST 18-29-YEAR-OLDS VOTED IN THE LAST MIDTERMS. **
---
|
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
This map shows the future of America, if we continue to allow the left to dominate our education, media, and entertainment. **[Help us take back America's education system with a donation of any amount, and your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED by a generous donor!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
[Support PragerU](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._69v2KSWYsyLZ-g)
---
**How did this happen?**
We send our kids to an education system dominated by leftist Marxists. Now, Hamas-loving Islamists are also part of our teacher ranks. Below are a few examples and quotes by university educators and administrators guiding our young people today:
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**_" Racism and xenophobia are just as American as baseball and apple pie." _**-Abdul-Malik Ryan, DePaul University
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Allyn Walker, who is openly transgender, stepped down from a position at Old Dominion University after working to normalize the term _"_**_MAP (Minor Attracted Persons), "_******and has since landed a new job at Johns Hopkins University.
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**" The white race is the biggest murderer, rapist, pillager, and thief of the modern world." ** -Nikole Hannah-Jones, creator of The NYT 1619 Project and current Knight Chair in Race and Journalism at Howard University.
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
**_" The 'goodness' of cops is unimportant. They are employed in an institution meant to eradicate Blackness. The philosophical principles of being a police officer are racist and anti-Black."_** **_-_** Jenn Jackson, Assistant Professor of Political Science, Syracuse University
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-RY86K2US9zbLDWJCh9Ew)
---
Stephanie Baran, a sociology instructor at Nicholls State University, **describes herself as a "****_vulgar Marxist_****" because she desires "****_to see the entire dismantling of the system versus the other, softer, kinder, brutal Marxists._****"**
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Robyn Henderson-Espinoza--aka Roberto Che Espinoza--is a faculty member at Duke Divinity School, offering a course about "**_decolonizing_** " Jesus and his "**_myths and teachings that have been institutionalized._** " Columbia professor Joseph Massad **called the 10/7 Hamas massacre of Israeli and American citizens**** _"awesome."_**_ _ Meanwhile at Cornell, Professor of History Russell Rickford announced **his ****_" exhilaration"_**** over the murder of innocent Israeli civilians.** PragerU needs your help to make sure America's students hear the truth about our shared values and traditions that make America the greatest nation on Earth before it's too late.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._pAEKPfa5iDBsjRfyWSuw) [Give Today to Wake Up America and Your Gift has 3X the Impact!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._MR6fJaxg) Many Americans allow their kids to spend hours online every day, seeing social media posts with anti-American, anti-West, anti-God messaging.

**We 're allowing our youth to be taught destructive ideas and lies that are ruining our country. We're allowing them to be taught to hate America, the West, and its allies. ****

**And it shows. According to exit polls, 63% of voters ages 18 to 29 voted for leftist politicians in the 2022 midterm elections. That means a majority of Gen Z support anti-American, left-wing policies, such as socialism/Marxism, wide open borders, higher taxes, more handouts, and soft-on-crime policies. Education got us into this mess. Education is the only thing that will get us out.
---
[**Donate Now**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._PlmqRUPoHPA)
---
**Millions of 14-year-olds who are in class and online today ...are just a few short years away from being the decision-makers of tomorrow.****
**
Are we going to give up on our youth? Or leave it to chance that they grow up and change their mind after it is too late? Young Americans will make terrible decisions about our leaders, our national security, and our public policies if we don't invest in teaching them the truth! We must do everything in our power TODAY to save America.
**PragerU has identified roughly 68 million 18-29-year-olds who spend hours on social media every day.** We have the content to reach them now, and with your help, we can market our pro-American ideas to a generation in desperate need of a better education. If we don't change the minds of the next generation, our country will be unrecognizable. **[Your donation of $100 today is tripled to $300 and will help us reach 15,000 young people.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** **[$250 is tripled to $750 and will help us reach as many as 37,500 people.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._upZsvzzRRbMQ) ** **[**$500 educates 50,000 young minds! **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._6mwbU0DKEIYrB7Q)**
**With your investment, we can do everything possible to save the most important asset of our time --our youth's future. [Please help us with a generous gift, now TRIPLE-MATCHED, if received by the end of Labor Day](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
[**Donate Now**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---

---

Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MjQ1LTEyYTk4NDMzMjYwZTRhM2M5N2Y1MjFjODhlNDU0NDNkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/3Z7jn2y7isCSJ4tZPjTI1g) to unsubscribe.

body:
I can’t thank you enough.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91975385/495587145/175592731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzJiODQ1ZS03ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oB2vGWN0A2u9J4NWbPzHQrzssORlZct5iQAwQr9ykPo=)

Peter,

I want to reach out and say thank you and share some fantastic news.

Thanks to your grassroots support, not only did we reach our August end-of-month fundraising goal, **we surpassed it.** This means we can continue making the investments needed to expand our programs and get our message out to Iowans all across our district.

The future of reproductive rights, the economy, our communities, and our democracy depend on us stepping up and fighting back. And thanks to your support, we will be able to do just that.

Thank you for everything you do,

Christina

Donate now to keep our momentum going: [https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/filing-sept2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91975488/495587313/1494052008?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_CW_20240901_FR_filing1_0_3MO_cinde_NA_NA_filing1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJiODQ1ZS03ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2R9MELdtWKv2P3cxfjV_Ozf1SqYhZRDMtY9gcvEuPvM=&emci=4c5ee172-bc67-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7a2b845e-7d68-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=45626166)

Six more Israeli hostages have been killed, including American-Israeli Hersh Goldberg-Polin, whose parents spoke at the Democratic National Convention. This tragedy is another painful reminder that neither Israel nor Palestine will enjoy peace and security through war. Indeed, during the temporary ceasefire in November Hamas released more than 100 hostages through negotiation and diplomacy. Sadly, it appears clear that the one man who can secure the release of all hostages, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, refuses to do so. What needs to happen to secure a lasting peace for Israel and for Palestine? **Let 's Address This.**
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=148369351&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ4MzY5MzUxLCJpYXQiOjE3MjUyMDc0NjcsImV4cCI6MTcyNzc5OTQ2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mir3bj2tHtVH6jJ2bYMdkevkrEZzPyCcjk33AaEiY1U)

Ssix undated photos shows hostages, from top left, Hersh Goldberg-Polin, Ori Danino, Eden Yerushalmi; from bottom left, Almog Sarusi, Alexander Lobanov, and Carmel Gat (The Hostages Families Forum via AP)
## The status of hostage negotiations
Just recently on August 31, veteran Israeli hostage negotiator Gershon Baskin [published the following daunting message on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/832519e8-b6b1-4c5b-8fcf-efbf1ba71997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While his full post is a must read, in significant part Baskin wrote:
> About two weeks ago, the hostage families' forum asked me to try to conduct a direct negotiation with Hamas on their behalf. That's what I did, and within two weeks I obtained agreement to a three-week deal - the release of all 107 Israeli hostages, the end of the war, an Israeli withdrawal from Gaza, and an agreed release of the names and number of Palestinian prisoners. The entire Hamas leadership agrees to this outline, but our Netanyahu does not want to end the war. This is the situation today - Saturday, August 31, 2024.
The very next day, on September 1, the parents of Hersh Goldberg-Polin received the horrible news that their son had been killed, along with five other hostages. In response to these tragic and preventable killings, the The Hostage Families Forum headquarters issued this stark warning:
> Netanyahu abandoned the hostages. This is now a fact. Starting tomorrow the country will tremble. We call on the public to prepare. We will bring the country to a halt. The abandonment is over.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/354ba1f7-95f5-4e33-91f4-9deac48e9af6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jonathan Polin and Rachel Goldberg, parents of Israeli-American hostage Hersh Goldberg-Polin, attend a demonstration in southern Israel by the border with Gaza on Aug. 29, 2024. Photo: Jack Guez/AFP via Getty Images
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VsKXKfypwVbvP1lR04frjcvL0R1Rs_wIsAquIUb0PVI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=148369351)
## Netanyahu's allies condemn him
And they are not alone or fringe in their outrage. In fact, Netanyahu's own Defense Yoav Minister Gallant, Mossad Director David Barnea, and senior Israeli officials are all placing blame for failure to secure release of the hostages squarely on Netanyahu. [Axios reports](https://substack.com/redirect/b48deeb9-72da-46c4-ab67-a392678a779e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Gallant, IDF chief of staff Gen. Herzi Halevi and Mossad director David Barnea claimed Netanyahu's proposal to vote on a resolution to [maintain full Israeli control](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba3a364-3c63-4f6a-bf68-ebfae9cc32b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) along the Philadelphi corridor on the Egypt-Gaza border would undermine a possible deal. "We have to choose between Philadelphi and the hostages. We can't have both. If we vote, we might find out that either the hostages will die or we will have to backtrack to release them," Gallant told Netanyahu and the other cabinet ministers.
[As I've written before](https://substack.com/redirect/189b6b83-a8b8-4d29-8f4e-42d7a588a298?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the binding UN Security Council hostage resolution has been on the table for 2 months, at least since early June. This was not a resolution crafted by Hamas, but by Israel, and approved by President Biden. Hamas accepted that binding resolution which included a release of all Israeli hostages. Since that binding resolution passed, Netanyahu has vehemently rejected it. It is no wonder the families of the hostages and Netanyahu's closest allies in the Israeli government all openly blame him for, in their words, "_abandoning the hostages_." Indeed, this isn't the first time they've condemned Netanyahu's failures.
In a Times of Israel interview, former spokesperson for the families of hostages Haim Rubinstein lamented that the Israeli government "absolutely ignored" them and there's "[no doubt](https://substack.com/redirect/f0bc906c-b613-4e9a-a707-a067cc9fa31a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" Netanyahu is preventing a deal. And that [after an October 26 meeting with Netanyahu he felt particularly disappointed](https://substack.com/redirect/f0bc906c-b613-4e9a-a707-a067cc9fa31a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because the return of hostages were not the Israeli government's priority:
> We left the meeting very disappointed because Netanyahu talked about dismantling Hamas as the goal of the war. He didn't promise anything regarding the demand to return the hostages. He merely said a military operation in Gaza was needed to serve as leverage for the hostages' release. _We later found out that Hamas had offered on October 9 or 10 to release all the civilian hostages in exchange for the IDF not entering the Strip, but the government rejected the offer_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7827cc62-8e60-4076-9579-ddcab69e0b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former spokesperson for the families of hostages Haim Rubinstein (Courtesy)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VsKXKfypwVbvP1lR04frjcvL0R1Rs_wIsAquIUb0PVI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=148369351)
## An agreed to hostage deal is on the table
Nearly four months ago, on May 6, Hamas said it [accepted a ceasefire proposal that included release of all hostages](https://substack.com/redirect/0e272ed3-e3fd-407f-8c74-2ac5f9add300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Israel rejected it. Again on June 11 Hamas accepted the binding UN Security Council resolution on ceasefire and release of all hostages, as AP [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/45c3afe2-7aa3-4939-a017-3a5284a4c821?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Hamas accepts a UN Security Council ceasefire resolution and is ready to negotiate over the details, senior Hamas official Sami Abu Zuhri told Reuters on Tuesday, adding that it was up to Washington to ensure that Israel abides by it. Hamas accepts the UN security council resolution in regard to the ceasefire, withdrawal of Israeli troops and swap of hostages for detainees held by Israel, he said.
And despite the United States [insisting](https://substack.com/redirect/6ad4721a-b8e6-4c54-8202-f06b4055dc15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Israel has accepted this resolution (that Israel itself proposed), Israel has continued to loudly [reject](https://substack.com/redirect/cc911a08-0201-4ff3-8964-bdcf270b2738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the binding UN Security Council resolution. The Times of Israel [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/cc911a08-0201-4ff3-8964-bdcf270b2738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Ambassador to the United Nations Gilad Erdan informed his US counterpart Linda Thomas-Greenfield on Thursday that Jerusalem opposes the Security Council [resolution](https://substack.com/redirect/5cab00eb-02ce-47eb-82a4-888c39cc8380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) being advanced by Washington that expresses support for the hostage-ceasefire proposal Israel made last week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a9ce0c9-51c8-4c60-931e-9d7a161c252f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In fact, Netanyahu has furthermore defiantly and shamelessly released a public video [condemning President Biden](https://substack.com/redirect/b8b99137-7860-41fa-811e-a4d2422ac2c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for not sending even _more_ missiles and arms to "[finish the job](https://substack.com/redirect/b8b99137-7860-41fa-811e-a4d2422ac2c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" of bombing Gaza. President Biden must instead listen to the will of the American people. As reported, [61% of all Americans, 63% of moderates, and 77% of Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/06f90c3f-c8f2-4162-a183-d10a000ec590?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) demand Biden stop arming Netanyahu, and force an end to this siege on Gaza. If [Ronald Reagan could force Israel to stop bombing civilians with a single phone call](https://substack.com/redirect/f8f422fc-300e-4b68-b6df-5788f48c7c59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), why is Joe Biden afraid to stop arming Israel to commit war crimes?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62c43daf-0866-4f7f-801f-8a27e5b6d096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..VsKXKfypwVbvP1lR04frjcvL0R1Rs_wIsAquIUb0PVI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=148369351)
## Biden must act for lasting peace
During this last week while 6 Israeli hostages were killed, the Israeli military killed at least 47 Palestinian civilians. According to The Lancet, [the Israeli military has killed at least 186,000 Palestinians](https://substack.com/redirect/5f6a70a4-6f41-4a29-99a0-2de40d4629b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to date. Here's the horrifying and bizarre reality of where we are nearly 11 months into the siege on Gaza. On one side, the Israeli people, the American people, the United Nations, Israeli Defense Minister Gallant, Mossad Director Barnea, and Hamas all agree to a ceasefire, release of all Israeli hostages, a withdrawal of Israel from Gaza, and a release of Palestinian hostages. On the other side is one man who does not--Benjamin Netanyahu--and one man who keeps arming Netanyahu--Joe Biden. This is untenable.
The bottom line is this. As the families of the hostages tell us, "_Netanyahu abandoned the hostages. This is now a fact_." If the families of Israeli hostages do not trust or rely on Netanyahu to do what is right, why should anyone? The responsibility to do what is right is on Joe Biden exclusively. If international rules based order has any meaning, Joe Biden must act immediately to stop arming Netanyahu, end this siege, and enable a true and lasting peace. Otherwise, innocent people will continue to die.

The Israeli Prime Minister's closest allies openly condemn Netanyahu for rejecting a hostage deal -- but will he finally listen to reason? | | | Sep 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | Six more Israeli hostages have been killed, including American-Israeli Hersh Goldberg-Polin, whose parents spoke at the Democratic National Convention. This tragedy is another painful reminder that neither Israel nor Palestine will enjoy peace and security through war. Indeed, during the temporary ceasefire in November Hamas released more than 100 hostages through negotiation and diplomacy. Sadly, it appears clear that the one man who can secure the release of all hostages, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, refuses to do so. What needs to happen to secure a lasting peace for Israel and for Palestine? While his full post is a must read, in significant part Baskin wrote: About two weeks ago, the hostage families' forum asked me to try to conduct a direct negotiation with Hamas on their behalf. That's what I did, and within two weeks I obtained agreement to a three-week deal - the release of all 107 Israeli hostages, the end of the war, an Israeli withdrawal from Gaza, and an agreed release of the names and number of Palestinian prisoners. The entire Hamas leadership agrees to this outline, but our Netanyahu does not want to end the war. This is the situation today - Saturday, August 31, 2024. The very next day, on September 1, the parents of Hersh Goldberg-Polin received the horrible news that their son had been killed, along with five other hostages. In response to these tragic and preventable killings, the The Hostage Families Forum headquarters issued this stark warning: Netanyahu abandoned the hostages. This is now a fact. Starting tomorrow the country will tremble. We call on the public to prepare. We will bring the country to a halt. The abandonment is over. | | ---|---|--- Jonathan Polin and Rachel Goldberg, parents of Israeli-American hostage Hersh Goldberg-Polin, attend a demonstration in southern Israel by the border with Gaza on Aug. 29, 2024. Herzi Halevi and Mossad director David Barnea claimed Netanyahu's proposal to vote on a resolution to along the Philadelphi corridor on the Egypt-Gaza border would undermine a possible deal. "We have to choose between Philadelphi and the hostages. We can't have both. | Yesterday, we witnessed the worst they could throw at us, Friend... a grotesque "Texas-Sized Trump Train and MAGA Rally" designed to intimidate TX-31 voters, and scare all of us so we don't speak out or step out of line.
Their "train" has hit a giant boulder on the tracks: us.
We aren't buying their lies.
And trust me, I'm not going anywhere.
In the past 24 hours, a slew of voters who'd voted for my opponent in the past reached out to our campaign for the very first time.
My opponent, John Carter, is one of Trump's fiercest allies in Congress. He promotes Trump's conspiracies from his official position in Congress; on Jan. 6th, 2021, he voted against certifying the 2020 election; even more recently, Carter joined Trump's attack on our judicial system to defend the former president; and he's in lockstep with Trump, even now.
Yesterday's "train" was the tipping point for these voters. Now, we've attracted even more hardworking Texans to our campaign because the MAGA agenda doesn't speak to their Texas values.
I'm running for Congress to help unite us Texans. And it's clear that what our campaign is doing is working, and that what we represent is resonating with more folks than we'd imagined.
Yesterday was not an easy day, not for any of us.
But it also means that MAGA extremists know Texas's votes aren't a foregone conclusion.
They know the tide is shifting here. They know that voters are ready for a new day here in TX-31. And with just 65 days left in this race, they're desperate.
We can win this thing, but we've got to have the resources to defend against MAGA lies, and their targeted attacks. [TX-31 is a clear battle, and it's one we have to win. Please, chip in now so we have the resources to fight back.](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wmOaOBRszH3nOG8jIKRQZr5j53_bEg1YsBU8q5dNaKBJ6sSwXhZ0q5tnsag6oFT77M8ZTaqCEiTltiEIe2c2124pWQayp4bLLeJyun3-kVbbqGjCzyCzQzewSZzoHeRy1yuHd2FgNmNadkFRTaJNdpCDmkXWMPmoAh5hkv77f80Tw6g2Y0TOOEfi-ObVu5CGz-NLfEy5E8g8Y36qfAe2Kw==&c=r9TTj_Vb2H7ww2bD-AQpNym78-O9mOlXD4lpmhLp9pYF5nky0OsZfQ==&ch=KCycOiCXYyR-GIfWfPmQ3ATG6SaEkueW3pheDixgXIKJTroYYxxGWA==)

clean_body: a force for good. | | | | == | == | Whatever a "day of MAGA FUN" means, Friend, I don't want any part of it: | == | | == | == | Yesterday, we witnessed the worst they could throw at us, Friend... a grotesque "Texas-Sized Trump Train and MAGA Rally" designed to intimidate TX-31 voters, and scare all of us so we don't speak out or step out of line. Their "train" has hit a giant boulder on the tracks: us. We aren't buying their lies. And trust me, I'm not going anywhere. In the past 24 hours, a slew of voters who'd voted for my opponent in the past reached out to our campaign for the very first time. My opponent, John Carter, is one of Trump's fiercest allies in Congress. He promotes Trump's conspiracies from his official position in Congress; on Jan. 6th, 2021, he voted against certifying the 2020 election; even more recently, Carter joined Trump's attack on our judicial system to defend the former president; and he's in lockstep with Trump, even now. Yesterday's "train" was the tipping point for these voters. Now, we've attracted even more hardworking Texans to our campaign because the MAGA agenda doesn't speak to their Texas values. I'm running for Congress to help unite us Texans. And it's clear that what our campaign is doing is working, and that what we represent is resonating with more folks than we'd imagined. Yesterday was not an easy day, not for any of us. But it also means that MAGA extremists know Texas's votes aren't a foregone conclusion. They know the tide is shifting here. They know that voters are ready for a new day here in TX-31. And with just 65 days left in this race, they're desperate. We can win this thing, but we've got to have the resources to defend against MAGA lies, and their targeted attacks. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | With courage, | == | == | | | == Democrat Stuart Whitlow is running to unseat Trump's ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter. name: FRC Action
subject: Sign the Petition: Urge presidential candidates to support Israel!
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Fellow American,

Recently, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu
spoke before a joint session of Congress. The night before, FRC
Action Chairman Tony Perkins had the privilege of meeting with
the prime minister and letting him know that many Bible-believing
Christians are praying for him, Israel, and the Jewish people.

After the horrific October 7 terrorist attack by
Hamas, we have seen antisemitism on display in our nation's
cities and on college campuses. We stand against this evil. As
Prime Minister Netanyahu said, "Wherever and whenever we see the
scourge of antisemitism, we must fight it, without exception."

As Israel fights for its survival, it is more
important now than ever that the United States stand with our
ally. Israel should be able to count on our support in its fight
for its survival. Sign the petition below encouraging President
Biden and American presidential candidates to commit to
supporting Israel.

Sign the Pledge Now

To President Biden and the Presidential Candidates:

It is of great importance that the next president
of the United States commits to stand with our greatest ally in
the Middle East, Israel.

For decades, there has been bipartisan support for
Israel. Sadly, ever since the October 7 attack against Israel by
Hamas terrorists, this support has been put into question.

Given the existential threat Israel is facing, it
should be a priority of the current chief executive and every
presidential candidate to be loud and clear about their support
for Israel.

We ask that you affirm America's commitment to
Israel's security and ensure that Israel maintains a qualitative
military edge over any and all adversaries.

We ask that you support Israel's right and
obligation to defend itself against terror attacks upon its
people and against alternative forms of warfare being waged upon
it legally, economically, culturally, and otherwise.

We ask that you make clear to the Israeli
government that you will be a willing partner in their fight for
survival.

Sign the Pledge

God Bless,

Jody Hice

President, FRC Action

FRC Action

801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

Family Research Council Action (FRC Action)
operates as a social welfare organization organized under section
501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC
Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income
tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the
general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept
contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of
influencing an election.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

You were added to the system August 17, 2023.

Michael Bloomberg just dropped $10 MILLION to defeat me and now Josh Riley is spending over $250,000 a week on deceptive attack ads alone! If we’re going to reach the voters who will decide this election and the House Majority, I need your immediate help. The support of grassroots Conservatives like you is the reason we’re holding onto a very slim lead in this race. BUT WE CAN’T GET COMPLACENT. This is a marathon. If we can’t keep pace with the Left’s spending in this race, we could see our lead disappear overnight. Thank you and God bless, Marc Molinaro Republican Congressman, NY-19 | | Paid for by Marc for US
