name: John Pierce
subject: Deadline Looming for the “Praying Grandma”
body:
On September 12th, Rebecca Lavrenz must pay her fine of $103,000 to the Biden/Harris Justice Department.
On September 12th, Rebecca Lavrenz must pay her fine of $103,000 to the Biden/Harris Justice Department.
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM9uwjAMh5_GuVElbtqkhxzGUCdtgvM4hvwZmRJakkLVt5_K2I7-2f78yTqNMfhFgdgC4jnYAohQvwDi9TinfPtOH2-b4xJPm2t7SM3axVdAnJbR_Y8-KZVLOsQ1FTtiVe0t5cQpJrBBKjsuyFkxL9ZYW05PKKxnVFNsBDemqb2VnASFFDntKGMtR4ZVd-pkI72XWrra-RY4fdypdHI5GM3KNOuchyFVZkgkqvM0jeUh1gP2cx6qy81Edyu_a2ZIgP1TGbC_r9Vl3jtc3kWBun98od590q2bDtzuSVZ2nEOMobQCOP36w5C7wp8AAAD__4WEYec)
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg) Friend,

On September 12th, Rebecca Lavrenz must pay her fine of $103,000 to the Biden/Harris Justice Department.

Rebecca is the 72-year-old great-grandmother and faithful Christian who entered the Capital building with a group for several minutes, caused no harm, and left when she was asked.

**[Please help Rebecca pay this outrageous fine and the cost of her appeal.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)**

Mrs. Lavrenz was sentenced to six months of house arrest, 12 months of probation, and the largest fine for a misdemeanor in history—$103,000!

As her attorney, I knew a guilty verdict was impossible to avoid given the politics of this case, so I fought hard to avoid jail time for Rebecca.

While we succeeded in keeping a great-grandmother out of jail, Judge Zia Faruqui wanted to make an example of Rebecca and silence her voice ahead of the November elections, so in addition to the fine and punishment, he added a provision that Rebecca is BANNED from the Internet.

She cannot use email, post on X or Facebook, or log in to join a podcast.

Rebecca cannot even access the online reservation system for her bed and breakfast, her primary source of income.

She needs our help to pay this looming fine and cover the costs of the appeal we are working on, **[so please donate as much as you can today to ensure Rebecca is not penalized even more for failing to pay the fine](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg).**

Since Rebecca is banned from the Internet by Judge Faruqui, I wanted to share her words directly with you:

| ❝
---
Saddened that the current government administration and 'justice' system who call themselves the 'United States of America' want to silence me by sentencing me to home detention and banning me from the Internet for six months, but grateful that family and a multitude of others are now stepping up to carry my voice further to 'Make America Godly Again'!

\- Rebecca Lavrenz

Since graduating from Harvard Law, I have been a top litigator, representing cases worth billions of dollars. My organization, the National Constitutional Law Union, has represented dozens of January 6th defendants to the best of our ability.

In my decades as an attorney, I have never experienced such brazen words from a judge to a defendant. Judge Faruqui called into question Rebecca's Christian values and even her dedication to her children and grandchildren.

His words still echo in my head, and I must share them again.

During sentencing, Judge Faruqui looked at Rebecca and scolded her by saying, "I don’t know why being the J6 Praying Grandmother is more important than being an actual grandmother." He then said, "Your faith is being misplaced right now."

**Faruqui, a member of the Board of Advisors of Muslim American Public Service, took shots at Rebecca's Christian faith, which was not appropriate in any setting.**

Yet Rebecca stood fast by responding, "**While I respect you, I answer to a higher judge**.”

As Americans and as Christians, we must help Rebecca meet her deadline and pay this fine, **[so please donate today so we can fully focus on our appeal](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)** – **which I will take to the Supreme Court of the United States if I have to.**

**[Please donate to help Rebecca now.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)**

We must help Rebecca Lavrenz. She is one of us. She is a typical American who loves her country and is willing to fight for it. However, because she entered the Capital on the wrong day and caused no harm, the Biden/Harris regime has targeted her as a person who poses "a threat to future acts of political violence."

Is the Biden/Harris Administration THAT terrified of a little 72-year-old grandmother, or are they sending a message to the rest of us?

**You know the answer, and WE ARE NOT AFRAID!**

Like Rebecca, I answer to a higher judge, and I'm sure you do as well, so please, **[let’s come together for this Christian American and help her get through this by donating today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)**

I appreciate your support for Rebecca and your help in her legal fight.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

P.S. Rebecca has until September 12th to pay this outrageous fine. So please, **[donate all that you can today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsjzGvnTAMhX-N2UDEgQADQ1tEh0rd31SZxLybKgm8kDx0--sr0FWnjuf487EP-d3Z9TlC9xUQH9YcgAjyCyB-vJ0-5t_-x_fy7emW8kP99O01xW-AmJ47_0NfKRV7su5yu6kwo1xN3RQ8ig5brPuh6YrHqNWgTc_cdlop6oQQ7WJWLQclibRYCztijU091EKoBgVWwzL0bb-uPfUseVXQ1PedijxHq0kc6aQYt81XevOFGx8p7cf92Aw4H6xz5Oq0IbK5CMA5ULJbIFfqLRzJpvySjs4yB7uFi9Eul44-I4c_pWEyzgYu_VLeCSDnnPyvY8tRM8jpvzSguiDPxmYPcro2bydxvPQZxcvQ5Hey7wHk5BdARX7LIYGcsC3iaPbTOmcP1UFTv9_dr6afI_4NAAD__0vikKg)**

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE

THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kLFy6yAQRb9m6ayB1QpQQfH8PEqRieu4RALFZMCSQYrGf5-x46S9u3v2zLVpjmG8GVB7QDwHVwAR6n-AeD1tKa-f6fVld7rFfneVx9Tcp_gfEJfb7P9Wn5TKJxviPVUH5kw9Ok7MG6GwQa5bUuxsvBJNT5qkplbrWozOkeZCSqdabcmyYJAj8ZYLIQkFVm3f6kaPo7ba136UQPzxp7LJ5zBYUZbN5jxNqRqmxKI5L8tcHmIdYLflqbqsQ_Rr-TkbpgTYPZUBu7L2ZchhXsJ0KYDdenkmvYe6e1RSH9753i9Hcm8sGzdvIcZQpALiH79M9mXwOwAA__91-GdR)

name: Jesse James Mullen
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
body:
Hey folks, It’s been a whirlwind of a campaign so far, and we’re so close to the end. But we’re not quite there yet. We’ve still got two months here to win this race, and we know we’re within striking distance of winning this thing. We just need to put our heads down and bring this home. | | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=b412532c1d504d13bff872e8eabdd85a&_e=mGw4cPcj-Cbt-wvT2j9xKhAs_V97FHYqCn8Hwm-KFYQtWuj-wdE_80tqPJqRJlennsTB0I-_MRBTct5j00DgOb9ixYJrEMLcvcFgZg0tM_DCN-6UsSerhrKyfBp3JStBQcsD0TrbQPDV67DYWX2qlnF7luhDh9dWp32rnc7pa6w11xBaD09hO-3jqFf9y3PILGe3hpEnzmhFf534no0EbIZ1POhWtYSdoC-LmAGzP-tIkY0rW_XxAX3RZqGSJI3SGJUWKpRT4Ebe6dkgt6jL1TfAN0ofMIhmEcG5v3rctHL4llmcilM6aLfYegv4jKEOgqgNdL98OBb1xGVMxekG5HRN60rdiG7DVenSjmGlWUQ6K84ivb01BOzotTzi0PwIcQ8W7fbo6RrLCYXmQGwoTQ%3D%3D) Folks, It’s been a whirlwind of a campaign so far, and we’re so close to the end. But we’re not quite there yet. We’ve still got two months here to win this race, and we know we’re within striking distance of winning this thing. We just need to put our heads down and bring this home. But I wanted to take a quick break from the campaign for a second and express my gratitude to you for being a big part of our team. Whether you joined us months ago, weeks ago, or just yesterday – each of you is critical to our success. [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=b412532c1d504d13bff872e8eabdd85a&_e=mGw4cPcj-Cbt-wvT2j9xKhAs_V97FHYqCn8Hwm-KFYQtWuj-wdE_80tqPJqRJlennsTB0I-_MRBTct5j00DgOb9ixYJrEMLcvcFgZg0tM_DCN-6UsSerhrKyfBp3JStBQcsD0TrbQPDV67DYWX2qlnF7luhDh9dWp32rnc7pa6w11xBaD09hO-3jqFf9y3PILGe3hpEnzmhFf534no0EbIZ1POhWtYSdoC-LmAGzP-tIkY0rW_XxAX3RZqGSJI3S_8YZ0WYcAhQG9rBL162a7J5mUzEotuY10mflexF1JAbnDfLAdjUlF_MN3EauAIJPORpfjfqEEt5y5iHIu1aUx8sZTzaih8zNrEu3RWzHGACa8mJYKeUZEvg_zI1yogmb5fLGW7LhFV5H2n4Fbv-yFg%3D%3D) Many thanks to our supporters in Jefferson County I am inspired by your passion and commitment to continuing our state’s proud tradition of election integrity. Our shared belief in the values of democracy will carry us through this campaign and into the bright future of Montana. It’s only getting busier from here. Please stay engaged, spread the word, and rally your friends and family to join our team. All the best, Jesse James Mullen P.S. [**We can only win this race if we have the resources to do so. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Truths from Revelation
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWeJ0PdWNq

Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeJ0PdWNq

Hello
Friend,
Do you
ever despair that Jesus will never return?
When we
all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we
all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!
The words
of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to
be glorious!
But
between now and then, how should we live? What does God's Word
say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ...
what should our response be?

When I
have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation,
which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark
days.
And
today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the
book of Revelation entitled Final Conquest.
Final
Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's
all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event
in human history.
This book
will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want
you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as
never before - you'll be encouraged!

With your
generous donation to Pathway to Victory-- to help keep our
ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and
viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of Final
Conquest for free!
You can
make your most generous donation here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1
One day
soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings
and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.
Until
that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working
together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.

Sincerely,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We can’t stop now.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
I wanted to thank you for your help over the last few days. We sent a lot of emails, and a lot of texts. But thanks to you we just put up our strongest month of fundraising of the entire campaign last month.
At any other time we’d take a couple days off and let you enjoy the Labor Day weekend — and I still hope you will. But with millions being spent against me in Arizona as we speak, and with our final quarterly FEC deadline looming at the end of the month, we can’t take our foot off the gas.
After the end of this month, we are legally required to report out how much we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received.
With less than 40 days until ballots drop in Arizona, we have to show strength this month. So, please:
[**I am asking you to make a donation to my campaign to start this official FEC month off on the right foot. Use this link if you can chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept24.kTsNbj&refcode=em240901-1-90&t=1&akid=2997%2E734936%2EqmFEMh)

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: 65 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here's what's coming up
#
Peter,
**We only have 65 days until November 5th.** That means we only have 65 days to reach Missourians in every corner of the state about Lucas’ plans to fight for working families, secure reproductive freedoms, and end our country’s broken status quo as Missouri’s U.S. Senator.
We’ll be doing a slew of events and rallies to meet voters and get fired up about this year’s election. We’ll keep working hard to expose the corruption that Josh Hawley has committed as Senator. **We will do everything in our power to take back this Senate seat for real Missourians, but we can’t do it without you.**
[**So we’re asking you, Peter — can you please help us by donating $10, $15, or anything at all to our campaign today? Lucas is counting on real people like you to fund this campaign, and your support is what makes our chances of winning this election possible.**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69968?refcode=em20240901-7514&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7514%2E614464%2E82sSRQ)

name: Ryan Busse
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUSSE FOR MONTANA • DEMOCRAT • PO BOX 8537 • KALISPELL, MT 59904
body:
Last night we absolutely crushed our end of August fundraising goal.

Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=f9KbqbRzmpKWRgjo%2Fi9TM5k1I3ilGW22L5SoREmEslQ13YW3qrlRXVWq0slgpMWpZtILcGtHdE5xuIHNbCmjAVoxswhcQd1A5n8FA%2FuO1KCis91Wms4AsrbD3U6B6PMTlrd%2FCjnqAoajD%2FQZ5jVcljscFH4ZRxOKF8syEXaZTNsdBAZ5JyfCKvS3SM0BIYzKuRTdpqEoBO0vjjcHYXE%2Bftd%2Bsi%2Fm1Z9fVQcam1NSesgA%2FZF95VofKlEJ1vtLm7FoFwGuLSgpaeRVqSJFsGMJtZ5ofRtO%2FFNxDraSWmstcGlijbGpx6OOHoDf36hqFsn5dd1vsBj8d5Xv0vxNCaS6IpCUHRbEbyaB0fVim8lvULZ2NPvDwqM1JBF94KP%2Bv%2FeANAFIB7NZKl%2BSusV1zxA9r9%2FZCo1hqOYiE%2FKxcLgx%2BrUkGJkQPPS%2BYRi9WortXhEk)
---
| |
---
Peter, Anyone who is on the ground in Montana knows we can win. But taking on a multi-billionaire and self-serving politician like Greg Gianforte is no easy challenge. This guy has practically endless money to throw at attack ads towards me and Raph, lie about his property tax hikes, and jet-set fly across the country. All of that is only more proof of how disconnected he is from Montanans. It just fuels us to campaign harder. **Last night we absolutely crushed our August fundraising goal, and are barreling at full speed toward the November election.** Thank you for supporting Raph, myself, and our Montana Movement in this fight for our home. This Labor Day weekend, let us be reminded of the power of solidarity — be it at the workplace or on the campaign trail — standing together, united for shared progress and prosperity. Just as countless unions and working people have fought for safe working conditions, a paycheck that could pay the bills, and the right to organize against corporate greed, **we see Gianforte’s deep pockets and we counter it with unity and hope.** For our state, our community, and our future. History will look back on us for securing our freedoms in the place we love, and I’m proud to have you in my corner. Thank you, Peter, and have a fantastic Labor Day weekend. Sincerely, Ryan

---

It’s these leaders who will have the most direct effect on communities like yours. But state legislative campaigns are constantly overlooked and underfunded. In an ultra-competitive presidential election year, our candidates are competing for press, volunteers, ad space, and donors against races at the top of the ticket. **That’s where you come in:** **By chipping in $25, $50, or even just $7, you can give state Democrats the resources they need to compete this November. With smaller budgets and campaign staff, your donation will go furthest at the state level. ** [Will you help lead the charge with a donation of $7 or more to build Democratic power in places like your community? clean_body: In an ultra-competitive presidential election year, our candidates are competing for press, volunteers, ad space, and donors against races at the top of the ticket. | | | | | ---|--- President Obama said it best: State legislators make decisions that impact your life the most – from the roads you drive on, to the lessons taught in our classrooms. It’s these leaders who will have the most direct effect on communities like yours. But state legislative campaigns are constantly overlooked and underfunded. In an ultra-competitive presidential election year, our candidates are competing for press, volunteers, ad space, and donors against races at the top of the ticket. That’s where you come in: By chipping in $25, $50, or even just $7, you can give state Democrats the resources they need to compete this November. With smaller budgets and campaign staff, your donation will go furthest at the state level. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let’s do this. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I can’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=7345%2E5257348%2EecuraR)
Hi Derek,
I wanted to set this moment aside to say thank you.
You’ve responded to our requests for help at every deadline.
After every attack.
At every call to action.
Leaving us prepared for the _many_ fights ahead.
September means it’s crunch time for this election. The campaign is here in full force. Volunteers are on the phones making critical calls to get out the vote. And we need you more than ever.
This month will be incredibly busy. The first presidential debate between Donald Trump and Vice President Kamala Harris is next week. The final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline before Election Day comes right after.
Now is the time to roll up our sleeves, connect with voters, and do what we can to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot in California and beyond. That way we can flip the House, hold the Senate, and win the presidency.
Together, we’ll do just that.
Thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals and uplifting this grassroots movement.
**I couldn’t do it without you.**
– Adam
P.S. One of the biggest ways you can help our campaign kick off the month strong is by starting a weekly recurring gift. From now through Election Day, you’ll automatically pitch in any amount you choose — multiplying the impact of your gift and helping our team plan ahead. **[Derek, you can click here to start a recurring gift today!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4737?refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=7345%2E5257348%2EecuraR)**
_P.P.S.**[If you can’t donate weekly, giving one time is just fine too!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=sept2024_abs_em.a1Ivk6&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=7345%2E5257348%2EecuraR)** Every dollar and every donation counts between now and Election Day._
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sept2024_abs_em.p0j6ot&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=7345%2E5257348%2EecuraR)

name: Dovid Efune
subject: The New York Times Lied About the Supreme Court
body:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important... | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=d556e90a5c2f45db9b1b771641a2ecaf&_t=xrn9cx_QXmnHQp3XzJf67-MjdhqTEaKCCarRAOZCXbkxV1hjrLWIdMmf1EiuM9CKHO-86NCKtvuhKKprV7d9-oJa-0qcd8dpazXiVFhKqTDExWQl5xEF-cw-urnXuskp)_
---
|
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d556e90a5c2f45db9b1b771641a2ecaf&_e=OJ5FSIP-Sh_36hdn7Pj6G9s6MJJidYMiP2SFLUDrlkUQ4xXA1K7hqs-cydeHB5P8aE2IC_Rl04H-n6vfg9O4hqE6lTpOASpvtQqsbgBPOhiPAf2vN-XhIQQriDnkeytajgeE1Bm7pKeFoUMibWYwuWdLv-DdzD894yBXn0j-3Hi1pwbHIemJkd4Tq5f-TOjWJDltdyD_iMPK1tROBuqqpi_E5RcL_JuTLrIYczUZWvWHG7kVxfQGfM59jmp4_ch2Er-6M2KJOR6kLCIvIifWTKxd0dC9aMMT8t61pT_AOXIUmsuWgVVUig3Agg_TA_vv1QTsKzyoGboqhc0NPlkFUbbTcaI-vv3Mi1Kb9SjRvqnXMYamagK2TSrszqpPN56wHhmMAkSNuSGwsH9kJVPG84udiZVkwfvG_Uyz2EQ-iT0%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal.

Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d556e90a5c2f45db9b1b771641a2ecaf&_e=OJ5FSIP-Sh_36hdn7Pj6G9s6MJJidYMiP2SFLUDrlkUQ4xXA1K7hqs-cydeHB5P8aE2IC_Rl04H-n6vfg9O4hqE6lTpOASpvtQqsbgBPOhiPAf2vN-XhIQQriDnkeytajgeE1Bm7pKeFoUMibWYwuWdLv-DdzD894yBXn0j-3Hi1pwbHIemJkd4Tq5f-TOjWJDltdyD_iMPK1tROBuqqpi_E5RcL_JuTLrIYczUZWvWHG7kVxfQGfM59jmp4_ch2Er-6M2KJOR6kLCIvIifWTOPB4YBcOj9cWZ0cSjnzZPoUGhziUymvZlJcnwR40B79t8CkJUYOISEr27q8PKr4fOc_sK4d4m0yXPNMS6Sz3chNIXMFHMSVgW0eAlPDCikkE7de4aW0H7oEw8ikdkZdNB4-J3y4LlCvlfmXVlBteh4%3D) **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.**

Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him.

I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief.

I believe that you believe that too.

I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment.

The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. **[**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d556e90a5c2f45db9b1b771641a2ecaf&_e=OJ5FSIP-Sh_36hdn7Pj6G9s6MJJidYMiP2SFLUDrlkUQ4xXA1K7hqs-cydeHB5P8aE2IC_Rl04H-n6vfg9O4hqE6lTpOASpvtQqsbgBPOhiPAf2vN-XhIQQriDnkeytajgeE1Bm7pKeFoUMibWYwuWdLv-DdzD894yBXn0j-3Hi1pwbHIemJkd4Tq5f-TOjWJDltdyD_iMPK1tROBuqqpi_E5RcL_JuTLrIYczUZWvWHG7kVxfQGfM59jmp4_ch2Er-6M2KJOR6kLCIvIifWTGkvHC_lq7MSHLk2WJg7bSqkfwfUA_cYVXbn-vs7GLKJQS0xHFVHXVYOo7foCpdwvta4V9m58rh9mUc2RhrPhyBpDK8Svpa2B0EuzodRey8AcT4tmdRMa38o3rmpokYOf0wWPjX-34u09V2JygQ78Fw%3D)**

I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn?

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d556e90a5c2f45db9b1b771641a2ecaf&_e=OJ5FSIP-Sh_36hdn7Pj6G9s6MJJidYMiP2SFLUDrlkUQ4xXA1K7hqs-cydeHB5P8aE2IC_Rl04H-n6vfg9O4hqE6lTpOASpvtQqsbgBPOhiPAf2vN-XhIQQriDnkeytajgeE1Bm7pKeFoUMibWYwuWdLv-DdzD894yBXn0j-3Hi1pwbHIemJkd4Tq5f-TOjWJDltdyD_iMPK1tROBuqqpi_E5RcL_JuTLrIYczUZWvWHG7kVxfQGfM59jmp4_ch2Er-6M2KJOR6kLCIvIifWTMEUo5R1A8w5RCrm3Ug_XRSci0BapSHNFcKY4dQ2pQ9tcW-tiqxmg28fbD3rY2lwTMG_fmoT7LGdETXq6x1Id_nbAd0sqLN3HSnK4EWl9SE2k6eXqA3IsnO9ciM4-9QX8X8hCNUQUgesd9exc2nF60s%3D)

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson

American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important... | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | | Fellow Patriot, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. .

name: Josef Lipp
subject: Say NO to pharmacies dispensing the abortion pill
body:
Did you know that major chains like Walmart, Costco, Kroger, and Albertsons are under pressure to start dispensing the abortion pill in their pharmacies?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=2407df41781d42ebacfbca58eba65222&_t=lbifDPoimCKdBFScAWlHd7hdfY1wDI3NAS1Vy8-VeHv14HMrjxp8MPshPinH2TL6iJUVE59y3YorNdLl95h97I4PnZobZQaxUA2vQsIvyQM5uSkLSTzaa7hm3N1SHFi6)_
---
[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2407df41781d42ebacfbca58eba65222&_e=g0l65kOYLOH-iS-yUTz1r6pQTEnq28eFFgjvaraV6S8v0XvAIZe4sK421NiPThGt_74LUVDprQIl-naNJEjKyyQXWDfnGVSXYZP1uuecySX1TqiJZHS7DkXFcqM6LWv3J8P7H_Gwz27MJHFT4CHQJK_QjYdqN8uQFyqVxZKoCEWc7qph9_fsFXlCz-pR8znLLQbSBYN7mFRd5bAh-JVnahdwvHxEBcRlbXCz_x1AyMlKJFMkTzbgpp6088kZNVOnGgdETl03_auIqcVlzBCzM0FvXXobpv3IX-hPukQW6eXTHBfaepsBBMmwd--vXzu9Tz-LZAjktbNWDGccmb_dRn0Rtevi3tAqQSFkilO9cz-pFOJBkBjKyuQYCGSunTM6_Vfxv52LGbeOqM_X7CexKQ%3D%3D)
#
Friend of life,

Did you know that major chains like Walmart, Costco, Kroger, and Albertsons are under pressure to start dispensing the abortion pill in their pharmacies? This alarming trend could soon make your local pharmacy a distributor of drugs specifically designed to end the lives of preborn children.

NYC Comptroller Brad Lander recently issued letters to the CEOs of these major corporations, insisting that they become certified to dispense these deadly pills. Government officials, especially those with long-standing ties to organizations like Planned Parenthood, should not be able to demand this of our pharmacies.

Over 600,000 preborn babies were tragically aborted by the abortion pill last year. This number is only expected to rise if major pharmacies agree to dispense these drugs. Corporations that participate in this are complicit in what can only be described as a genocide of future generations.

Even now, pharmacies like Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid that have chosen to distribute the abortion pill are facing backlash from customers who want nothing to do with the abortion industry. We do not want our local grocery stores and pharmacies to become marketplaces of death.

By urging these major chains to resist the pressure, we can protect our communities and ensure that our pharmacies remain places of health, not places of harm.

Will you sign Live Action's petition and urge Walmart, Costco, Kroger, and other major chains to resist dispensing the abortion pill?
**[https://www.liveaction.org/resist-pressure-to-dispense-the-abortion-pill/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2407df41781d42ebacfbca58eba65222&_e=g0l65kOYLOH-iS-yUTz1r6pQTEnq28eFFgjvaraV6S8v0XvAIZe4sK421NiPThGt_74LUVDprQIl-naNJEjKyyQXWDfnGVSXYZP1uuecySX1TqiJZHS7DkXFcqM6LWv3J8P7H_Gwz27MJHFT4CHQJK_QjYdqN8uQFyqVxZKoCEWc7qph9_fsFXlCz-pR8znLLQbSBYN7mFRd5bAh-JVnahdwvHxEBcRlbXCz_x1AyMl6J2o0j1zKbB67_CbejBYOf8gmRzb-dcjLu_KyIzkvcVFBSFMUNCssN8mAp5_k8kYt4PoO_O0EMqfrOl25I0dJae-OQAblMGeOIRemlJf29Wg5CX4R8skTBz_-iaPTZ2bhvBDmcHWDPFDpOXppc7terbgUWmepD4r_vgX7uN1u1Q%3D%3D)**

Let's make it clear that we oppose the distribution of the abortion pill at our pharmacies.

Thank you for standing with us in the fight to embrace life and protect the most vulnerable.

For Life,

Josef Lipp
**Chief Operating Officer**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=2407df41781d42ebacfbca58eba65222&_e=g0l65kOYLOH-iS-yUTz1r6pQTEnq28eFFgjvaraV6S8v0XvAIZe4sK421NiPThGt_74LUVDprQIl-naNJEjKyyQXWDfnGVSXYZP1uuecySX1TqiJZHS7DkXFcqM6LWv3J8P7H_Gwz27MJHFT4CHQJK_QjYdqN8uQFyqVxZKoCEWc7qph9_fsFXlCz-pR8znLLQbSBYN7mFRd5bAh-JVnahdwvHxEBcRlbXCz_x1AyMlOnbwKcMdYUj4UTkusiWEceYDSI6SSHotx088USqJvjhr7-8YpQXpJSSrELhMZBlMLuXWvXv9E_g2aPRJA20PNbIE4N-db78-tLqQK1ytVhAUvHhg5A3uLhfkzkSm2se7YglKTGKh4m74UDgb_kaj2PHMIPtY6gLLsyWZf20G34A%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201
#

name: Jill Stein for President
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
We proved Newsweek even more wrong

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_1_newsweek_resend&n=1)
---
Peter, Remember the Newsweek article from August that showed a Jill Stein ballot access map that was so **_WRONG_**(see above)? Well, they haven't fully corrected it - states like Idaho, where we turned in signatures months ago, are still left off. And in the last week Jill and Butch have had the good news that they will be on in Georgia, Massachusetts, Alabama, Connecticut, and Virginia. That brings the total of confirmed ballot access lines to 38 states, we are still petitioning in Kentucky and Rhode Island, and we have write-in status in 8 states. **This means the Stein/Ware ticket is expected to have _517 potential electoral votes_ , nearly double the required 270 potential electoral votes to send Jill and Butch to the White House. ** But as of sending this email we are just _**$3,000 short**_ of what we need to pay our ballot access bills, and barring any other legal challenges from the anti-democratic party, this could be our _**final ask**_ for supporters like you to pitch in for ballot access. **If everyone pitches in today, we will raise enough to reach our goal and make Newsweek's map even more outdated. Peter, let's start out September strong and close out the fight for ballot access by closing the gap in the thermometer now!**
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_1_newsweek_resend&n=2)
---

subject: a quick thank you.

body:
I hope you’ll read this, Peter

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91982186/495607931/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjE0ZjBmNS04OTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_vDXTBgTPLQ1fCeaOWzHTu8Xmcpf1f1ExmxOM8BF9Q=)
---
Peter, I wanted to send you a quick note because I needed to thank you.

I know we’ve emailed you a lot over the past few days, but I have some exciting news:

**We just had our most successful month yet.**

And since I don’t do a single minute of call time, **the success of August is fully thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter.**

It’s clearer than ever that our movement has real power, Peter.

So as we look back on a wonderful month, we need to look ahead at the future - we can't slow down with just over 2 months until Election Day!

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4052%2E552475%2ESIhhl6)
David McCormick isn’t beating the out-of-state allegations any time soon, Peter.
FIRST, McCormick called a large cup from Wawa a “Big Gulp” — something anybody who knows Wawa knows they don’t sell.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240901-2&refcode2=4052_552475_SIhhl6&akid=4052%2E552475%2ESIhhl6)
NEXT, McCormick’s team picked a fight with Hersheypark after they misquoted their ticket prices.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240901-2&refcode2=4052_552475_SIhhl6&akid=4052%2E552475%2ESIhhl6)
THEN, McCormick mistook a story in the local news from Philadelphia, Mississippi as being from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240901-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240901-2&refcode2=4052_552475_SIhhl6&akid=4052%2E552475%2ESIhhl6)

name: Eric
subject: Thanks, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Hey team,

It’s Eric again. I’m reaching out today because I’m looking at the numbers right now, and we had an incredible August fundraising haul, thanks to you. We’re now in an even better position to win re-election, keep the House blue, and send Kamala Harris to the White House in November . Without your constant support, we wouldn’t be able to stand up to the GOP and fight to make lives better for everyday Americans, so it truly means a lot to me.

Listen, I just know the momentum we’re seeing right now is making Trump lose his nerve, which is exactly what we want to see this close to the election. Donald and his band of MAGA Republicans are itching to wage an assault on our civil rights, our safety, our democracy, and our economy if they win in November, as shown by their weird far-right blueprint, Project 2025. We cannot allow that.

But thankfully, everyday Americans like you are standing up and telling them that we won’t put up with their hate, greed, or corruption. It's because of the work that this team is doing that a Democratic victory in November is possible, up and down the ballot.

With your continued support, I know we can come out on top.

Thanks again, team.

— Eric

clean_body: Thank you! | = | Dear friends, I am so thankful and excited to share that we hit our August End-of-Month Fundraising goal. Whether you’ve been a loyal donor for years, or just pitched in your first $5 — thank you. And if you can’t afford to donate right now, but still open our emails, follow along with the recent news, and vote — thank you too! We have a lot of work ahead of us to send Kamala Harris to the White House and ensure that she has a Democratic U.S. House Majority. There are enough swing seats in California alone to take back the U.S. House, and we are mobilizing in every single one. But we couldn’t do it without you! So, please, have a wonderful rest of your Labor Day weekend and then let’s get back to work next week. Yours, Camille P.S. At the end of September we will face our most critical FEC Filing Deadline of the election yet. If you weren’t able to donate in August, = | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

The situation is dire – this can’t be overstated. Hot off the press – Sherrod Brown is the TOP Senate Democrat fundraiser in the entire country. He raised over $5 MILLION online in July alone. This is absolutely insane and over $1 million more than his closest Senate colleague. No one can comprehend the depths Sherrod Brown will go to squeeze every last dollar out of his swampy coastal elite liberal donors. His July haul alone represents an 80% INCREASE over his June total. It’s clear he’s going to continue having massive month-over-month increases from now until Election Day. Sherrod Brown has the entrenched liberal D.C. establishment and the fringe Left-of-Lenin radicals working overtime to ensure he has six more years in office. If they win, we’re looking at continual open borders, higher taxes, socialist economic takeovers, crushing inflation, and out-of-control crime, the likes of which this country has never seen. We’re fighting the toughest uphill battle of any race in the country right now, but I don’t need billionaires and dark money funding this campaign –I need you. Please, Peter, I’m begging you – don’t let Sherrod Brown buy this seat. Thank you, and God bless. Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What I learned from President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91983945/495614261/-491556796?refcode=240901&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjYmI5Mi04ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDKxuS8nLWzD9LD-Bw1jVUU7vZb-TT_hzrPKrfwWBzE=)
---
Friends - I want to share a story about someone who, more than anyone, taught me the importance of listening and accountability. It’s Barack Obama. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91983946/495614263/-534565681?refcode=240901&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjYmI5Mi04ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDKxuS8nLWzD9LD-Bw1jVUU7vZb-TT_hzrPKrfwWBzE=) I was in the White House the first day he took office in 2009, serving as a part of his national security staff. I staffed his meetings in the Situation Room and briefed him in the Oval Office. Later, I was honored to be nominated by him to serve in the Pentagon. Despite his effortless charm in public, President Obama was a very tough boss. I don’t think I’ve ever had a tougher boss than President Obama. He’s brilliant, and he’s got a lawyer’s training where he’ll grill you with difficult questions, one after another. I learned pretty quickly to be prepared, because he was going to make sure you knew your stuff. What’s more, he was going to hold you accountable to what you said. If you told him a fact or a plan, you’d better deliver on it. If you didn’t know something, you should say that and not try to fudge your way through it. That’s exactly the approach I try to take in Congress. I try my best to know the details, make thoughtful decisions, and be transparent about what I know and don’t know. Because I’ll never forget the lesson President Obama taught me: you better say what you mean, and mean what you say. [**That’s the kind of Senator I’ll be. And I’m building a grassroots movement in that same spirit to bring accountability to the U.S. Senate. With that in mind, will you chip in $25 to Serve America and my campaign help us get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91983948/495614264/-534565681?refcode=240901&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjYmI5Mi04ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDKxuS8nLWzD9LD-Bw1jVUU7vZb-TT_hzrPKrfwWBzE=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91983950/495614266/1036952885?amount=18&refcode=240901&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFjYmI5Mi04ZDY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDKxuS8nLWzD9LD-Bw1jVUU7vZb-TT_hzrPKrfwWBzE= "https://secure.actblue.com/")
---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I wanted to pass along a thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
I need to say thank you, Peter.
This is a tough race. Flipping one of the most competitive seats in the country means a lot of hard work, which means a lot of time, energy, and support from folks like you.
I’m in this because I believe we can make a better Arizona by flipping this seat blue and taking back the House. And I know you are, too.
So thank you.
In Congress, I will fight for affordable housing, better jobs, climate action, water security, Social Security and Medicare, and abortion rights. And I will put the folks back home first, every single time.
This is only possible because of your incredible support.
We have two months to win this race. You can help us make that happen by donating here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act]
Onwards!
Kirsten
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act]
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_090124_ThankYou_act]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep24?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep24?amount=]Hey there! It’s Dr. Raul Ruiz. I wanted to extend a personal thank you for your support ahead of our August deadline yesterday at midnight (excuse the handwriting — we doctors aren’t exactly known for our penmanship! 😉)

Thanks to you, we hit our monthly fundraising goal for August, and I couldn’t be more grateful. Consistently hitting our fundraising goals is the only way to ensure victory against our MAGA extremist opponent this November, and you’ve been a key part of that effort.

But here’s the thing: The real fight is only just beginning. With just over two months left until the polls open on Election Day, we’ve got to ramp up our fundraising efforts to prepare for whatever my opponent and national Republican groups might throw our way in the home stretch.

We can’t afford to slow down for a single second in these final 64 days, so I need to ask: Will you chip in $ or any amount possible to help us kickstart our September fundraising? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep24?amount=]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep24?amount=]

Thanks again for all you’ve done to support my campaign. Dedicated supporters like you are the most important members of this team.

— Dr. Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

What if I told you that Republicans only need to flip one more seat to win back the Senate majority and enact their far-right agenda? And that my seat in Wisconsin is one of their top targets?
Or that Senate Republicans recently confirmed that a megamillionaire California bank owner, Eric Hovde, will run against me to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat red?
What if you knew that Eric Hovde promised to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to flip Wisconsin red?
Keeping Wisconsin blue is one of our last lines of defense against a GOP takeover of the Senate. **We can only take on GOP spending and defend Wisconsin if we have folks like you on our side, helping us hit our 2024 fundraising goals with just a few dollars at a time.**
[_**Now that you have all of that in mind, will you split a donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91984715/495617113/64098781?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240901_2_1_Baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlM2M0NGI3LThmNjgtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D7hASCaDb2gy2ripr6Chr9iCfryjSV-Qg43iANNkx94=)

Friend, Election Day is barely more than two months away, and our race is one of the closest and most consequential Congressional contests in the nation. **With so much on the line, it really means the world to have your support.** So many of you stepped up and chipped in whatever you could to help us meet our August fundraising goal last week. We're not exaggerating when we say that every dollar makes a difference. Your contributions enable us to keep printing and delivering our union-made yard signs, making phone calls and knocking doors, and our ads running on TV and online. **I'm proud and grateful to have you with me, friend. Together, I know we can win for our Northwest Ohio community.** With you, — Marcy **[Volunteer with our team](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91984729/495617156/1569868534?ms=240901_mk_augthanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI3ODRjZi04ZjY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MC4GaY55FO7eXJMk8WaGU1_eq20L7xEYSvIEtnU_nso=&emci=bb6163d7-8266-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&emdi=24b784cf-8f68-ef11-991a-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2814549)**

Friend, I’m giving you VIP access to pre-order my Signed MAGA Poster. I’ve been very busy on the campaign trail and only had time to sign a few at Trump Headquarters. That means just a handful will be available to the public on Monday... Last time I released signed items, high demand nearly crashed the website! Some patriots missed their chance to own a once-in-a-lifetime piece of history. So PLEASE, don’t make the same mistake! Thank you, Donald J. New Hampshire means everything to me. _It’s the first place that ever felt like home._
I’m proud to be raising my sons here alongside my wife, and I’m thrilled to have Annie Kuster’s endorsement to become NH-02’s next representative along with so many local community leaders'.
**I’ll fight day in and day out to continue her legacy of service.**
From getting corporate money out of politics to bringing down the cost of prescription drugs, working families will always have a seat at the table if I’m elected.
But MAGA Republicans have a target on NH-02, and they want nothing more than to see our campaign fall short so they can keep the House. If we’re going to fight back, we need grassroots donors like you on the team.
[**So please, chip in whatever you can to help fund our Get Out the Vote efforts. Even $5 makes a difference in a race this close!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91985076/495618719/-1329575654?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.09.01_GOTV_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DU_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTIyNTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1YzE1MzgtOTE2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dkRW4Au4vSkn-UcswaaNrGDTpFBoU7n2Bpton97UC6M=)

We need to knock on more doors, talk to more undecided voters, and make sure folks have a plan to vote! = | | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = New Hampshire means everything to me. It’s the first place that ever felt like home. I’m proud to be raising my sons here alongside my wife, and I’m thrilled to have Annie Kuster’s endorsement to become NH-02’s next representative along with so many local community leaders'. I’ll fight day in and day out to continue her legacy of service. From getting corporate money out of politics to bringing down the cost of prescription drugs, working families will always have a seat at the table if I’m elected. But MAGA Republicans have a target on NH-02, and they want nothing more than to see our campaign fall short so they can keep the House. body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I'd like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

**[But if you only have a minute, all I'll ask is that you donate $5 _(matched to become $15)_ to help defend our Senate majority and make a difference for our Democratic agenda.](https://go.dscc.org/go/19655?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240901-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240901-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=17027%2E9716520%2EuoDnec)**

**I've said before that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. $5 may not sound like a lot, but I've seen time and time again that each of us pitching in a little will make a BIG difference together -- and right now, my friends at the DSCC need that exact kind of help from Democrats like us.**

Here's why: Republicans are just two seats away from retaking the Senate, and they're willing to spend millions to erase our _razor-thin_ Democratic majority. The future of our country could be decided by critical races in battleground states like Nevada, Ohio, or Pennsylvania.

We can't leave anything to chance. Everything from health care to climate change is on the ballot and Democrats simply can't win without your support to **out-raise** , **out-organize** , and **out-campaign** the Republicans.

**This request is so important that for a limited time, a group of donors will _personally_ triple your gift. **Look, Special Counsel Jack Smith REFUSES to back down in the fight to hold Trump accountable:** [ ]() With MAGA Republicans furious and the case against Trump hanging on by a thread, _we need EVERY. SINGLE. DEMOCRAT. to stand with Jack Smith!_ **[__Listen, Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him. Sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith in his quest to hold Donald Trump accountable »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-smith24?source=FFR_20240901_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21971%2E4449941%2EQRklNf)** | [WE URGENTLY NEED 30,000 TOP DEMOCRATS TO STEP UP: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH JACK SMITH »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-smith24?source=FFR_20240901_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21971%2E4449941%2EQRklNf)
---
Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel.

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from every angle in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.
**[__Let’s set an example: Nobody threatens good, honest public servants like Jack Smith. Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith in his quest to hold Donald Trump accountable »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-smith24?source=FFR_20240901_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21971%2E4449941%2EQRklNf)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Another candidate turning Texas blue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Let’s get Averie elected!
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240901&t=1&akid=1132%2E587540%2EAzUuLl)
Peter, Leaders We Deserve is supporting an incredible young candidate named **Averie Bishop** and she is running**** for**TX HD-112**. Meet Averie:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240901?refcode=em20240901-1132&refcode2=1132_587540_AzUuLl&akid=1132%2E587540%2EAzUuLl)
**[Support Averie Bishop for TX HD-112 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240901?refcode=em20240901&amount=5&refcode2=1132_587540_AzUuLl&akid=1132%2E587540%2EAzUuLl)**
Averie Bishop is the daughter of a fifth-generation Texan father and a Filipino immigrant mother. She is running for Texas House District 112 because she understands the challenges of working-class families. Her parents worked multiple jobs, **so she wants to create a Texas where every family and child can believe that everything in Texas truly is bigger and better.**
She attended a Title I school in Prosper ISD, a small town with 3,000 residents in 2003. She saw firsthand how lawmakers in Austin failed her classmates and teachers. So she went on to be the first person in her family to graduate college — _and_ went on to graduate from SMU law school **so she could advocate for safer schools, affordable health care, and a brighter future for the next generation of Texans.**
In 2022, she won the title of Miss Texas and traveled across the state, reaching over 100,000 students to promote cultural respect and celebrate diversity. Her American dream starts with ensuring free, quality education and accessible reproductive health care for all.
**[Peter, Averie Bishop is at the top of our list of candidates turning Texas blue. She’s taking on a difficult fight, so she needs your support to secure this election. Can you split $5 between her campaign and Leaders We Deserve to flip House District 112 blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240901?refcode=em20240901&amount=5&refcode2=1132_587540_AzUuLl&akid=1132%2E587540%2EAzUuLl)**

Let's get Averie elected!
Thank you for supporting,
Leaders We Deserve

**Can you spare $5 to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? **
**With just over two months to go before****Election Day****,** what we do right now will determine what happens in November. I know it may not sound like much, but it’s grassroots supporters like you giving $5 or $25 at a time who are going to make the critical difference in this battleground race – not billionaire megadonors or Mitch McConnell. That’s why it’s so important we all do our part.

clean_body: what we do right now will determine what happens in November | | | = Friend, I just have to ask: Can you spare $5 to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? With just over two months to go beforeElection Day, what we do right now will determine what happens in November. As dark money groups like the Koch network spend tens of MILLIONS of dollars to flip this seat red and deliver the Senate to Mitch McConnell – the only way I can fight back is with your support. I know it may not sound like much, but it’s grassroots supporters like you giving $5 or $25 at a time who are going to make the critical difference in this battleground race – not billionaire megadonors or Mitch McConnell. That’s why it’s so important we all do our part. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91986707/495624833/478445997?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2024-09-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjkxMDNhMWQtOTY2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=upT7Pp3hWRRvfB1eFJYl9tIdKuncEWofcRf4pzMy4ek=)

clean_body: With the primary right around the corner, we need your help to continue traveling across the district and meeting with voters to spread Maggie's message. | = | Peter, Maggie is hitting the road and traveling all across NH-02 to meet with voters and talk about the key issues Granite Staters care about most. Check out what Maggie has been up to! 👇 📍 In Concord, Maggie joined friends, neighbors, and volunteers for a canvass launch to reach as many voters as possible before Primary Day! = 📍 In Coburn Hills, Maggie spoke to a group of supporters and community members to talk about the importance of this upcoming election and what’s at stake this November. = 📍 In Hanover, Maggie spent the evening having conversations with voters to talk about the issues Granite Staters care about most – protecting our fundamental freedoms, defending the future of our democracy, and building a fairer economy! = 📍 In Claremont, Maggie attended an event organized by Rep. Gary Merchant to talk to voters about her vision for a brighter future and how we can work together to get things done! = With the primary right around the corner, we need your help to continue traveling across the district and meeting with voters to spread Maggie's message. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Maggie for NH Campaign Team * | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

body:
First ballots are nearly cast. | ATTN: Fellow American,

Please don't disregard this message. We cannot afford to delay any longer.

[**_FOX NEWS:_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=879beda7031349018ea07fd74404840d&_e=01H3rNTtHS8qrV9N8fbKsNq45Zi2IxHcB7t01SsI4DV6zTkLLci8dcrgf0Y2aCzuquETFdBBzTw3z6xuR3j7GSG86J-O1v6gM3ZEOA7ADWKTBqmlcYAXvAjagqm14ygRrHrVu-WLj7Gyt27muRFCCZJ8QtyyZQUGMeTzJMeoZxCdhz1Shy2YrxhkUDkSeQTQK1N82RxgVUeD2T8G3XOXasRhT5pvrD6QAWTxgkw_HPCAKKu-2qt07sq9KVM9DcMJcTliy4poPH5CO2SoLoMwKWjht6Gb390nzGylnclGBPe0QCVHnCk3H3Xo_JLAkECE6nPKsPM-ChCA5PhC0dVZ1h-txAKCjwdD07IsXqkofPVntTWjchQTMYrJ2lagWISg34zr-d2kz6KtkML957-FmxgIcSVzgaMnGNKbfb-JrN4RUKfkQLIp9plPzgTyXf16vVu32cXirCYW73tyICoH1DOiqdYx0wFW-x0GayndRNE%3D) [**_"Election Day is approaching fast; however, most Americans will have already cast their ballots before Nov. 5"_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=879beda7031349018ea07fd74404840d&_e=01H3rNTtHS8qrV9N8fbKsNq45Zi2IxHcB7t01SsI4DV6zTkLLci8dcrgf0Y2aCzuquETFdBBzTw3z6xuR3j7GSG86J-O1v6gM3ZEOA7ADWKTBqmlcYAXvAjagqm14ygRrHrVu-WLj7Gyt27muRFCCZJ8QtyyZQUGMeTzJMeoZxCdhz1Shy2YrxhkUDkSeQTQK1N82RxgVUeD2T8G3XOXasRhT5pvrD6QAWTxgkw_HPCAKKu-2qt07sq9KVM9DcMJcTliy4poPH5CO2SoLoMwKWjht6Gb390nzGylnclGBPe0QCVHnCk3H3Xo_JLAkECE6nPKsPM-ChCA5PhC0dVZ1vHPkTx4OY_shnaiENoqH-SRm4fmoSzjwQA9BJtlzFvkbA83PIaicYpzu7LU6RBZik-sEpHlv6G3a_antgqehVxrcEObhQyk5TrK4jQEtr9fnNjk3s-lzfrylbrzYZpUBGHD8HYSOI4J0ov-tp5bUhI%3D)
The truth is, we have [**LESS THAN 30 DAYS**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=879beda7031349018ea07fd74404840d&_e=01H3rNTtHS8qrV9N8fbKsNq45Zi2IxHcB7t01SsI4DV6zTkLLci8dcrgf0Y2aCzuquETFdBBzTw3z6xuR3j7GSG86J-O1v6gM3ZEOA7ADWKTBqmlcYAXvAjagqm14ygRrHrVu-WLj7Gyt27muRFCCZJ8QtyyZQUGMeTzJMeoZxCdhz1Shy2YrxhkUDkSeQTQK1N82RxgVUeD2T8G3XOXasRhT5pvrD6QAWTxgkw_HPCAKKu-2qt07sq9KVM9DcMJcTliy4poPH5CO2SoLoMwKWjht6Gb390nzGylnclGBPe0QCVHnCk3H3Xo_JLAkECE6nPKsPM-ChCA5PhC0dVZ1sUC4XmUpyd0C8hzu-AFompg_DAaSovmoPon_Pbp05oSfKSRB6upYQhZq1q3leiauXRNPNKSlvkIl9Kg4Ha04s135qx6NlUXq41lugyd7ovdzX0Fr7U6lLABSa_U5XaIIAyEdk5_QCj4HTPYQcj4ymQ%3D) before the _FIRST_ ballots of the 2024 election are cast on September 6 as early voting begins for millions of voters!

But if _*this*_ current trend holds going into our critical September 6th deadline, we fear the worst may come to pass...

name: DNC HQ
subject: Our strategy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, we know your inbox is probably flooded with donation requests from candidates and organizations like ours. But if you have a minute, [**we’d like to explain exactly what we’ll do with your $3 contribution if you pitch in to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8) Here we go: With 65 days until Election Day, it’s clear the presidential race will come down to a few key battleground states such as Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8) You’ve probably heard that the DNC is investing millions of dollars into reaching voters in states like these. Strategic investments like these don’t just impact the presidential race. They have a powerful **multiplier effect** _(nested opportunities, as we like to call it)_ for Democrats down the ballot, too -- which is critical in our efforts to win the House and Senate and elect Democrats at _all_ levels of government. But of course, we aren’t just focused on swing states. In these final weeks, we have to reach as many voters as possible -- all over the country -- and make sure they have a plan to cast their ballots for Democrats. That’s why we’re strengthening our largest-ever voter protection program to protect against Trump and his allies’ attacks on our voting rights. It’s why we’ve made a six-figure investment in the Democrats Abroad program to register and earn the votes of the nearly 9 million Americans living and serving overseas. And it’s why we’re expanding our successful virtual organizing efforts to engage and mobilize as many volunteers as we can, so you can get involved no matter where you are. [**When you chip in $3 to support the DNC, your contribution goes directly toward funding work like this. Can we count on you to make a donation now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8)**

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8)**

Thank you so much for reading through. Let’s defend and build on the progress we’ve made.
The Democrats

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer-button?refcode=em_20240901_1151_fr&t=1&refcode2=1151_22930333_rUGMb8&akid=1151%2E22930333%2ErUGMb8)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The next generation needs this
body:
It’s a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives—for the better.| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6d6ed30d5a3e47b794032f1463c57d08&_e=kCo-UC4QpZHkEqlTIRnCGwCoJlFeUvxywWXvrAoqUEkDDiSZdaPK2i2_IgBO53-H-MFSXDfuKyJr5HrpqySt8gH6io0x2DDz8rGyuphla0mvm368cNhPcU2wOCqjDLKYuFWAC5XoYGubO8u23naly--w6X2q0-170uOWuqXQAGwb1RTBRwxmRXyr6JreufnYljsG7jBlvOF1Or4PoLe0w-BF4IH25ClofW0akQ3RnYw0g1V7XSl4yTe3-4RrrfHarI2BrIhV8rPvuoLHmI5MvYzsGolAYUozpnK8CN_1A2N3zthTSJaqvG1_LXwygKjv)
---
Peter, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Peter, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6d6ed30d5a3e47b794032f1463c57d08&_e=kCo-UC4QpZHkEqlTIRnCGwCoJlFeUvxywWXvrAoqUEkDDiSZdaPK2i2_IgBO53-H-MFSXDfuKyJr5HrpqySt8gH6io0x2DDz8rGyuphla0mvm368cNhPcU2wOCqjDLKYuFWAC5XoYGubO8u23nalyyqQpq4EyF-cWQov2oTQPkK3syz72vi5DphiOmGO11jonZMryJYqNJpTT5KZcy4qw4a5NmbZ9MoDJ2D6iEgu2dTWw_AOhwG1j3vlYMqzs8e0L6BihoYKXozGRYwCTFZD_x-_TlDw9o9UU10oWCUvn_fhzHs3LCfdgtrRebn0Bh3c)_

clean_body: It’s a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives—for the better.| | | Peter, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--for the better. Peter, over the past year, I wrote my new book,Right Wing Revolution,as a guide for a return to an America where ... We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness. We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution. We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal. We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night. We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans. Peter, I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before: It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right. It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American. It's NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves. I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE. In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
