name: =?UTF-8?Q?Governor_Larry=C2=A0Hogan?=
subject: More petty political attacks…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hogan for Maryland, Inc
body:
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
Friend,

We are better than this.

Right now, my opponent is sending Marylanders more petty–and false–political
attacks against me, and I will cut to the chase: I need your help to fight back.

<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

My opponent is using every tired negative partisan attack in the book. She’s
even going so far as to say I would “be working among the top extremists to
reverse every last Democratic effort we've made.”

Just see for yourself the kind of attacks she is sending to Marylanders
across the state:

<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
You know me, so you know these are outright lies.

In the Senate, I’ll be the critical swing vote to stand up to extremism,
bring people together, and get the country back to decency and common sense.

I will not bow down to one person or one party.

This is a perfect example of politicians playing toxic political games only
to divide us, andthis is exactly why we need to fix the mess in Washington.
CHIP IN
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
I spent eight years as governor working across the aisle to deliver bipartisan
common-sense solutions to the issues that matter to Marylanders – making life
more affordable, improving public safety and supporting first responders, and I
intend to bring the same type of leadership to Washington.

But with my opponent spending millions to spread this messaging to more
Marylanders, I need your support to push back.Will you chip in a donation to
support my campaign?
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

CHIP IN
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
The truth is, I am only in this race to fight for a better future for ALL
Marylanders andALL Americans. I’m not running to serve one party. I’m running
to fight for Maryland and fix the broken politics–just like I did as governor.

But with the attacks mounting, I need your support more than ever. Will you
consider chipping in a donation to help my campaign stay competitive?
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

CHIP IN
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
It’s not in my nature to sit back and watch the dysfunction continue without
doing what I can to roll up my sleeves and work to solve the biggest issues we
face.

For eight years, we showed how to get stuff done without getting sucked into
petty partisan games. Now, it’s time to bring this common sense approach to
Washington with your help.

Thank you for your support. I look forward to getting the opportunity to meet
with you on the campaign trail!

Thank you,
Gov. Hogan

P.S. This race is a toss-up. And that means it will be the most expensive
race I’ve ever run. The national Party machine has lined up tens of millions to
attack me, spread lies, and I need your help to push back to tell the truth.
Your donation of $100, $50, or even $25 goes a long way to helping us close the
fundraising gap.
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
Thanks for your time and support. - LH
CHIP IN
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/political-attacks-email-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240829_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

A Personal Message from Governor Larry Hogan:

<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/bio-footer-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240828_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
Hi, it’s Governor Larry Hogan.

When I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I did so with a deep resolve
to maintain the leadership style and principles that guided me during my eight
years as governor.

Fifty years ago, my father, Maryland Congressman Larry Hogan Sr. made a tough
decision. He became the first Republican to come out for the impeachment of
President Nixon. He put aside party politics and his own personal
considerations and stepped up to do the right thing for Maryland and the nation.

Today, Washington is completely broken because that kind of leadership and
willingness to put country over party has become far too rare. But it’s not in
my nature to sit back and watch the dysfunction continue without doing what I
can to roll up my sleeves and get to work.

I’m under no illusion this will be an easy road. But I’m no stranger to
uphill battles, and I know I can’t do it without your support.

I don't aspire to be a United States senator. I don’t need a title and I
don’t need a job, but I’m more concerned than ever about the direction of the
country and I have become more convinced that I can make a difference by taking
the approach and style of leadership I had during my eight years as governor to
Washington.

It’s no surprise this mindset has made me a target of the Washington
partisans. Despite early polls showing a lead, I know I’m the underdog in this
race. And that’s why your support TODAY is so crucial.

So if you can chip in a donation of $25 or more, it will go a long way in
helping me continue building a strong campaign.
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/bio-footer-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240828_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

For eight years, we proved that the toxic politics that divide our nation
didn’t need to divide our state, and we got results! Let’s get back to work
again and send a message to Washington that will be heard loud and clear across
the country!
Will you join me today and help end the dysfunction in Washington?
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/bio-footer-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240828_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>
Thank you,
Larry Hogan
DONATE TODAY
<https://secure.winred.com/hogan-for-maryland-inc/bio-footer-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240828_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs-acs?utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20240828_political-attacks-email-2_aaeg_acs>

Paid for by Hogan for Maryland, Inc. Unsubscribe
<http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e6e097076222435e8d3e857a5277fc7b&_t=VQmyC0wX_mFTbOjaIXOSSRFKdqTypAAw-OPGRh1u0mNdJXvBgPpTY5dn1b3TTbSLFCZZLYDX01ZWPeZ_L-QN-KiY7e3LDhoxfdGgagsKdrWrvOznIFPPF5FZmMxEz8dA>

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Key battleground states
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my colleague, Tim Kaine. Tim is running for reelection in Virginia to defend our Democratic Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and[chip in if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kaine.wCcz8-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)_
* * *
Peter — Virginia, we have a job to do. **First,** Donald Trump made it 100% clear that he is determined to flip VA red this year, opening offices here in the Commonwealth, holding rallies, and centering Virginia in his campaign efforts. **Then,** Trump threw his weight behind my MAGA opponent, Hung Cao, who would be a rubber stamp for the Project 2025 agenda and Trump’s extreme policies. **Now,** with just 65 days to go until Election Day, it’s time for Democrats to roll up our sleeves and get to work to keep Virginia blue, hold onto my Senate seat, and deliver our 13 electoral votes for Kamala Harris. **The past several days have seen an incredible outpouring of support for Vice President Kamala Harris, and we need to keep it going for Democrats up and down the ticket in key battleground states like Virginia.** [**Will you split a donation of any amount between my re-election campaign and Tammy Baldwin right now so we can keep working to mobilize Democrats in every corner of the Commonwealth?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kaine.wCcz8-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tim Kaine and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=tbe-em-kaine.IJPTZ5&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
[SPLIT $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=tbe-em-kaine.DxIpiY&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
| [SPLIT $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=tbe-em-kaine.l4W-en&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
[SPLIT $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=tbe-em-kaine.hBATMc&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
| [SPLIT $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=tbe-em-kaine.-orpEy&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=tbe-em-kaine.ySbn79&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)
---
We don’t have a single moment to waste, and if we’re going to deliver strong Democratic victories, we need to keep building resources for our voter outreach efforts.
Thank you for stepping up!
-Tim Kaine
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=2&akid=3540%2E35263%2E6TKunV)**

The past several days have seen an incredible outpouring of support for Vice President Kamala Harris, and we need to keep it going for Democrats up and down the ticket in key battleground states like Virginia. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tim Kaine and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | | | We don’t have a single moment to waste, and if we’re going to deliver strong Democratic victories, we need to keep building resources for our voter outreach efforts. Thank you for stepping up! -Tim Kaine P.O. But first, I gotta say: I’ve been blown away by the number of dedicated folks from all over North Dakota who’ve been rushing to get their hands on a sign. Our campaign is firing on all cylinders to keep up with the demand for these signs and make sure we get one to every single voter in North Dakota who wants one. And that’s where you come in. Peter, I know you might be wondering how something as simple as a yard sign can help us unseat one of the most extreme senators in the entire country.
Here’s the deal: The key to winning this race is going to be neighbors reaching out to neighbors and talking to each other about what our campaign is all about.
A yard sign is more than a show of support, it’s a conversation starter.
And the more conversations we can start, the more we can get folks talking about the real issues facing North Dakota, the more votes we can earn.
In a race this close, even one conversation sparked by a yard sign could be the difference between victory and defeat.
[**That’s why we’ve got to make sure we’ve got a yard sign in every single corner of this great state – no matter how small (or big!) the town.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91987739/495628297/-1408912288?amount=15&refcode=20240901_em_fr_b1_katrina_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg4ODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1YmJiNTMtOTk2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BhS4V1Tu5mDXzxvnTJQpIpEoNOXzsoMi64v4-MdNcwE=)
The reality is: Our polling shows 54% of voters are open to replacing Kevin Cramer with someone new, so every single vote is critical to winning this election.
[**_I’d hate to have to turn away even one supporter who wants a yard sign to show their support for our campaign. I can't stress this enough: Friend; every one of them MUST win in November! I'm personally asking you to chip in any amount you can to help them take on the radical Left and win their races. If we drop the ball on this, the American Dream could be DOOMED! "So please split a donation nine ways to me and these fine patriots:" | | "SPLIT A DONATION TO NINE PATRIOTS >>" You can also get to know each of these candidates below and help them out individually! | "MARCO’S SENATE SLATE" BERNIE MORENO (R-OH) | "Bernie Moreno" As an immigrant who came here legally from Colombia, Bernie Moreno lived the American Dream by turning a failing car dealership into one of the largest dealership chains in the country. Ohio is a must-win for conservatives to flip the Senate red, and that means helping Bernie Moreno. | | "DONATE NOW >>" TIM SHEEHY (R-MT) | "Tim Sheehy" Tim Sheehy is a Navy SEAL, aerial firefighter, and conservative running in another must-win state for conservatives. body:
Vice President Harris is focused on the future. Trump is obsessed with the past. It’s as simple as that. | | |

Peter, we have 65 days left to turn our vision for America into a reality. A vision where all Americans can thrive. But we’re up against another vision -- that of Donald Trump and the MAGA right -- where our rights are ripped away and where only the top 1% benefits. **Ultimately, this election boils down to two very different visions for our nation:_Vice President Harris is focused on the future. Trump is obsessed with the past. It’s as simple as that._** [**Which will you choose, Peter? clean_body: Vice President Harris is focused on the future. Trump is obsessed with the past. It’s as simple as that. | | | Peter, we have 65 days left to turn our vision for America into a reality. A vision where all Americans can thrive. But we’re up against another vision -- that of Donald Trump and the MAGA right -- where our rights are ripped away and where only the top 1% benefits. Ultimately, this election boils down to two very different visions for our nation:Vice President Harris is focused on the future. Trump is obsessed with the past. It’s as simple as that. Donald Trump wants to take our country backwards, but we must make it clear: We are not going back. Sep 01, 2024. That’s today. Today is when we’re asking you to make your first contribution to help send a strong message about the power of this grassroots movement. Our fundamental freedoms as Americans are on the ballot this November, and it’s up to each of us to choose what kind of country we want to build for future generations. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Kamala HQ | | | ---|---|--- | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91987953/495629089/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzYwNzJiOS05YTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwbEy5vaQ2gKX2lNsaq2mQXf8-yFz2cj-9pCIt5sgIQ=) Hi, I just wanted to take a quick moment to say thank you. We are facing a real uphill climb to fight back against the barrage of attacks we’re facing in this toss-up district, but this amazing grassroots coalition came through to help us meet our August fundraising goal. **Our odds of winning this race — and flipping the House blue — are meaningfully higher thanks to you.** Whether you’ve donated, spread the word, encouraged friends to vote, or just kept up with my (increasingly frequent) email updates, you’re making an impact, and I’m grateful to have you on my team. While we’ve made incredible progress, this fight is far from over. Two years ago, we won with a narrow 50.1% of the vote, and this year’s race is even tighter with the NRCC pouring millions into our district. Sometimes, in the chaotic election-season news cycle, what we’re actually fighting for can get lost in the fray. To me, this campaign is about delivering real progress for the people of Oregon on the issues that matter most — like protecting our personal freedoms, keeping our families safe, and building an economy where working families can get ahead. We’ve got two months to win this race and deliver on this opportunity to make life better for people in Oregon and across the country. We’ve got our work cut out for us, but with the incredible team I’ve got fighting alongside me, I feel optimistic and energized about the path ahead. Thank you again for your support, Andrea Salinas | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91987954/495629090/1085920126?refcode=email_090124_Thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzYwNzJiOS05YTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwbEy5vaQ2gKX2lNsaq2mQXf8-yFz2cj-9pCIt5sgIQ=)

clean_body: = Hi, I just wanted to take a quick moment to say thank you. We are facing a real uphill climb to fight back against the barrage of attacks we’re facing in this toss-up district, but this amazing grassroots coalition came through to help us meet our August fundraising goal. Our odds of winning this race — and flipping the House blue — are meaningfully higher thanks to you. Whether you’ve donated, spread the word, encouraged friends to vote, or just kept up with my (increasingly frequent) email updates, you’re making an impact, and I’m grateful to have you on my team. While we’ve made incredible progress, this fight is far from over. Two years ago, we won with a narrow 50.1% of the vote, and this year’s race is even tighter with the NRCC pouring millions into our district. Sometimes, in the chaotic election-season news cycle, what we’re actually fighting for can get lost in the fray. To me, this campaign is about delivering real progress for the people of Oregon on the issues that matter most — like protecting our personal freedoms, keeping our families safe, and building an economy where working families can get ahead. We’ve got two months to win this race and deliver on this opportunity to make life better for people in Oregon and across the country. We’ve got our work cut out for us, but with the incredible team I’ve got fighting alongside me, I feel optimistic and energized about the path ahead. Thank you again for your support, Andrea Salinas | | = | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. This doesn't make any sense, folks:
**A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until midnight, but somehow we're still short of our daily fundraising goal.**
With Republicans naming me as a top target and experts rating my Senate race a toss-up, I really need your support to fight back against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana.
This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up their spending with $4,000,000 in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl.

clean_body: This doesn't make any sense This doesn't make any sense, folks: A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until midnight, but somehow we're still short of our daily fundraising goal. With Republicans naming me as a top target and experts rating my Senate race a toss-up, I really need your support to fight back against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana. This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up their spending with $4,000,000 in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl. I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short has real consequences. If everyone who received this email chipped in $5, we could close the gap tonight, but the truth is not everyone will. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for having my back, Jon ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Friends — thank you so, so much for your generous support throughout the month of August.
Thanks to you, we not only reached our ambitious $650,000 fundraising goal (!), but we also saw the most individual grassroots donations of ANY month of my entire career so far! That’s a big deal to me because it shows just how many people are invested in protecting and building on our progress.
Here’s just a little bit of what my campaign will be able to do now that we’ve reached this goal:
*
Have
more
conversations
in
person,
at
the
door,
and
on
the
phone
with
voters
about
the
stakes
of
this
election.
*
Learn
more
about
who
is
still
undecided
and
how
we
can
connect
with
them.
*
Run
targeted
ads
online
to
make
sure
voters
all
across
Virginia
know
when
and
how
to
go
vote.
*
Support
our
great
Democratic
Congressional
candidates
throughout
VA
who
are
working
to
flip
the
House
blue.
So when I say that when we deliver victories for Democrats in November, it will be because of you, I really mean it .
Now that we’re in the month of September, things are only going to get busier — and at the end of this month, we’ll face our last quarterly FEC deadline, so I’m going to need to keep coming to you for help.
If you didn’t have a chance to donate in August — or if you want to help us jumpstart progress toward our most ambitious goal yet for the month of September — you can contribute by following this link. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
But for now, I just want to let you know, from the bottom of my heart, how much I appreciate this team. No one can do this work all on their own, so thank you for being by my side!
Sincerely,
Tim Kaine
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
It’s a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives—for the better.| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=48f109ab0f3b43518b61e7d85bee5daf&_e=39lVRzvvF5_xw-M_SV-XhPr5N5p2sEJ_Csb_DHN1jKXu3afSqUJvV60hZ0Jhhgo1cyMpMqNB4tD_r9yDGV3H7gvqxLIMmxtjbo8xFHUs9N9DpTDKQSbOax5N5TZdOa1-NDg0gy1zgvBhfDvV3tjTC3eJLTLxnp3B9p1qaUucHJJAWaqOjw9oNMXg3XNACldMP7zrb0CZegXChq-yeCMlos4_VROsXguhpwbUnhdk3qHiwSPMovTOqVx0tF-_7fmQpERZ6TsCjyOci6NupvIM11y1oVEShlxhpmTkwN9AesVIrQ2TMyMWIuWsxQl2H8CV)
---
Peter, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--_for the better_. **Peter, over the past year, I wrote my new book,****_Right Wing Revolution,_****as a guide for a return to an America where ...**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

_[**Can I send you a FREE copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_****to read today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA --and our critically important work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=48f109ab0f3b43518b61e7d85bee5daf&_e=39lVRzvvF5_xw-M_SV-XhPr5N5p2sEJ_Csb_DHN1jKXu3afSqUJvV60hZ0Jhhgo1cyMpMqNB4tD_r9yDGV3H7gvqxLIMmxtjbo8xFHUs9N9DpTDKQSbOax5N5TZdOa1-NDg0gy1zgvBhfDvV3tjTC4geJiZX_SOAIlGXAcsnH9Qpq7qpng0h9MhHAXXDsxzIV-aZr0sTDTMyLH3zFFRRsAmnlMhUS-aTmDFnbWW3J1qgF2rTpKn5GhjA4ZoPdHUPQkDJ83W9OhAbnyRpyb5m4QhG9n-P5G7zr-iSvdhGPpe_c4OhNqwFMpeDJNyZRXI5)_
---
[**Make your gift & get your FREE book**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=48f109ab0f3b43518b61e7d85bee5daf&_e=39lVRzvvF5_xw-M_SV-XhPr5N5p2sEJ_Csb_DHN1jKXu3afSqUJvV60hZ0Jhhgo1cyMpMqNB4tD_r9yDGV3H7gvqxLIMmxtjbo8xFHUs9N9DpTDKQSbOax5N5TZdOa1-NDg0gy1zgvBhfDvV3tjTC7_mArPDgslhc1yAeob1pH78ZPK6OnU2Zw9XOcrJyTarPQfq74B1yy77YZzrM0N2j2I24yU0QU0l6SOt7Ij6Qlboq58X1CVGKiqpQ9hURDsv_THTDtS8-55bTB2v-elhtxVl4JVjE_zPnQ8tCQpa5A-M4MFbm0Abmkr56R4tfe42)
---
Peter, I'm proud to say that _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before:
* It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right.

* It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American.

* It's NOT a call for __ our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on __ how _all Americans_ can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving _ourselves_.

**I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=48f109ab0f3b43518b61e7d85bee5daf&_e=39lVRzvvF5_xw-M_SV-XhPr5N5p2sEJ_Csb_DHN1jKXu3afSqUJvV60hZ0Jhhgo1cyMpMqNB4tD_r9yDGV3H7gvqxLIMmxtjbo8xFHUs9N9DpTDKQSbOax5N5TZdOa1-NDg0gy1zgvBhfDvV3tjTCxzXsYARegDgnI1q1f2RoGN1mvdppjNuRJAXPX3J1zqvqwa8hltfWy0zZJcRgnKbavGWYmnueKBXwdcs1th9h0vI4aAfyd-i10c7wLDVSPyQyFVpAocQcPF4jI77YccbvCw-JVniJ6fWK44jopWj79vg4VHkpPnlMVHCo9pKb280)**_

clean_body: It’s a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives—for the better.| | | Peter, We're in a moment of national reflection. And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives--for the better. Peter, over the past year, I wrote my new book,Right Wing Revolution,as a guide for a return to an America where ... We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness. We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution. We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal. We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don't have to lock our doors at night. We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans. Peter, I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO OTHER book you've read from the Right before: It's NOT a history of political tactics and the back-and-forth between Left and Right. It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos, although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every American. It's NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a difference - instead, its focus is on how all Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves. I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible --which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE. In this defining moment for America's future, let's come together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The true cost of this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And why we can't afford another six years of Josh Hawley.
#
Peter — It should be clearer than ever now: We cannot afford six more years of Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
I’ll explain more in a moment. **[But for now, can you please rush a donation of any amount toward my campaign? The U.S. Senate just became more important than ever — and of the few opportunities to flip a seat in 2024, this race is our most affordable chance to defeat a vulnerable Republican incumbent.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)
---
Josh Hawley has spent his whole career attacking our freedoms, undermining our democracy, and accumulating power at the expense of the Missourians he was elected to represent. He’s even now openly declared he’ll lead a **“Christian Nationalist”** crusade in Washington — starting in 2025. He’s already shown us what that looks like — can you imagine if he convinced a Senate majority or even a president to back it up?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)
**[FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)**
**If we’re able to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November, it will be a devastating blow to the extremist nationwide crusade against liberty — and we’ll also get one more vote to defend our freedoms, protect our democracy, and take back power for working people.**
And the good news is that we’ve paved a real path to victory.
Our grassroots campaign has outraised Hawley at nearly every single fundraising deadline. We’ve earned the earliest-ever endorsements for a U.S. Senate challenger from the Missouri AFL-CIO and the rest of Missouri’s election-winning labor movement. We’ve turned out thousands of voters across rural, urban, and suburban Missouri at events in every corner of the state. And now in November, we’ll even have a referendum to end Missouri’s abortion ban on the ballot.
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)**
Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote — and that was before anyone had a chance to expose his obsession with controlling our lives. Now, he’s the least popular GOP incumbent Senator up for re-election this year — in the first election since he helped overturn Roe and enact a total abortion ban in Missouri.
**If we can get the truth about Hawley’s record of extremism in front of Missouri voters early and often, I know we can win this race.**
But I’m counting on your help to do it, Peter. So I’m urgently asking:
**[Will you rush a donation of any amount toward my campaign today? As one of the only opportunities we’ve got to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this year, investing in our race could be your chance to make a real difference in this year’s election — and for the future of our freedoms and democracy.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=9&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=10&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=11&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=12&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=13&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69825?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=14&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/69824?refcode=em20240901-7511&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)
---
I’m ready to be the real warrior for working people Missouri — and our entire country — needs in the U.S. Senate. Thank you for helping me make it happen.
Now let’s get back to work,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240901-7511-footer&t=16&refcode2=7511_614464_p6az_Y&akid=7511%2E614464%2Ep6az_Y)**

name: Belnome For Congress
subject: Jersey Joe Belnome Volunteer Meetup
body:
Dear Patriot,

Thank you for your interest in a much needed Volunteer Drive to defeat the
radical Liberal Mikie Sherrill. With your help, we will flip Our District
back to Conservative Values and Leadership.

We're excited to invite you to a Meet-up for the 'Belnome for Congress'
campaign this Thursday, September 5th, from 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM. Food and
beverage provided!

This will be a great opportunity to meet fellow volunteers, discuss our
strategy for the coming weeks and get energized for the work ahead. We'll
also go over important updates and distribute campaign materials.

*Please reply "RSVP Yes"* to confirm your attendance, and we will share the
exact location in Belleville, NJ. We look forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,
Jersey Joe Belnome
VoteJerseyJoe.com

subject: Why I choose Josh every day
body:
and why you should too!

| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91989718/495635961/-1335305109?&refcode=E10291-20240901-PamHarder-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMxM2IzMzMtYTU2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC9DxZdbm-xoZEAfEWyzqZ0nJnVUIrYN41tcKbaCJWQ=)** Hi Peter, it's Pam Harder! I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for your support. Our baby, Karina, is now 5 months old and is such a ray of sunshine. Her big sister Lillian, now age 2, runs circles around us, remarkably on a diet of almost exclusively raspberries and crackers. Our living room is full of toddler art supplies, gymnastics equipment, newborn play pads, stacks of children’s books, and a small menagerie of stuffed animals. Josh and I are feeling an odd combination of both extreme joy and extreme exhaustion :). A lot of you have asked me what “Congressman Josh Harder” is like outside of work, as “Dada”. When Josh gets home from work, he immediately changes out of his suit and into a t-shirt and shorts and spends the rest of the night doing giggles and tummy time on the floor. Josh is also the champion “playground Dada” I call him. By this point, I’m pretty sure he has taken Lillian to every single playground in Tracy, plus several in Stockton, Lodi, and Manteca, too! Throughout this challenging period of juggling a newborn and a toddler, Josh continues to show the traits that make me excited to choose him every single day. This week, we are celebrating 11 years together. If I had to describe Josh as a dad, I would say he is extremely resilient, kind, humble, thoughtful, and a strong leader for our daughters. You all know and love Josh for the amazing Congressman that he is; every day, he goes to work for our community. Those traits that make him such a great dad are the same traits that make him the kind of leader we want and need in Congress. **[So today I’m asking you to step up for Josh and donate whatever you can to help him win re-election and continue fighting for our families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91989719/495635962/-1335305109?&refcode=E10291-20240901-PamHarder-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMxM2IzMzMtYTU2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC9DxZdbm-xoZEAfEWyzqZ0nJnVUIrYN41tcKbaCJWQ=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91989720/495635963/1287215685?refcode=E10291-20240901-PamHarder-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMxM2IzMzMtYTU2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC9DxZdbm-xoZEAfEWyzqZ0nJnVUIrYN41tcKbaCJWQ=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91989721/495635964/1287215685?refcode=E10291-20240901-PamHarder-EG-Surrogate&amount=10&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMxM2IzMzMtYTU2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CC9DxZdbm-xoZEAfEWyzqZ0nJnVUIrYN41tcKbaCJWQ=)**

clean_body: and why you should too! | | = Hi Peter, it's Pam Harder! I wanted to take a moment to thank you all for your support. Our baby, Karina, is now 5 months old and is such a ray of sunshine. Her big sister Lillian, now age 2, runs circles around us, remarkably on a diet of almost exclusively raspberries and crackers. Our living room is full of toddler art supplies, gymnastics equipment, newborn play pads, stacks of children’s books, and a small menagerie of stuffed animals. Josh and I are feeling an odd combination of both extreme joy and extreme exhaustion :). A lot of you have asked me what “Congressman Josh Harder” is like outside of work, as “Dada”. When Josh gets home from work, he immediately changes out of his suit and into a t-shirt and shorts and spends the rest of the night doing giggles and tummy time on the floor. Josh is also the champion “playground Dada” I call him. By this point, I’m pretty sure he has taken Lillian to every single playground in Tracy, plus several in Stockton, Lodi, and Manteca, too! Throughout this challenging period of juggling a newborn and a toddler, Josh continues to show the traits that make me excited to choose him every single day. This week, we are celebrating 11 years together. If I had to describe Josh as a dad, I would say he is extremely resilient, kind, humble, thoughtful, and a strong leader for our daughters. You all know and love Josh for the amazing Congressman that he is; every day, he goes to work for our community. Those traits that make him such a great dad are the same traits that make him the kind of leader we want and need in Congress. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Your support means the world and we appreciate you. Pam Harder *

If you’d like to help my team get a head start on our September goal, = = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Trump just called me a “disaster” on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| Friend—

Trump was in my congressional district last week, his 9th visit to Michigan since starting his 2024 presidential race – and his 3rd in just 9 days.

And while he was on stage in Potterville, Michigan, he called me out directly, saying that I am “a disaster.”

It’s not the first time that Donald Trump has come to Michigan and attacked me – in the past he’s gone as far as to call me a “far-left liberal lunatic” – and it will not be the last time. That’s why I need your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. Please, use this link to donate to my campaign and New Dems now:

[**Actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q32024_spl-slotkin »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91990069/495637298/965548300?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240901_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGE1NTdiNy1hNzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D0CPevBdlhc53d365w96Vto8v1Dpqg0ZtTrKEEggsn8=)

Trump also lavished praise on my opponent and made a bold prediction: that Republicans will flip this Senate seat red.

During his rally, he also claimed that the polls are rigged, attacked autoworkers, complained about slights and grievances, and undermined the sacrifices of our military and veterans. He also announced a policy to federally fund IVF treatments — despite the fact that every Republican Senate candidate (including our opponent) has refused to say if they would protect IVF federally. Even worse, my opponent, Mike Rogers, co-sponsored 4 bills that would make IVF impossible nationwide.

As I always say, watch what they do, not what they say. Mike Rogers and Donald Trump have both felt the political winds shift against them on the issue of choice, and now they are desperately hoping to persuade voters that they have changed – but Michiganders are not buying it.

We know Trump’s playbook, Julia. And every time Trump returns, it is a likely boon for our potential opponent – in fundraising, in media coverage, and in volunteer activity.

We need to not only match that energy, but exceed it.

[**No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back. We can't let that happen. Want to help? Chip in what you can to my campaign and New Dems and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91990070/495637299/965548300?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240901_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGE1NTdiNy1hNzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D0CPevBdlhc53d365w96Vto8v1Dpqg0ZtTrKEEggsn8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and New Dems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91990071/495637300/965548300?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20240901_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGE1NTdiNy1hNzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D0CPevBdlhc53d365w96Vto8v1Dpqg0ZtTrKEEggsn8=)

name: John James
subject: Urgent message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, This is Congressman John James. I have an urgent message for America First Patriots like you. **I’m sending out a distress signal because I FAILED to meet my most critical deadline of the election so far. ** My team just informed me that I am nearly **$7,500** short on my August monthly goal. If we don't immediately correct this shortfall, we are going to be in danger of losing to the socialist left. **Here's how things are shaping up now:** _**FIRST: **_A poll came out showing me **trailing by 6 POINTS** in my rematch against Democrat Carl Marlinga. Our last election was decided by less than 1%, so this puts us in a gravely serious predicament. _**THEN**_ : My socialist opponent was selected to participate in the DCCC’s notorious **RED** to **BLUE **program, where he is all but assured of receiving the full backing and financial support of the Democrat Establishment. _**NOW: **I have made an emergency decision to **EXTEND** our end-of-month deadline by 24 hours to get our campaign back on track. _ The stakes of this election are unlike anything I’ve ever experienced. If we lose in November, our district and our nation will be lost to the radical Left FOREVER.****
---
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=075d2415f6254817b2816977bac4a751&_e=XNyLvs7BwoWGib4DsBG-82-JXPycT3iHG5gmlA-ok7xFYkjbsojDaSHqE1Pnc_CBiIzLXrIe3CB6E4LogNXpE-tCc7VXMmni0Xpu3cHAdtZy7miiRXSb8S_2VaZ0JgNoiRvQbKFGEnPHksOosu9YuF_cgEZs5DOZuwN8EH9i4hSVbi6F_y7Y_7CWQsnQdyZoMV_oRbebDW9zcS6Otja3UbyBZ4AObe--XmoT0TlAJaV3lA40icgMbvjwBuEI7FMTGmFPeWzFUtgE9KL5fPyfwPZ03dmxK_s6t5W2vaNwETStnbCbmS-pP4wNb8hQgdPnTnak1YUSJIDhpgcrN6FrRnL2KhxozH9ahJoyHYNw9Fo%3D)
---
I love America too much to let that happen. That’s why I fought for our country as a U.S. Army Apache helicopter pilot and that’s why I’m continuing my fight for our country in Congress. **_I have 24 hours to turn this ship around or everything we have fought so hard for could be for nothing. _** **[I’m humbly asking, will you step up and join our mission?](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=075d2415f6254817b2816977bac4a751&_e=XNyLvs7BwoWGib4DsBG-82-JXPycT3iHG5gmlA-ok7xFYkjbsojDaSHqE1Pnc_CBiIzLXrIe3CB6E4LogNXpE-tCc7VXMmni0Xpu3cHAdtZy7miiRXSb8S_2VaZ0JgNoiRvQbKFGEnPHksOosu9YuF_cgEZs5DOZuwN8EH9i4hSVbi6F_y7Y_7CWQsnQdyZoMV_oRbebDW9zcS6Otja3UV8q4lgSmW1r7ZNj83tKj1NhqsRqosNzJ95E1s_X-UYsWIVQts6W_0HA_PQmfeqLhSQnsXcdgTx-CSGtd8YLPeZEs4zIQ0HhjfSEQOMblqrx9YOQlFyPUg7v209Pmzy4-M-Cv5jlF4evel8f3xbt9ls%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, This is Congressman John James. I have an urgent message for America First Patriots like you. I’m sending out a distress signal because I FAILED to meet my most critical deadline of the election so far. My team just informed me that I am nearly $7,500 short on my August monthly goal. If we don't immediately correct this shortfall, we are going to be in danger of losing to the socialist left. Here's how things are shaping up now: FIRST: A poll came out showing me trailing by 6 POINTS in my rematch against Democrat Carl Marlinga. Our last election was decided by less than 1%, so this puts us in a gravely serious predicament. THEN : My socialist opponent was selected to participate in the DCCC’s notorious RED to BLUE program, where he is all but assured of receiving the full backing and financial support of the Democrat Establishment. NOW: I have made an emergency decision to EXTEND our end-of-month deadline by 24 hours to get our campaign back on track. The stakes of this election are unlike anything I’ve ever experienced. If we lose in November, our district and our nation will be lost to the radical Left FOREVER.** I love America too much to let that happen. That’s why I fought for our country as a U.S. Army Apache helicopter pilot and that’s why I’m continuing my fight for our country in Congress. I have 24 hours to turn this ship around or everything we have fought so hard for could be for nothing. ** Thank you, John James U.S. Congressman (MI-10)Former Apache Helicopter Pilot | | Paid for by John James for Michigan Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Rachel
subject: not the update I wanted to send
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Friend, please take a look.
| | |
---
Hey, friend, it's Rachel, Sherrod's campaign manager. I really wish I was reaching out with better news, but unfortunately, **we fell $62,015 short** of our August fundraising goal.
The timing honestly couldn't be worse. Our race in Ohio is tied, and it recently became the most expensive in the country, with more being spent on TV ads here than in any other Senate race. Pulling back now would be devastating for our campaign.
Our one saving grace right now is the holiday weekend. Things really kick into high gear after Labor Day, so if we can make up the gap by midnight tonight, we'll be able to turn things around. August slipped away into a moment of time, but it’s not too late to donate.
That's why I'm personally asking: **Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us get back on track to win here in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**

Here's the link: **[https://sherrodbrown.com/donate/budget-gap/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91990620/495639236/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2683-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU3NTcxNy1hYTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bm8bKn8SbCulPkzCYKsLs1J5aS3qMNMNZ-vgwWoEDgE=)**
Really appreciate your support.

– Rachel

body:
I need to say thank you. We’ve seen an incredible surge in grassroots support over the last month that enabled us to hit our August fundraising goal and keep us on track to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer and flip this seat blue. I could not be more grateful for all the support, and the truth is if we’re going to win this race, we need your support until the very end.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91990627/495639273/476240536?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.09.01_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZiMzIyYzYtYWE2OC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t4elehDkHMT72eoKhqyOvKQovz0Kk_aFch-0Y4mjFy8=) I need to say thank you. We’ve seen an incredible surge in grassroots support over the last month that enabled us to hit our August fundraising goal and keep us on track to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer and flip this seat blue. I could not be more grateful for all the support, and the truth is if we’re going to win this race, we need your support until the very end. **I’m feeling the momentum, excitement, and optimism, and I hope that you are too.** But let me be clear: We still have a lot of hard work ahead of us. We’re facing a lot of attacks and challenges in these final few months. Our team is doing everything possible to sustain our momentum because this race is going to be really, really close. We expect it to be decided by a very close margin, so we have no room for error here. I can’t thank you enough for being a part of this grassroots team, and for everything you’re doing to help us win in November. I mean it when I say that I wouldn’t be here without your support, and that’s something I will never take for granted. And together, we’re going to win. – Janelle P.S. This is it, team. name: Jill Stein
subject: Check out this amazing new poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Big support for Stein/Ware from Muslim voters

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cair_poll_email&n=1)
---
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this new poll of Muslim American voters from the Council on American-Islamic Relations showing our campaign at 29% - tied with Kamala Harris!
---
---
We're grateful for the strong support of Muslim voters who share with us the determination to end genocide in Gaza, and the injustice faced by our Muslim friends. We urge all people of conscience to resist the propaganda telling you to hold your nose and vote for genocide. If you vote for genocide, you are actively consenting to it and enabling it. Don’t let them talk you out of your humanity. Stopping genocide is the moral imperative of our time. Voting against genocide is a practical imperative as well. Half a million Palestinian lives hang in the balance from starvation imposed by Israel, according to the UN. Now polio and cholera are intensifying the threat. Every vote against genocide is a shot across the bow of empire, announcing that its days are numbered and that the opposition is getting organized. This builds the pressure for a ceasefire and a weapons embargo, and brings the day closer when we will achieve them. As Frederick Douglass said, power concedes nothing without a demand. Your vote is that demand. Voting for the lesser evil disappears your opposition to genocide. In fact, there is no lesser evil. In this race we have two greater evil choices. We say forget the lesser evil and fight for the greater good \- like our lives depend on it. Because they do. The political elites want you to think you are small and powerless, and that resistance is futile. This is a propaganda campaign to disarm you. In fact, a large majority of Americans want an immediate ceasefire and diplomatic solution to the genocide on Gaza. On top of that, one in three eligible voters didn’t vote in 2020, with those voters being mostly low-income, people of color and young - the very voters our anti-genocide, pro-worker agenda speaks to by calling for an end to genocide now, a weapons embargo to Israel, a $25 minimum wage, health care as a human right through medicare for all, free public higher education, national rent control, reparations, and an end to mass incarceration and police violence. We can pay for these programs by cutting the massive bloated military budget and requiring the rich to pay their fair share of taxes. We can have an America that works for all of us. It begins by ending the genocide and moving from a militarized foreign policy to a new foreign policy based on international law, human rights and diplomacy - and moving the trillions squandered on endless war to the urgent needs of the American people here at home. The Muslim-American community has the experience, the insight and the moral fiber to stand up and lead the way. Together with students, Jews, Christians and people of faith and humanity, we are an unstoppable force for a world that works for all of us. We must build that world starting now. Please join us in building a peaceful, just, green world by volunteering today:
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/volunteer?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cair_poll_email&n=2 "VOLUNTEER") [VOLUNTEER](https://www.jillstein2024.com/volunteer?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cair_poll_email&n=2)
---
In gratitude and solidarity, Jill Stein
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cair_poll_email&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cair_poll_email&n=3)
---

---

---

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Trump has “no regrets” over the overturning of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4053%2E552475%2EFz3D9M)
Peter, as the saying goes, when someone tells you who they are — believe them.
**_Speaking to CBS News, Donald Trump said that he has “no regrets” over his Supreme Court picks and the overturning of Roe v. Wade._**
And if elected, David McCormick would support Trump’s anti-choice agenda. McCormick has previously said he supports a national abortion ban and called the overturning of Roe v. Wade “a huge victory.” McCormick and Trump’s attack on women’s rights will succeed if they’re able to flip Pennsylvania red.

body:
I hope you’re enjoying your Sunday

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991011/495640668/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFmZDdiZS1hYzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jduv82lIlpW3GWyFDyeLR0AINpcB5mPTXRNZo3onxI=) Hey friend, I hope you’re enjoying your Sunday. I just wanted to reach out and say **thank you.** August was a busy month for our team. We officially kicked off the general election — and promptly faced a barrage of attacks from National Republicans. I know we emailed you _(a lot)_ asking for your help. And you didn’t let us down — **because of supporters like you, we were able to meet our fundraising goal for August.** In a battleground race like this, hitting those benchmarks is so, so important for putting our campaign in a position to win. You really came through when it mattered. I never take for granted what a privilege it is to serve the people of Kansas in Congress. And it’s only possible because of the trust and support people like you have shown me — through the three extremely competitive elections that we won, and today as we work so hard to win a fourth. I won’t lie — with two more months until the general election, we have a lot of hard work ahead of us. **But I have faith in this powerful grassroots coalition.** I have faith that we will work hard to defend the right to choose, protect our planet, and fend off the corporate interests that are trying to swing this race. **And most importantly, I have faith that we will win this election.** So thank you, friend. I’m glad to have you on our team. With gratitude, Sharice | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991012/495640669/-2097022924?refcode=email_090124_thank-you&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGFmZDdiZS1hYzY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jduv82lIlpW3GWyFDyeLR0AINpcB5mPTXRNZo3onxI=)

| | Dear Fellow American, Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill. Not only did he diagnose the threat of modern technology, but he also spoke most effectively against the idea of socialism. So, it should come as no surprise to learn that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear Churchill's legacy. That's why studying an accurate account of his accomplishments is more important than ever. And right now, you can do just that when you get a copy of one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, [**" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9aed2f46666a436ab4df5b728dc3fbc0&_e=f3VyRAjoA5hQJiGVZnthh9R1nd5KT67ntpkdhR2RFK5E5y-0aouKrG1cWf2Ls_PIKG85zr4vThWtOYeLtUS_dwLsn1zNzi7EKMK9z8Pp01NX6g__kLalY7FjVymxQOXEYvAxz_im40K8WHJqJP_DdycryaKimVyhkNcGCAUM7l7JnuL-iKeraIfzMo8kBJWlBJwOALXvMF3HP1yuwkrvOgIS23WST9rAqmm2zKSYc192YywlrUWvNTtm_J9-Gp5NXahtr3FtgDvb8tJXUTilaT1bc0zNGCI6rjlANXPQA-moSUSqaTc_3pbTrXKKTMBfDjN22u0zBiZAadsYAtp55jODCUiGANyKk85yZX-7AlfpMKvX1kYj0seWJ6VrJqhfAbesgqpTYbOUhNQrArS_z8KtaY48TFmAG4dPRwAmMP0%3D) on DVD.
---
| | Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, **and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.** When you view this close study of Churchill's words and deeds, you'll learn timeless lessons that teach:
* The principles and virtues required for great statesmanship.
* How to deal with the threats and opportunities presented by modern technology.
* How to confront the threat of socialism.
* How to serve the cause of our own country as it appears today.

**I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set. And it can be yours today when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9aed2f46666a436ab4df5b728dc3fbc0&_e=f3VyRAjoA5hQJiGVZnthh9R1nd5KT67ntpkdhR2RFK5E5y-0aouKrG1cWf2Ls_PIKG85zr4vThWtOYeLtUS_dwLsn1zNzi7EKMK9z8Pp01NX6g__kLalY7FjVymxQOXEYvAxz_im40K8WHJqJP_DdycryaKimVyhkNcGCAUM7l7JnuL-iKeraIfzMo8kBJWlBJwOALXvMF3HP1yuwkrvOgIS23WST9rAqmm2zKSYc192YywlrUWvNTtm_J9-Gp5NXahtr3FtgDvb8tJXUTilaTx9E0i5Y2ALaPxcJaZFBPRWq5as-6eJv1vKA5cEOLUypv-YspW6XKGpIvmEPrC5hSSs9w52gSUKeioW7inS8CYvlwxCY84O-dHty7fFqu1L-klhJoBu5UcBhHTb3Wlcw8I-Pof8ZdgiWXZ-uS0Uba0%3D)

| | You can reserve your copy using this secure link: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9aed2f46666a436ab4df5b728dc3fbc0&_e=f3VyRAjoA5hQJiGVZnthh9R1nd5KT67ntpkdhR2RFK5E5y-0aouKrG1cWf2Ls_PIKG85zr4vThWtOYeLtUS_dwLsn1zNzi7EKMK9z8Pp01NX6g__kLalY7FjVymxQOXEYvAxz_im40K8WHJqJP_DdycryaKimVyhkNcGCAUM7l7JnuL-iKeraIfzMo8kBJWlBJwOALXvMF3HP1yuwkrvOgIS23WST9rAqmm2zKSYc192YywlrUWvNTtm_J9-Gp5NXahtr3FtgDvb8tJXUTilacd52aeBdGBbcHzJQkgy0Mui7hJXZa4Nhb85kjDnrPGzz04wKZ2UCNAslAaYpuIOBkoHDRSZen-KSVnqQSm9Mr-Ay0cMKSK0FYgPyRJ0wOBvBVq2_xrbdRkxj2qI7cuG8siibEo_S5q0uXKvS_Bxvvs%3D)_ As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than many other books and videos available today. Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. name: Tamie Wilson
subject: You did it!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
I am OVERWHELMED with gratitude today!
With a massive surge of last minute donations over the weekend we absolutely blew our $400K goal out of the water, and ended August with over $426K raised!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240901_thank_you_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240901_thank_you_image]
We’ve now raised over $1.4 MILLION to take down Jim Jordan, and all the wheels are in motion.
Thanks to everyone who pitched in these last few weeks, we were able to start buying media spots to get up on the airwaves and reach every voter in OH-04 who is ready to kick Jim Jordan to the curb.
But we can’t slow down now. We have just over a month until early voting begins, which means these next few weeks are “make or break” for this campaign. We need to DOUBLE what we’ve raised in August this month to blanket the district with ads and keep them on the air through election day. If you can, please give again today, to help me start September strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240901_thank_you_link1]
I am so incredibly proud of my team for moving mountains these last few weeks. Between our hard work reaching voters and the faith you all have put in this campaign, we are READY to bring this home.
We’re already within striking distance of Jordan with the latest polls showing us statistically tied. If we keep up the pressure from now until November then we can FLIP this seat, retire Jim Jordan, and help win the House majority.
We can’t do this alone, so I have a few more favors to ask:
1.

or
more.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240901_thank_you_link2]
It
is
absolutely
vital
for
me
to
spread
our
message
throughout
the
district,
and
recurring
donations
help
us
plan
ahead.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support and for believing in a brighter future for all of us!
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

clean_body: [] Friends, I am OVERWHELMED with gratitude today! With a massive surge of last minute donations over the weekend we absolutely blew our $400K goal out of the water, and ended August with over $426K raised! [] We’ve now raised over $1.4 MILLION to take down Jim Jordan, and all the wheels are in motion. Thanks to everyone who pitched in these last few weeks, we were able to start buying media spots to get up on the airwaves and reach every voter in OH-04 who is ready to kick Jim Jordan to the curb. But we can’t slow down now. We have just over a month until early voting begins, which means these next few weeks are “make or break” for this campaign. We need to DOUBLE what we’ve raised in August this month to blanket the district with ads and keep them on the air through election day. If you can, please give again today, to help me start September strong. [] I am so incredibly proud of my team for moving mountains these last few weeks. Between our hard work reaching voters and the faith you all have put in this campaign, we are READY to bring this home. We’re already within striking distance of Jordan with the latest polls showing us statistically tied. If we keep up the pressure from now until November then we can FLIP this seat, retire Jim Jordan, and help win the House majority. We can’t do this alone, so I have a few more favors to ask: 1. If you’re interested in volunteering to help us ramp up (even if you’re not in Ohio!), will you reply to this email and let us know how you’d like to help? 2. Can you forward this email to 3 friends who can’t stand Jim Jordan and ask them to join you in donating to the campaign? 3. Set up a recurring donation of $25, $75, $150, or more. [] It is absolutely vital for me to spread our message throughout the district, and recurring donations help us plan ahead. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support and for believing in a brighter future for all of us! Working for US, Tamie Wilson [] Donate to Tamie Today [] Tamie Wilson is the Democratic nominee ready to unseat ULTRA MAGA extremist Jim Jordan in OH-04. A single mom and survivor who knows what it’s like to endure and overcome challenges, Tamie's fighting for jobs, healthcare, and positive change for everyday Americans. Your donations will help Tamie turn out every voter we need to flip this seat and send Jordan packing. DONATE >> [] ©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson For US 273 Saratoga St Delaware, OH 43015 United States www.tamiewilson.com [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

body:
It’s been a while. Allow me to re-introduce myself.
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

I wanted to make sure you heard the news: I’m running for Congress. **_[_If you’re fired up and ready to flip this district and take back the House majority, split a donation between my campaign and Letitia James today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991483/495642271/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)_** When I launched my first campaign in 2019, I knew it was going to be a long shot. I was up against better known and better-funded opponents.

Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or anywhere in America.

But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we shocked Washington’s political establishment and won.

I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy, and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion.

But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting and political machinations pushed me out of Congress.

For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday people.

Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820 votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to hear, but do whatever Mike Johnson and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House.

**That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring.

[_We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats are simply not taking back the House in 2024. Make a donation to my campaign and Letitia James to help me win this tough race. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991484/495642272/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)**
______If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and Mondaire Jones will go through immediately:______ | | | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991485/495642273/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991486/495642274/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991487/495642275/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991488/495642276/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)
---
Peter, here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here today.

My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress.

As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the American people, including:
* **Lowering the cost of prescription drugs** for everyone, even those not on Medicare
* **Codifying** _**Roe v. Wade**_**into law** and protecting the freedom to have an abortion
* **Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks** to keep our communities safe
* **Defending our democracy** from the Republican assault on voting and fair elections
* **Protecting Social Security and Medicare** from Republican cuts

Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines.

We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders committed to creating real opportunity for all.

**[_This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley. With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the House majority—are you ready? Split a donation between my campaign and Letitia James now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91991489/495642277/1949790843?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1589-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyMzM0OC1hZTY4LWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKA8wJmZaXHlj2SJ96ErgNVJrLCZ5xaygofjlpQZWwM=)**

Let's do this,

Mondaire
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=BhNeKRv8%2B8X1KKMrwJwDioQ99cIZlSHP8OxVYG2o5VwlNODxuEzxl7u4C5fHHlOp6n%2B1qzfShlmUMQRYltfxtYQB4I2syMzIva%2Fn8bIOn2a4hrk0yBTbzOlg2aZCYzX8zP%2F2XkpO3radQ17maTV%2FHtaPEL7H5T5Blbc4lYEGwTmvr4JiTPkY6Rdw4Qk8Z8ZZ1TWx9Eg3zPwftb1x1Pqaerl%2BG817at%2BJBjZg41OJO02LHR%2FAE10j0qSmRSHJtQpJamoxaM6oN1RXr177hWVb%2FZEDPe%2FdJGe%2BI1%2FfDJoEHMWanXLW3EKCsaX%2Bt0w%2F19SR3Xr%2FRZ6i2afmu9chOYlBSNAGX2UXJLfvZyD5PtQfsspQV7pwq1vtb%2FqZ1emTpUg2cAzLJF%2Fwyfk4z%2F0TwIJZqlG577EmbBuP5gs70boIksKzw%2FDDZr6Xe7vQGcE0oKDK) James for NY 2026

name: Scott Baugh
subject: August Wrap-Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
**Another great month for our campaign, spending time in the community and connecting with voters. Thank you to everyone who continues to volunteer their time with us. We are just getting started!**
|
---
**I love the spirit of the Newport Harbor Republican Women! Thank you for all your hard work to fight for our communities and our families. Together, we’ll ensure Orange County remains that “shining city upon a hill,” inspiring all who seek a better future.**
|
---
**Thank you to our wonderful hosts and our unified team in Huntington Beach, fighting to protect this great city! Huntington Beach - let’s bring this one home.**
|
---
**It’s amazing to see the energy and enthusiasm from all our volunteers at one of our Costa Mesa canvass launches! Your commitment to connecting with voters and spreading our message is what makes this campaign so powerful. Together, we’re knocking on thousands of doors and driving the momentum for a brighter Orange County. Keep up the incredible work—our communities are counting on us!**
|
---
**Had an incredible time at our recent event in Costa Mesa! Huge thanks to our generous hosts for bringing our community together. The passion of the crowd was awesome as we discussed key issues facing our community and the importance of staying engaged as we move forward. Costa Mesa - let’s keep up the momentum and make a difference together!**
|
---
**Thank you to my great friend for hosting such a wonderful event! It was a privilege to have OC Supervisor Don Wagner introduce me and share some kind words. He works tirelessly for Orange County. This is a crucial election and the outpouring of support and the sense of unity as we gather to fight for the future of our community is beyond beautiful.**
|
---
** I had the pleasure of visiting Leisure World in Seal Beach and speaking with the residents. It was inspiring to hear their hopes for the future and to discuss how we can continue to protect and nurture the community they’ve dedicated their lives to building. These residents have given so much to Orange County, and it’s our duty to ensure their needs are met and their legacy preserved for future generations.**
