name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Every dollar we’ve raised has been allocated →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
If we miss our goals, what races do we cut?
---
Please read this: When we talk about our fundraising goals, these are not arbitrary numbers. They are what we need to win in November. And the truth is: every dollar we have raised so far has already been allocated to accomplish that goal. So has the money we have yet to raise. That means every time we come up short of a goal, we have to make some tough choices: do we have to cut spending, and if so what states and races can we not help that we wanted to? Will that mean control of the House or Senate? A state legislative race in Pennsylvania? We have monthly goals, daily goals, and goals we need to reach before Election Day. And so much of what we raise comes from grassroots donations in response to emails like this. So we're asking: [**Can you please contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee to help us reach the fundraising goals we've set to elect Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1123_fr&refcode2=1150_22930333_arNwQ-&akid=1150%2E22930333%2EarNwQ-) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20240901_1123_fr&refcode2=1150_22930333_arNwQ-&akid=1150%2E22930333%2EarNwQ-)**

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: We cannot do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin here. When Virginians elected me in 2021, it sent a shockwave across the country and proved that common sense conservative leadership can win anywhere in America. Virginians hired an outsider and businessman as their Governor to help put Virginia back on the path to prosperity. We lowered taxes, created jobs, reclaimed the honor of America’s Top State for Business, put parents back at the head seat of the table in their children’s lives, and provided record funding for our students, teachers, and law enforcement heroes. This positive change would not have been possible without committed, hardworking voters who devoted their time, energy, and resources to winning that historic election in 2021. In 2024, we have another historic opportunity to make positive change for the entire country by electing Donald J. Trump as President and sending a Republican Majority to the United States Senate. Even in Virginia, a state Joe Biden won by 10 points in 2020, we are seeing a competitive presidential race and an opportunity to flip a critical Senate seat too. But we cannot do this without you. We know Vice President Harris and Senate Democrats will raise hundreds of millions of dollars to win in November. If we let them outpace us in energy and resources, we will get the same failed policies of the last four years for the next four years. We won’t secure our southern border, we won’t bring down the cost of living, and we won’t restore peace through strength around the world. **[**That is why I am asking you to please make a contribution of any amount to help Republicans win in November with a strong Republican Senate Majority to support a President Trump agenda.**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=5decdb6709fa48b5b21841af7ae4e902&_e=R7NAAvq7svIbq_VcaXl4iSRee5467g6axfiCVotZsREY4pHgcWO3YcS9rJH_P05NUIkiLzoD0gu5jsV4idCPS5LDxPb4CZtjn9w7Aubc0oDrGsKFrI59FSXEg2cuz5P7fRQa3PETnUWUOkBSP4pFmlz-N5aSD658D2t2-Ltj4lAFH7ueX0JAGA74FqIuhdh8LKjiSW9Ay9FNVg_O79mYdLTFy8bnmxrioz6Jb4iclH3MzMvzmUzXGo8AIPXi-71WbJJmxYEcraBSa73ITTXT5RAq25wClglS7UBwhltOxgg7kiHu8feEQJ4xFgQiEIHbGPVVf0uiYhJHPc1967USk5R9E-vnvF03b6nR6KY8tBVI1qFk_BPFfRUck9JO2k4miRcS-3GNWwgpBzYCHCIJpihG8FgotVmV78b2BNuyrkEPLKGgVS7NVawM3OXTa74ctkBIjEPrHnuvRAs3I4gmoOyskRBJpP2VkqnWRJoZwM9oMCSKyaG8IbLjrKsUralCL2W6qeRynr2OO9CJfSrS0Q%3D%3D)** Trust me, I have seen what happens when everyone gets off the sidelines and gets in the game to make positive change with common sense conservative leadership. That’s exactly what we did in 2021 for Virginia and, with your help, we can do it again in 2024 for America. Thank you for your commitment and your support.

name: Bob Casey
subject: I love Scranton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my
colleague, Bob Casey. Bob is running for Senate to cut through the
gridlock, stand up to powerful corporate special interests, and fight for
hardworking Pennsylvanians, so I hope you'll read his message and [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3492%2E35263%2Ey8mrz4 ]chip
in if you can.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3492%2E35263%2Ey8mrz4 ]Bob Casey

I love Scranton,
Peter.

It’s where I grew up, it’s where Terese and I raised our four daughters,
and it’s where I’m proud to still call home today.

Every week, when I make my way home from Washington, traveling on Amtrak
and 476, Scranton is my final destination.

When people ask why we chose to make Scranton our home, I tell them it's
because of the people.

When I’m grocery shopping, “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the checkout
line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say
“hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about
what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about
what you’re buying and about your family too.

These conversations remind me how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for
their kids, save for their families’ futures, and give back to their
communities. It reminds me why I’m fighting for the people of our
Commonwealth in the Senate. They deserve a Senator on their side.

Peter,
I’m running for re-election to continue fighting for Pennsylvania
families, but the reality is, this is my toughest race yet.

My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another
“yes” vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the
Senate. That’s why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat
me and flip this seat. GOP super PACs are already spending $75 million,
and there’s more on the way.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=3492%2E35263%2Ey8mrz4 ]With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, your support is more
important than ever. Will you split $10 or more today between my campaign
and Tammy Baldwin to keep PA and the Senate blue?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Bob Casey and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=tbe-em-casey.GoNsiz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240901_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=3492%2E35263%2Ey8mrz4 ]SPLIT $10 NOW

name: Mackenzie For Congress
subject: The Real Campaign Starts Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Happy Labor Day! | | | | |
---
| Friends,
I hope everyone has a happy and safe Labor Day tomorrow! For many, this is a time to enjoy with family and friends as the summer comes to a close and kids go back to school. Labor Day is also the day to recognize American workers for all they have done to grow our great nation.

For our campaign team, Labor Day is when the campaign really starts - as outside groups start pouring millions of dollars into trying to defeat me and voters start to pay attention to the race.
The good news is that we’ve been fighting for months. Since the day after the Primary Election, #TeamMackenzie has been meeting voters, attending events, and raising money – all so we can be victorious in November.
Our message is simple: **Washington DC - and politicians like Susan Wild - have failed us.** **Now it’s time to fight back by electing someone who will help our working families and seniors by combating inflation to make everyday life more affordable, protecting our jobs, helping job creators, and making our nation safe and secure again.**
I am working hard to bring this message to every corner of the Greater Lehigh Valley. I hope you will help me by talking to your friends and neighbors between now and Election Day (and even sooner because vote-by-mail will start in a few weeks.)
**As an update, here are some of the things we were up to this week:**
* Carbon County Get Out The Vote Event
* GT Thompson With Volunteers and Supporters
* The Great Allentown Fair
* Speaking With Veterans
* Dominican Festival

As always, if you need to get in contact with the campaign, please feel free to reach out to info@mackenzieforcongress.com
---
|
---
| **Carbon County Get Out The Vote Event**
This week one of my amazing volunteers, Rochelle Pasquariello, hosted a get out the vote meet-and-greet in Carbon County. Thank you to Rochelle and State Representative Doyle Heffley for having such an amazing event. While Susan Wild said she is “dismayed” to represent Carbon County, I would be honored to do so.
---
|
---
| **Congressman GT Thompson Stumps for Our Campaign**
Thank you to Congressmen GT Thompson for visiting the 7th District to let #TeamMackenzie supporters and volunteers know just how important our race is to keeping control of the House of Representative.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **The Great Allentown Fair**
It’s always a fabulous time at the the Great Allentown Fair and this year was no different. Thank you to all the volunteers who make the Allentown Fair a great success, and thank you to our campaign volunteers for helping us spread the word!
---
|
---
| **Speaking With Veterans**
Susan Wild and I got invited to speak to veterans at the Whitehall VFW Post 7293. I was happy to show up and speak with those who attended about the issues important to them. Sadly, Susan Wild didn’t show - and did not even have the courtesy to respond to the invitation. I heard from veterans about a host of issues, including homelessness, health care, spousal benefits, and fixing the VA. I was also able to talk about how I have helped veterans as a State Representative and how I will continue to help them in Congress, especially using what I learned at the event. It is very possible that Susan Wild didn’t show up because she was uncomfortable speaking with a group of veterans, after she was called out for disparaging a veteran on Memorial Day. Read more[ here](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=a9e17c76ef&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
| **Dominican Festival**
My amazing volunteers and I attended the Allentown Dominican Festival where we were able to meet over a hundred area residents, talk about the campaign and my platform, and even register new voters who are clamoring for new leadership to represent the Lehigh Valley.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| While our Republican candidates have come extremely close to knocking off Susan Wild in the past - even in difficult years for Republicans - now is the time we can win! As the Biden-Wild record continues to fall apart and our polling surges, we have our best chance ever. [Join the fight to help us flip the Lehigh Valley RED once and for all. ](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=9e8b3c8d8c&e=5ccada9200)
---
[Grow the GOP Majority](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=5331509a21&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| FOLLOW ME ON FACEBOOK & X
---
| | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=b11e1c0562&e=5ccada9200)
---
[](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=e38ec5b10e&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
| If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.
---
[Volunteer Today!](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=05c42bca2e&e=5ccada9200)
| | | |
CHECKS CAN BE MAILED
Mackenzie for Congress

Emmaus, PA 18049

The good news is that we’ve been fighting for months. Since the day after the Primary Election, #TeamMackenzie has been meeting voters, attending events, and raising money – all so we can be victorious in November. Our message is simple: Washington DC - and politicians like Susan Wild - have failed us. Now it’s time to fight back by electing someone who will help our working families and seniors by combating inflation to make everyday life more affordable, protecting our jobs, helping job creators, and making our nation safe and secure again. I am working hard to bring this message to every corner of the Greater Lehigh Valley. I hope you will help me by talking to your friends and neighbors between now and Election Day (and even sooner because vote-by-mail will start in a few weeks.) As an update, here are some of the things we were up to this week: Carbon County Get Out The Vote Event GT Thompson With Volunteers and Supporters The Great Allentown Fair Speaking With Veterans Dominican Festival As always, if you need to get in contact with the campaign, please feel free to reach out to info@mackenzieforcongress.com | | Carbon County Get Out The Vote Event This week one of my amazing volunteers, Rochelle Pasquariello, hosted a get out the vote meet-and-greet in Carbon County. Thank you to Rochelle and State Representative Doyle Heffley for having such an amazing event. While Susan Wild said she is “dismayed” to represent Carbon County, I would be honored to do so. | | Congressman GT Thompson Stumps for Our Campaign Thank you to Congressmen GT Thompson for visiting the 7th District to let #TeamMackenzie supporters and volunteers know just how important our race is to keeping control of the House of Representative. | | | | | | | | | | | | | The Great Allentown Fair It’s always a fabulous time at the the Great Allentown Fair and this year was no different. Thank you to all the volunteers who make the Allentown Fair a great success, and thank you to our campaign volunteers for helping us spread the word! | | Speaking With Veterans Susan Wild and I got invited to speak to veterans at the Whitehall VFW Post 7293. I was happy to show up and speak with those who attended about the issues important to them. Sadly, Susan Wild didn’t show - and did not even have the courtesy to respond to the invitation. I heard from veterans about a host of issues, including homelessness, health care, spousal benefits, and fixing the VA. I was also able to talk about how I have helped veterans as a State Representative and how I will continue to help them in Congress, especially using what I learned at the event. It is very possible that Susan Wild didn’t show up because she was uncomfortable speaking with a group of veterans, after she was called out for disparaging a veteran on Memorial Day. Read more | | Dominican Festival My amazing volunteers and I attended the Allentown Dominican Festival where we were able to meet over a hundred area residents, talk about the campaign and my platform, and even register new voters who are clamoring for new leadership to represent the Lehigh Valley. | | | | | | | | | | | | | While our Republican candidates have come extremely close to knocking off Susan Wild in the past - even in difficult years for Republicans - now is the time we can win! As the Biden-Wild record continues to fall apart and our polling surges, we have our best chance ever. | | FOLLOW ME ON FACEBOOK & X | | | | | | | If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777. | | | | CHECKS CAN BE MAILED Mackenzie for Congress P.O. Box 747 Emmaus, PA 18049 | | [Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]() | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com MackenzieForCongress PO Box 747 Emmaus, PA 18049-0747 USA

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Inside our plan to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1849%2E135344%2EeGpki1)

Friend —
Like any good campaign, we have a good idea of the number of votes we'll need to receive in order to win.
We look at past elections, we look at survey data, and we come up with a number campaigns call a "win number," and then we build in a buffer in case turnout is higher than we expect.
That number is our North Star.
From there, we put together a plan to reach that number. That plan includes the number of people we need to persuade to vote for me, and the number of people we think support me who need a push to get to the polls.
We also have a good idea of what it will cost to do those things. That's how we create the budget.
1. What is the number of votes we need to win?
2. How do we get to that number?
3. What will it cost?

Then, the question is, how do we raise that money?
We are at the point in the campaign where the majority of the money we raise comes from people making donations in response to emails like this.
And if we reach our goals, we have a plan to win. If we don't, then we leave things to chance.
I don't want to leave anything to chance. Not with a race this important.
We've received a lot more individual donations than my opponent. But if we're going to reach our goals and win, I need more people like you to make their first donation today.
[**Please make a contribution to my campaign for Senate today to help us reach the goals we need to execute our plan to win this race. clean_body: Friend — Like any good campaign, we have a good idea of the number of votes we'll need to receive in order to win. We look at past elections, we look at survey data, and we come up with a number campaigns call a "win number," and then we build in a buffer in case turnout is higher than we expect. That number is our North Star. From there, we put together a plan to reach that number. That plan includes the number of people we need to persuade to vote for me, and the number of people we think support me who need a push to get to the polls. We also have a good idea of what it will cost to do those things. That's how we create the budget. 1. What is the number of votes we need to win? 2. How do we get to that number? 3. What will it cost? Then, the question is, how do we raise that money? We are at the point in the campaign where the majority of the money we raise comes from people making donations in response to emails like this. And if we reach our goals, we have a plan to win. If we don't, then we leave things to chance. I don't want to leave anything to chance. Not with a race this important. We've received a lot more individual donations than my opponent. But if we're going to reach our goals and win, I need more people like you to make their first donation today. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything, Elissa PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

body:
| | | **Disabled people across America are being paid pennies on the dollar for their labor- and it’s entirely legal.**
**[This Labor Day Weekend, take action. Sign our petition to END the subminimum wage for workers with disabilities.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxg5VmYptwX7vr5KQmz1QnoIKnEcGU7ThBfe-XYFvpkpwrt34v2MSIV-4mPtbWrh0cJjQVFpGcE0yQJasmx14FEpsKLMY8kxCRXRHO-XuiCoQx4DeXPBrD9ui4r66uZkYccjQQUSBdmIAzXpt-wBQL1wxCtPC7rJEJBi1-rel9dJ44ZLBH9lktJWRseQu0Z_G8rrhswRh7RQLMO-AERG757qILPfGq0SgQF_IC54gzM1uAg9yBVkZuQegcYLCSkXDlGC-IW9lFrXF07BoXsSGBMlaxYOxvAGiIBrTPAx3kLk9Qb8BztM7HZH9B0f9SOYF0ktKKGoF-t0q0Ty8ScwG6t3AtqKaMV62-ljbUS_m21Py4yMvVw2vtf09OjSlTtNeu/49e/krsJVzShRmun1oUZk_V03w/h0/h001.XVyeYapjH0M8uUT0Tf6yEBuISryWnbvYW0JHSA8atUk)**
* * *
Workers with disabilities are being paid as little as 25 cents an hour - and under current federal law, _it’s totally legal._
Section 14(c) of the Fair Labor Standards Act, which allows employers to apply for a certificate and legally pay disabled workers less than the $7.25 federal minimum wage!
A Depression-era program created in 1938 is being weaponized to keep thousands of Americans in poverty almost 100 years later.
The premise of the program is that Americans struggling with a disability can be given internship style employment opportunities in order to help them gain valuable skills and eventually re-enter the workforce. This is a fine intention - _in theory._
In practice, shady companies are using this program to exploit people with intellectual and developmental disabilities for their labor and paying them _as little as 25 cents an hour!_
This disgusting practice is keeping Americans with disabilities in a vicious poverty cycle that prevents them from gaining meaningful professional contacts which would allow them to become self-sufficient- the very crisis this program was initially created to alleviate!
**[This Labor Day Weekend, take action for worker’s rights. Tell Congress to abolish the subminimum wage for workers with disabilities.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxg5VmYptwX7vr5KQmz1QnoIKnEcGU7ThBfe-XYFvpkpwrt34v2MSIV-4mPtbWrh0cJjQVFpGcE0yQJasmx14FEpsKLMY8kxCRXRHO-XuiCoQx4DeXPBrD9ui4r66uZkYcp5Qpuk_jb-J1LTejI33jsszsAdk6x7OF2Xk5lVjomMn3XShzXerNltK6oegA4Fm1eQIp3LsQv4xsvbblb7WrwETyP7AV5sIX7R7W_3_TYWsV-9GMqynSQObfMvFGdKbzZCjJ2-QTLM1_H8ZQBtRS5pG8YKuwV-_hDbQPm8UbW3bV8lp934OUvcpGVKW9aLV3HDlowMNSItDIaeLQ_ef_QzD3CuU7qQLFSoPYkkMJNxZHDiTxnyunwyNLMMZx52EZ/49e/krsJVzShRmun1oUZk_V03w/h1/h001.IqfUT4fnwSrSMrRwkVYfTn-weTwWHAm_Q-gp0_jIt_0)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxg5VmYptwX7vr5KQmz1QnoIKnEcGU7ThBfe-XYFvpkpwrt34v2MSIV-4mPtbWrh0cJjQVFpGcE0yQJasmx14FEpsKLMY8kxCRXRHO-XuiCoQx4DeXPBrD9ui4r66uZkYcloQxP79XwaAAqWNjYYtBxoF0mMS1HX-NERCOv4CtUuz4BkmEpTr2yIIfwsIUgPcdKWwo6Zjv62gqTekfzaNhMFA16KV8N2CzDvZ0mNtnz0E0Jp58uKL0NaRBiPqqzQZceFoLAHup3g_LmlqmHw14oNt9sbGF4uijy2-bFHpJz1h47D-4I2RvkmO3vf34sLXkF1ksbv-zVX6Tm5v9OcF9oEhHASplfrzRgZZuId6RMTB_NlgvHjMKhWufAh2RX78A/49e/krsJVzShRmun1oUZk_V03w/h2/h001.jzIxYpeajesuGRC1eprRGPOhd3cEMIhqQ9bEsA8MH-o)
---
The _Washington Post_ reports that under the program nearly 800 facilities in 37 states are currently participating in this horrifying practice. Employers participate by applying for a certificate for the 4(c) exemption and _then they hire disabled workers who they can pay significantly less than the $7.25 minimum wage._

Abuses abound within the tangled bureaucracy where there is almost no program oversight. The entire premise- of providing workers with opportunities in exchange for training- is nonexistent.

In fact, even the sparse pay offered is found to often have been withheld, with one third of the employers enrolled in this program have been found to _owe a collective $20.2 million in back pay to their already extremely underpaid employees!_

**This is more than labor abuse: these are labor abuses against what are frequently some of society’s most vulnerable workers.**

******[Sign this petition to call upon Congress to pass legislation that ENDS Section 14(c) of the Fair Labor Standards Act, which allows employers to apply for a certificate and legally pay disabled workers less than the $7.25 federal minimum wage!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxg5VmYptwX7vr5KQmz1QnoIKnEcGU7ThBfe-XYFvpkpwrt34v2MSIV-4mPtbWrh0cJjQVFpGcE0yQJasmx14FEpsKLMY8kxCRXRHO-XuiCoQx4DeXPBrD9ui4r66uZkYc9Y1s1vnzPMMkCyim0A9MUL2Nav7S5XD9oXO4fSgd9jUdalhCr7KYWFZMDtiYEy2Oe-JbWQ9-33P8ay5siuBTRsvjUTz9AnDNA3QTTjbCsunG6ITY6wCcMn8z39p3q2DRFvnv0jhXPR-gy4Ji4iRXQRO2uPERbwk8YBeTK8gjWucKndRBg78tQhOkBQvajRdkYLMgM7e0IMoV8lfest0j_KyfDbUxUUmK_awmFMQH-XDfeJdL0BfnQnj-COFZ140a/49e/krsJVzShRmun1oUZk_V03w/h3/h001.nO8IjpW9_nzs3fF8AaBgTH7Vkg7wdhvvy1lcEALUzNc)**

Team: From Scranton to the Senate to the White House, President Biden has dedicated his career to bettering the lives of everyday Americans. **We're organizing a MASSIVE card to thank him -- but we need 50,000 signatures to send!**

Ever since he decided not to seek re-election, Democrats from coast to coast have expressed their gratitude for everything he's done for us. There's still time for _you_ to join them -- _as long as you act before midnight!_
